subject: I need you to complete America First agenda

name: Al Franken
subject: a big announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49606?t=6&akid=9200%2E878179%2ES4TghW) Hey, it’s Al Franken.

[**I’m writing because I want you to split $10 or whatever you can (or more than you can) between Voter Protection Project and my friend Josh Riley to help him win one of the most important races in the country in 2024.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49606?t=7&akid=9200%2E878179%2ES4TghW)

Here’s why I support Josh — and why you should too!

Josh knows policy issues backward and forward. Together Josh and I did good stuff when he was my counsel on the U.S. Senate Judiciary Committee – good stuff like protecting victims of domestic violence.

In the Violence Against Women Act, Josh and I wrote a provision that protected survivors of domestic violence from homelessness. **And Josh and I got that protection through a divided Senate, a Republican House, and signed into law.**

Republicans lie and say Josh was bad on crime, but here’s the truth. Josh and I advanced legislation that _funded the police!_ Providing bullet-proof vests for local and state police. And funding crisis intervention training to teach police officers how to de-escalate situations.

**_Together in the Senate, we also made a lot of Republican witnesses look very bad at hearings when we cross-examined them._**

Josh really, really cares about all the stuff I care about. And he is the hardest worker I know.

And finally, this tossup seat is considered one of the most competitive in the nation.

[**So, what do you say? Will you join me by splitting a contribution between Voter Protection Project and Josh’s campaign today?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49606?t=8&akid=9200%2E878179%2ES4TghW) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Josh Riley and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49607?t=9&akid=9200%2E878179%2ES4TghW)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49608?t=10&akid=9200%2E878179%2ES4TghW)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49609?t=11&akid=9200%2E878179%2ES4TghW)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49610?t=12&akid=9200%2E878179%2ES4TghW)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49606?t=13&akid=9200%2E878179%2ES4TghW)
This is important to me. And to our nation.

Thanks,

Al

**P.S.** I always add a P.S to these letters to make another ask. It’s a cheap tactic but for some reason it works! [**DONATE HERE.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49606?t=14&akid=9200%2E878179%2ES4TghW)
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=9200%2E878179%2ES4TghW). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=9200%2E878179%2ES4TghW).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=9200%2E878179%2ES4TghW) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=15&akid=9200%2E878179%2ES4TghW). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=9200%2E878179%2ES4TghW)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=9200%2E878179%2ES4TghW)

clean_body: Fellow American, The only way to ensure that the America First agenda is enshrined into the history books is to have a Republican Senate. Republicans MUST take back the Senate in 2024 because I'll need a red Senate to restore the Make America Great Again movement when I'm back in the White House. You might be watching the Left destroy our great country, day after day, and wonder what you can do to stop them right now. Well Fellow American, you can step up now and ensure that Republican Senate candidates take back the Senate in 2024. Making sure that there is a red Senate is the best thing you can do for the America First agenda right now. Imagine the greatness we could achieve if we have a Republican majority in the House and Senate while I’m in the White House. Thank you, Donald J. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[Medal of Honor Monday: Army Cpl. Charles Pendleton](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4spm8jlvjo519sr44adm45dah0vmtis0cjibo60_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t46mqj4t5m6gpr2d9j6kprct9jmkrncst66uqrf8j0c9j6f837cui6ept5mkoj8cdlkupjb85nmerr4td5mupr2d1kumi34tdkumj30sdlkoob8cjhmkr7b83l6eoj3d9heuprf8h1k8gn48n24hhm1p75ctj66o33c8iv0)

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: I am not willing to accept this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWeOiitDNL

Women and girls are becoming victims of the woke mob.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWeOiitDNL

Friend,

The
Left loves to tout the idea of "equal opportunity," but they're
more than happy to strip women and girls of the opportunity to
compete fairly in sports without facing off against a competitor
twice their size.

When I say it's time to restore common sense, this is what I
mean.

Stories like Riley Gaines' are all too common right now: a woman
forced to compete against biological males, being forced to share
a locker room with men, and feeling abandoned by elected leaders
for not standing up for her and all women and girls in sports.

I
want our girls and women athletes to have opportunities to
compete with fairness and with integrity. That cannot happen when
you allow males to compete in women's sports.

When the radical Left takes someone that swam on the men's team
for three years, then switched to the women's team, and crowns
them the women's champion, they're asking us to be complicit in a
fraud. I am not willing to accept this.

JOIN MY TEAM AND HELP FIGHT THE FRAUD

In
this state, I have signed legislation to keep males from
intruding on the safety of women's locker rooms, prohibited
puberty blockers and operations on gender for minors, and
outlawed the pronoun Olympics being imposed on teachers.

Male athletes should not get to take over women's sports,
children should not be told they were born in the wrong body, and
we should NEVER opt for mutilation for elementary students.

Friend, I know this is wrong, and none of it has a place in our
society. It's time we step up, say what needs to be said, and
take action.

My
campaign would be greatly impacted by a donation of $50 from
every one of our supporters. If you're willing to take action
with me, I am asking for your support today.

DONATE
$10

DONATE
$25

DONATE
$50

DONATE
$75

DONATE ANY AMOUNT

In
Freedom,

Ron
DeSantis

Meet Ron DeSantis

A native Floridian with
blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a
nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin
High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he
was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated
with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission
in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service,
Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah,
Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military
decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service
and the Iraq Campaign Medal.

Ron
also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child
predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a
platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits
and a balanced budget amendment.

In
Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the
weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to
hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in
manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a
veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our
country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans
and expand support for mental health.

In
2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As
governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for
the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when
the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media
united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis
stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding
principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to
transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival.
Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative
priorities:

Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine
mandates,

Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border
crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against
illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured
professors accountable,

Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital
currency,

Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

Protecting the unborn,

Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a
constitutional carry state,

Expanding education freedom,

Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and
entities,

Lowering prescription drug costs,

Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

Creating a universal school choice program,

Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme
Court,

...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout
his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of
nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the
largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than
1.5 million votes.

But
history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the
majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional
wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently
as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30
points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red,
including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties
overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor
DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics,
and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with
battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing
down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his
inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense
suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of
sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even
for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we
choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than
cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe
place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership,
Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education
opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden
Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that
seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to
the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered
the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's
history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:

Record tax relief

ESG prohibitions

Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering
transparency

Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

Improvements to our state's infrastructure

Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death
penalty for child rapists

The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border
crisis

Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward
school unions

Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No
leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor
DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country,
leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron
is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television
anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters,
Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as
charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.
Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without
"green cards"), federal government contractors, and national
banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best
efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address,
occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose
aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The
maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600
($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple
using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary &
$6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute
$10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident
(i.e., green card holder).

This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not
being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose
of making this contribution.

I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card
and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued
to another person.

I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this
contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization,
national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal
contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron
DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his

clean_body: Women and girls are becoming victims of the woke mob. Friend, The Left loves to tout the idea of "equal opportunity," but they're more than happy to strip women and girls of the opportunity to compete fairly in sports without facing off against a competitor twice their size. When I say it's time to restore common sense, this is what I mean. Stories like Riley Gaines' are all too common right now: a woman forced to compete against biological males, being forced to share a locker room with men, and feeling abandoned by elected leaders for not standing up for her and all women and girls in sports. I want our girls and women athletes to have opportunities to compete with fairness and with integrity. That cannot happen when you allow males to compete in women's sports. When the radical Left takes someone that swam on the men's team for three years, then switched to the women's team, and crowns them the women's champion, they're asking us to be complicit in a fraud. I am not willing to accept this. JOIN MY TEAM AND HELP FIGHT THE FRAUD In this state, I have signed legislation to keep males from intruding on the safety of women's locker rooms, prohibited puberty blockers and operations on gender for minors, and outlawed the pronoun Olympics being imposed on teachers. Male athletes should not get to take over women's sports, children should not be told they were born in the wrong body, and we should NEVER opt for mutilation for elementary students. Friend, I know this is wrong, and none of it has a place in our society. It's time we step up, say what needs to be said, and take action. My campaign would be greatly impacted by a donation of $50 from every one of our supporters. If you're willing to take action with me, I am asking for your support today. subject: Milton Friedman: What does “created equal” mean?

| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.

| | | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTk4LTQxZDhkOThmZjQ0ZDQ0M2FhYTk0YjlmYjhlODE3YzAyIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwOi8vcmVzb3VyY2VzLmhvb3Zlci5vcmcvY3JlYXRlZC1lcXVhbC1zaWdudXA_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNyZWF0ZWRlcXVhbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfU1BPNDA4NSZvbGM9MzcwMTIifQ/71akWULkwwLgkEcRZg5dQA)

| | Hi Friend,One of the reasons young people are so attracted to the idea of socialism is the promised equality of outcomes.

They want life to be fair for everyone, and for all to have wellness, happiness, and financial security. But if the end goal of socialism is “equality”, that begs the question: what is equality? Are equality and liberty consistent one with the other or are they in conflict?

| [](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTk4LTQxZDhkOThmZjQ0ZDQ0M2FhYTk0YjlmYjhlODE3YzAyIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwOi8vcmVzb3VyY2VzLmhvb3Zlci5vcmcvY3JlYXRlZC1lcXVhbC1zaWdudXA_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNyZWF0ZWRlcXVhbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfU1BPNDA4NSZvbGM9MzcwMTIifQ/NHnaTrZRdFP5Ybgmsb_BQw)

| | In this [**25-page commentary**](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTk4LTQxZDhkOThmZjQ0ZDQ0M2FhYTk0YjlmYjhlODE3YzAyIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwOi8vcmVzb3VyY2VzLmhvb3Zlci5vcmcvY3JlYXRlZC1lcXVhbC1zaWdudXA_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNyZWF0ZWRlcXVhbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfU1BPNDA4NSZvbGM9MzcwMTIifQ/LS62UQEqzdEo9in96nbosg), "Created Equal", legendary economist and Hoover fellow Milton Friedman answers these and other questions in great depth. You’ll learn what Thomas Jefferson meant when he wrote the words “created equal” in the Declaration of Independence and how the meaning has changed through American history. You’ll see how Friedman brilliantly illustrates differences between equality of opportunity and equality of outcome.

With many today striving to increase government power in the name of a concept of “equality”, Friedman’s words still ring true for those who believe that a society that puts freedom first will end up with both greater freedom and greater equality.

**[Please follow this link to get your free copy of "Created Equal" now.](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTk4LTQxZDhkOThmZjQ0ZDQ0M2FhYTk0YjlmYjhlODE3YzAyIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjMiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwOi8vcmVzb3VyY2VzLmhvb3Zlci5vcmcvY3JlYXRlZC1lcXVhbC1zaWdudXA_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNyZWF0ZWRlcXVhbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfU1BPNDA4NSZvbGM9MzcwMTIifQ/W5p09wfwqM2nZ8Jwl6XG_g)**
Thanks,

subject: CHUCK NORRIS: Is Your Money Safe?

I'm deeply troubled at what I see happening to our nation
%recipient.md5_hash%
| | | **Protect Your Money Before
It's Too Late**
---
**Protect Your Money Before It's Too Late**
---
|
---
Chuck Norris here... I've spent my entire life as a proud American. America has been a great place to live, work, and raise a family. But right now, I'm deeply troubled at what I see happening to our nation--and what the future may hold for our children and grandchildren.
---
| | **Just take a look around ...**
---
* We're **$31 Trillion** in debt
* Inflation is running **over 8%**
* A recession is on our doorstep
* And the people in charge keep spending our money.

body:
I’m not afraid to say this

* * *
---
You're the reason I can't stop smiling today, Friend.

My name is Mayra Flores.

I just launched my 2024 campaign & I'm afraid of what happens if this email doesn't work.

But I'm not afraid to tell you that I am a Christian who is Pro-God, Pro-Family, & Pro-Law Enforcement.

Democrats & the pathetic hacks in the liberal media will tell you that someone of my ethnicity & my age can't be any of those things.

**Who I am & what I stand for makes their blood boil. They hate my guts.**

And they know they can't take another humiliating loss from a Hispanic conservative like me.

But Biden & the liberal billionaires that bankroll the Democrat party take great pleasure in destroying the lives of Hispanic conservatives.

_**Please, please don 't let me be one of them.**_

As a conservative, I fully support transparency in politics, so let me be clear- without a surge in grassroots support today, our campaign won't make it off the launch pad like we need to if we're going to win this thing.

I'll be humiliated & the Democrats will walk away with this seat before we even have a chance to compete.

_**[So I'm coming to you from the bottom of my heart today & I hope I can count on you to stand with me.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2za1hspg39ej5lv9rre6sa9ptgql6fm1qrk8l14ko_rp22sh2s8i66o74slie1o76c5h2bs "So I’m coming to you from the bottom of my heart today & I hope I can count on you to stand with me.")**_

---|---
**Good morning! **On this day in 1945, Winston Churchill, Harry S. Truman, and Joseph Stalin gathered in Soviet-occupied Germany for the [Potsdam Conference](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FugzAQQL_G3oLO59iGwUNViS1Vt47I4DNcazACK1H_vkrnjG95T-_rNtwCZ97mj7CSr6kMYap8pwHcRbkL6gFl9IkISUvyyrad6bCFq1w8GHTKWRNGrRJ12mpLGCZnjTOawijZI6AGpxx0BgEa0DS2yXZOjdFCcuIKFLmWo_kuvNWFUv4tdzqaqawy-6XW_RT6TWAvsKetefAP7xQ5NOWYBfZPFth_lnrGsA7vZUt00DaRPHzcH5wzn_ZZmdfA-d9aX0_-BQAA__-a4FL9). It was a monumental negotiation between the Allied forces over the divisions of post-war Europe.

In today's edition, we're discussing a young champion at Wimbledon, the return of a missing woman in Alabama, and a moose riding shotgun in Canada.

## Alcaraz Wins Wimbledon Title
Twenty year-old Carlos Alcaraz [took down](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGSqyAUgOGnwQ4HDwpaUNyGLrfd0kE4JidBcITRyT79Trbe-m---b9u881RpHT_7zY0dc2z85VOnIXmneYgZ2iCWREBZYOmU-M0TDCKvnmYCYYJll77QatRDd3Qy1VJJUdwSzd40ZABAVLoTotpACFaIXEZVzXpbglKrJr1AgPVfLTPTKk-cI3vfOLR-rw10Txq3QuT_xhYBva6rhbLnj6Rga2YEhUGttR8vBnYmYGlwMDKUYBQfc_AenfEXLiL3h3um5ea98JTPt2Lh2d-5ZM8vyjxrlR-0bZEDDnxSjVic5iwXxQjFfWB3jdH8RdW__70EwAA__8-GWi8) Novak Djokovic in the Wimbledon final on Sunday.

Alcaraz entered the match with the world's #1 tennis ranking and only a 38% chance of winning, according to oddsmakers--a contradiction that can only be explained by Djokovic's historical dominance and the Spanish Wonder Kid's inexperience on Wimbledon's grass courts.

Djokovic hadn't lost a single match at Wimbledon since 2017. Alcaraz had only played two tournaments at the All England Club, home of England's [swanky major championship](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1urDAQRp_GdEb28GMoKG7jbm-bEtl42J3E2MhMFu3bR2yVIv3R0Xe-j9t8cxQp3f-7DSde8-wWpifOykhtJDQzVGFaEQGbCifdD2M3wqDa6jF1wesGG9WGcTDggzeoVxNWvZi-G1tX0QQKGmW0UWMHStWqQT-s_Wi0D71ajWgVBuJc6s9MiR-4xld-YqmXvFVxejDvh2j-CbAC7Hme9ffhOAf3ugAB9uBcXgIsJsbCjtKGiQXYBSP6Qkx4CLDXCAFWGQFW95eJNh8x5CR_gfLLMcqNQojIOcm9UFpQnhQjuU364oLciS-9Ua0eAJR6K6syhf2NHf1VdN8cxXcB_33oTwAAAP__EEF2_A).

In the first set, Djokovic dominated and appeared ready to win another title, but Alcaraz [fought back](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGOqzAQheGngW7QYMDGBcVt0uW2WyKDx2ESw0S2RZR9-lW23v5I59P_dZ2vjiMft_9up6kEmd1a-KQZDbQGVDer2k-BSFFX09Tq0Q5WjdjX2-QXrft-UTbY3o3eL7a12q6rNcZqRFfzpFB1aFqDdlCIDXa0jEFb0y5eYzBVj-S5SGruwkfZKMS3nJSaVfY6Tlspz1x1_yp1qdQlPyWV3LzdJvIZVOry4n2J5OWAzxGsLkXJ4OLqkvuGhVzJcMjpHuDv8pCTV-ADAp8EmUqGIAl2OjIULpGgNUOPvcah2coe6zT554tj5Kw_0tvuOP7Kyt-hfgIAAP__fR9qyA) and won a tiebreak in the second. He completed the victory in the fifth set, and it was the third-longest game in Wimbledon history: four hours and 42 minutes.

Djokovic [gave his opponent credit](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DFvwyAUBOBfgzesBzjGHhi6eEvXjhaGR_ISYiygttJfX7lzt5Nu-e6-rvPVUqT19mlfaGpIs3WVdpxBc6G5VLNsvAmIElWDRvTDeBnlAF1zN8LJ4dIBgNJWd6MYfYBOL93ihO-dgoaMBKlACw3jRQK0oHAZQj9qsfgegmYdoKeacvtItNY7hvhOO-bWpVcTzb3WrTD1weTE5HQcR5vxu2IuZ8_kVLaUa2FyqriudAbaka-4Y-bBOvR8i_aNmUd6IrfR2Wx_eLHvwhe0FVfuH-mZdnL8hPJzc8_k1GTjt4NipNKfxtvLUvwz1f8v-g0AAP__XfVnng) after the match: "_I've never faced a player like Alcaraz_."
## Missing Alabama Woman Returns Home
On Thursday evening, Carlethia 'Carlee' Nichole Russell [noticed a toddler](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L2O6yAQxfGnwR0WDDG2C4rb0OW2W1rjMNhEfEQGx9q3X2Xr7Y_0O_p_3Zc7hhjy9h8TmebLgo8W3rSIkcuRg1qgc8YTAamOjNTTPMwwiVu3G6ml1m5Y3c2vKL2ap1k5RTQo8loo7IIBAUqMchTzAEL0QtE6eT2PcnVa-JHdBLnQytE_S8htJx-_y5uO_lFSF83e2qsy9Y-BZWCv6-rbTtuJhwuYPxsG9qw801UZ2I_FwD7PyMBKzcBixBUT8qskzDyFWkPe-EHtPHLle0nUHca9rhBjqPrzZksY4q_e_o7xEwAA___fwGB4) walking alone beside a highway outside of Birmingham. She notified the police and then, while on the phone with her brother's girlfriend, approached the child and asked if he was okay.

At that point, Carlee screamed and said nothing else on the phone call. Police found her car with a door open and her belongings strewn about, and there was no sign of Carlee or the child. A massive search effort involving several agencies began.

On Saturday night, she [arrived home](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLtuhDAQAL_GdKBl_S5cpKG7tCmRweu7jQycwAfK30eXOvUUM5qv23iLXHi9f8aFQs3bGOfKJ41g2962KEdsUshESLKh0BvntUcHqnmE1HsyzmVJUhOgn5yabLIuZWNAK91wQEAJtrfgNQJ0IGly2XjbT8lAtkIBJa7b3n1vvNYH5fKznbR387Y0JTxqfR5CfggcBA7XdXXXWZdevrHAIe6V50IChznuhajdX8dBpbSxxCkusV34OHi9t3l7rUngoJTWCtE3e0jPi0vhw7wb7kvk8ues_y_4DQAA___u-lxc) on foot. She was then taken to the hospital and later released.

The family has yet to release a statement about Carlee's condition, but before she was found, they said that the child on the highway was used as a "lure" by criminals.
## Jason Aldean Rushes off Stage
Country artist Jason Aldean ran off the stage in Connecticut while suffering from a heat-related condition. ([Video](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz79OwzAQgPGnsbdW53PrP4MHpMpbWRkjJ740h5ymSo5U8PQIWJm_4afv7dpdCze-317LTEnGpSuD8E4d-IPxB7Qd6ppGIiSrKRkX4jligJOeUjAuVFMw1midHWI_UOhdiRSc9zVazQkBLXjjIZ4R4AiW-jC66E1fHYxenYAqy7Ie3xe-y0Rj-1x2Wo_DMuuWJpHHpuyLwqwwy5NF_prCfC0rk0i5lJ2_FOZNinxsCrNxAfwZvLEeABEiBmXzpuwFQa-pPp7cGm_uB7_NhdsvJv-_fwcAAP__wmdXFQ))

Aldean later [posted a video](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxszz1uAyEQQOHTsJ2tYWD5KSgsRRSRnDblCryDTYQXy0xs5fZRkjb1Kz699-NyTLXV7fyWrhS49CWduD5oAbuTdodqwWkNhQhJTRSkcX726EBPl5BzkRm8lkp5mRXiPBd3Ks7LJLMhPdWAgAqstOBnBNiDouyK8Vbm1UCxQgOtlft9_9Hrxhcq7as_6L4_9evUwoX5NoQ6CIwCIz8r818TGF_T6NtyaCulTWAcnPhzCIzSODBGeadnDQbRaSdUHEK9IEz3sN6etbU6zI99vqbafi3-f_07AAD__zeXVm0) on social media saying that he was doing fine and had been dehydrated after playing golf all day. Temperatures at the event were close to 90, and a representative said that Aledean had a heat stroke--although the singer downplayed that claim in his video and said "I don't think it was quite that serious."

A representative from the venue said that the concert will be rescheduled.

clean_body: Twenty year-old Carlos Alcaraz took down Novak Djokovic in the Wimbledon final on Sunday. | | | | | | monday, JULY 17, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! On this day in 1945, Winston Churchill, Harry S. Truman, and Joseph Stalin gathered in Soviet-occupied Germany for the . It was a monumental negotiation between the Allied forces over the divisions of post-war Europe. In today's edition, we're discussing a young champion at Wimbledon, the return of a missing woman in Alabama, and a moose riding shotgun in Canada. Think we could improve something? mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback+for+The+Flyover** and let us know. We appreciate hearing from our readers! If this is your first time reading The Flyover , and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Twitter? . Enjoying The Flyover? Take a moment to check out today's sponsor, | Alcaraz Wins Wimbledon Title Twenty year-old Carlos Alcaraz Novak Djokovic in the Wimbledon final on Sunday. Alcaraz entered the match with the world's #1 tennis ranking and only a 38% chance of winning, according to oddsmakers--a contradiction that can only be explained by Djokovic's historical dominance and the Spanish Wonder Kid's inexperience on Wimbledon's grass courts. Djokovic hadn't lost a single match at Wimbledon since 2017. Alcaraz had only played two tournaments at the All England Club, home of England's . In the first set, Djokovic dominated and appeared ready to win another title, but Alcaraz and won a tiebreak in the second. He completed the victory in the fifth set, and it was the third-longest game in Wimbledon history: four hours and 42 minutes. Djokovic after the match: "I've never faced a player like Alcaraz." Missing Alabama Woman Returns Home On Thursday evening, Carlethia 'Carlee' Nichole Russell walking alone beside a highway outside of Birmingham. She notified the police and then, while on the phone with her brother's girlfriend, approached the child and asked if he was okay. At that point, Carlee screamed and said nothing else on the phone call. Police found her car with a door open and her belongings strewn about, and there was no sign of Carlee or the child. A massive search effort involving several agencies began. On Saturday night, she on foot. She was then taken to the hospital and later released. The family has yet to release a statement about Carlee's condition, but before she was found, they said that the child on the highway was used as a "lure" by criminals. Jason Aldean Rushes off Stage Country artist Jason Aldean ran off the stage in Connecticut while suffering from a heat-related condition. () Aldean later on social media saying that he was doing fine and had been dehydrated after playing golf all day. Temperatures at the event were close to 90, and a representative said that Aledean had a heat stroke--although the singer downplayed that claim in his video and said "I don't think it was quite that serious." A representative from the venue said that the concert will be rescheduled. [Medal of Honor Monday: Army Cpl. Charles Pendleton](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5i2mcg5ed4tvjmr5dh66t0qodkdc717u762va20_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdg64ob2chh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kui3bd9ieir38cth6kpjactmekpradrmeej3fddnk9g64pj7k1jmf937cuirac9k66qqfcplk2rr7dtiemirfcth6gqfb91iemqfb9hge6qqcc5k69oradjlk1qj7c9hmkonfctnk8iv0)
When brave men are overwhelmed by an enemy in battle, they tend to square off like they have no choice but to win. That's what Army Cpl. Charles Frank Pendleton did when his unit was attacked by enemy forces in Korea. He didn't survive the fight, but his determination was so inspiring that it earned him the Medal of Honor.
[See It Here](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdscddr3ec040jnmg1jl10u3kcmpn5eom4kcmioo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t46mqj4t5m6gpr2d9j6kprct9jmkrncst66uqrf8j0c9j6f837cui6ept5mkoj8cdlkupjb85nmerr4td5mupr2d1kumi34tdkumj30sdlkoob8cjhmkr7b83l6eoj3d9heuprf8h1k8gn48n24hhm1p73c1h62oj4c8iv0)

name: Larry Kudlow
subject: The New York Sun is saving journalism
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWAwj3tDN4

The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the
Sun.

Dear Sun,

I am
pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily
must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular
columns.

I invite
you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my
latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American
journalism.

But
there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you
know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been
in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this
once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer
on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold
our trust.

The
impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real
accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate
institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working
Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The
antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative.
That's the American way.

The
charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun. A
proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of
room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun
has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's
18 years before the New York Times published its first number.

My
decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher
of my regular columns was not taken lightly.

I value
their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they
have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many
Goliaths.

They will
only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national
effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as $0.01 per day. I
encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.

Join the
Sun Now →

Please
join me in the fight to restore America's journalism.

This is
one mission that our country desperately needs.

Larry
Kudlow
Columnist
for The New York Sun

Join the
Sun Now →

And while law-abiding Floridians are enjoying the sunshine out on the water, Joe Biden wants to destroy the boating industry with a **$20,000 fine **and **prison time **for going over 11.5 mph.

When I was first elected to the Mississippi legislature I showed up in Jackson ready to join the team of conservative Republicans and move our state in the direction of freedom, liberty and economic prosperity. I had spend most of my life developing a political philosophy that was best expressed in the Republican Party Platform.

[](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/ff8ccf9a-c49e-43f1-9dfe-148a7d89656a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Most Mississippians proudly believe we live in a "conservative" state, but with just minimal research it becomes obvious that Mississippi politicians are far from conservative.
Check out the [American Conservative Union's scorecard](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/a6073c0e-af4f-435e-906f-db20947fd68d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
When first elected to the Mississippi legislature I arrived in Jackson ready to join the team of conservative Republicans and move our state in the direction of freedom, liberty and economic prosperity. I had spent most of my life developing a political philosophy that was best expressed in the Republican Party Platform.
Sadly, what I found was a "team" of wet-noodle, self-serving, life-time politicians whose only concern was manipulating every situation to benefit themselves.
It only took a couple of votes where I didn't fall in line, for the Speaker of the House to call me into his office for a discussion about how things worked in the legislature. I was given a pep-talk that included phrases like, team player and a worn out analogy from the Animal Planet television channel that discussed how the gazelle that went out on its own was the one eaten by lions. I understood immediately the implication that if I went out on my own and voted against the Speaker I would be the gazelle that was picked off by the lion.
The discussion went further as I objected saying the bills I was being asked to support were not conservative. The reply was, "if we stay together, we determine what is conservative." I left that meeting with a clear understanding that the Mississippi House of Representatives was not operating on an ideological basis. It was a political organization designed to build up its members at the cost of the people of our state.
I'm relating this story to help you understand the pressures being placed on newly elected legislators. They are immediately threatened, coerced, and verbally beaten into submission. If they resist they are ostracized by other legislators who have succumbed to the pressures of leadership.
Once we elect the man or woman we want to represent us we must maintain pressure from outside the legislature to ensure they adhere to our principles and values. We must let those elected know that we will support them if they resist the internal pressure to fall in line and we will punish if they choose to serve leadership instead of the people.
Leadership is not going to change. Unfortunately those who rise to the top of political organizations are rarely the best. So it is our responsibility to stay engaged so we can move Mississippi into an era of prosperity and freedom in spite of the politicians running our government.
Check out [my list of candidates](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/27e41d1b-a1bf-4aae-b240-75a1ae519e68?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) who have the strength to be that lone gazelle.
**Read all of Dana 's post and stay informed about politics in Mississippi**

clean_body: Most Mississippians proudly believe we live in a "conservative" state, but with just minimal research it becomes obvious that Mississippi politicians are far from conservative. When I was first elected to the Mississippi legislature I showed up in Jackson ready to join the team of conservative Republicans and move our state in the direction of freedom, liberty and economic prosperity. I had spend most of my life developing a political philosophy that was best expressed in the Republican Party Platform. | | ---|---|--- | | | or ? ? from the desk ofDana Criswell | | | Jul 17 | | | | | | | | | | Most Mississippians proudly believe we live in a "conservative" state, but with just minimal research it becomes obvious that Mississippi politicians are far from conservative. Check out the . When first elected to the Mississippi legislature I arrived in Jackson ready to join the team of conservative Republicans and move our state in the direction of freedom, liberty and economic prosperity. I had spent most of my life developing a political philosophy that was best expressed in the Republican Party Platform. Sadly, what I found was a "team" of wet-noodle, self-serving, life-time politicians whose only concern was manipulating every situation to benefit themselves. It only took a couple of votes where I didn't fall in line, for the Speaker of the House to call me into his office for a discussion about how things worked in the legislature. I was given a pep-talk that included phrases like, team player and a worn out analogy from the Animal Planet television channel that discussed how the gazelle that went out on its own was the one eaten by lions. I understood immediately the implication that if I went out on my own and voted against the Speaker I would be the gazelle that was picked off by the lion. The discussion went further as I objected saying the bills I was being asked to support were not conservative. The reply was, "if we stay together, we determine what is conservative." I left that meeting with a clear understanding that the Mississippi House of Representatives was not operating on an ideological basis. It was a political organization designed to build up its members at the cost of the people of our state. I'm relating this story to help you understand the pressures being placed on newly elected legislators. They are immediately threatened, coerced, and verbally beaten into submission. If they resist they are ostracized by other legislators who have succumbed to the pressures of leadership. Once we elect the man or woman we want to represent us we must maintain pressure from outside the legislature to ensure they adhere to our principles and values. We must let those elected know that we will support them if they resist the internal pressure to fall in line and we will punish if they choose to serve leadership instead of the people. Leadership is not going to change. Unfortunately those who rise to the top of political organizations are rarely the best. So it is our responsibility to stay engaged so we can move Mississippi into an era of prosperity and freedom in spite of the politicians running our government. Check out who have the strength to be that lone gazelle. Read all of Dana 's post and stay informed about politics in Mississippi ? | | | | | | | (C) 2023 Dana Criswell 530 George St., Suite 200, Jackson, MS ? ?

name: Jon Tester
subject: Mitch McConnell’s self-funding recruit
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Folks, you know I hate to bother you, so I’ll keep this quick.

This past month was incredibly busy for Team Tester. From public
fundraising deadlines to a new Mitch McConnell recruit jumping in the race
to run against me, we’re at a vital turning point.

That’s why I need your support now more than ever in this campaign.

The coming months will be critical. We need the resources to respond to
any incoming attacks from opponents and national Republicans like Mitch
McConnell. McConnell is desperate to buy this Senate seat in Montana, so
they’re pulling out all the stops—including recruiting a millionaire
self-funder to run against me.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18999?t=1001&akid=3406%2E346206%2EzPBX5T ]Can I count on you to chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can today --
split with Charles Booker -- to help fuel our movement to help keep me in
the Senate fighting to protect the Montana way of life?

CHIP IN →

Thanks for stepping up today. When we win this race, it will be because of
folks like you.

Jon

name: Anna Kaplan
subject: These claims were lies — all of them.
body:
Defeating George Santos
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T29fe9962-b51f-493e-91dc-b81a6928d18f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, Congressman George Santos claimed he was Jewish. He claimed his grandparents survived the Holocaust and that his mother survived the September 11th terrorist attacks in New York City. He claimed he graduated from college as a star volleyball player, worked for Goldman Sachs, and ran a foundation that rescued 2500 dogs and cats. These claims were lies — all of them. And that doesn’t even scratch the surface of the web of brazen lies Santos told to get elected. George Santos is a disgrace. He’s an embarrassment to our district, state, and country. And now, he’s facing 13 federal charges for crimes including money laundering and fraud. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T97832ca1-618b-45c2-8ec1-ad20cb73efb8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) That’s why I’ve announced my run for Congress to replace him. [DONATE NOW >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb007de0e-5ec3-40e7-b06f-cc67de083b73/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbabd6989-ce72-41fb-95a0-5b15b6c97aa0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I was born in Iran to a Jewish family. My family faced religious persecution, so at age 13, my parents put me on a plane, not knowing when -- or if -- they’d see me again. I landed in New York and found a place where women had real rights and could determine their futures. I graduated from college and law school and met my husband, Darren. I ran for Town Council and won. And when our state legalized gay marriage, and the town clerk refused to perform the ceremonies, I proudly stepped in to perform them. Next, I ran for New York State Senate, unseated a well-funded Republican, flipped the seat, and flipped the chamber to give Democrats control for the first time in decades. In the Senate, I sponsored and passed bills codifying Roe v. Wade and banning untraceable ghost guns. Now, I’m running for Congress to provide real representation to the people of New York because the truth is, Santos’ lies aren’t even the worst thing about him. Santos is a Trump-supporting, election-denying, anti-choice, and pro-assault rifle disgrace to our district. He doesn’t represent our values, and I’m committed to defeating him next November. [But that’s only going to happen with your support. So today, I’m asking: Will you split $25 between Blue Amp Action](https://default.salsalabs.org/T216efcc3-66a5-4d98-aa56-c99500d36752/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[ and my campaign to help me defeat George Santos?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T33ddd10b-8856-4527-83e6-78229c639014/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [DONATE NOW >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6a433419-8daa-4304-aeda-0f48e55ceab4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) My husband and I have spent 30 years here. We’ve raised our daughters here. It’s our home. This district voted for Joe Biden in 2020, and it’s time this district’s representative in Congress reflected our values Let’s win this thing, Anna Kaplan
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---

He claimed his grandparents survived the Holocaust and that his mother survived the September 11th terrorist attacks in New York City. He claimed he graduated from college as a star volleyball player, worked for Goldman Sachs, and ran a foundation that rescued 2500 dogs and cats. These claims were lies — all of them. And now, he’s facing 13 federal charges for crimes including money laundering and fraud. That’s why I’ve announced my run for Congress to replace him. I was born in Iran to a Jewish family. I landed in New York and found a place where women had real rights and could determine their futures. I graduated from college and law school and met my husband, Darren. name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Expose the College Cartel
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWXGrPtDN_

THOUSANDS of Americans have already gotten their copy of The
College Scam -- have you?

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWXGrPtDN_

Fellow
Patriot,

THOUSANDS
of Americans have already gotten their copy of The College Scam
-- have you?

If not, I
want to send you your very own copy when you make a gift of ANY
AMOUNT to TPUSA today.

Yes --
ANY AMOUNT! Even a gift of $5 will help us cover the cost of
shipping.

Just
click here to get your copy!

The Left
is waging an all-out war on America's colleges and universities,
brainwashing an entire generation to hate our country and our
freedom -- and subsidizing their destructive work with YOUR TAX
DOLLARS.

Turning
Point USA is fighting back -- but we need your help.

That's
why I'm offering you this special thank-you gift when you make a
donation of ANY AMOUNT to Turning Point USA.

We want
to get this important book into the hands of as many concerned
Americans as we can!

I've
spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the biggest and most
impactful pro-America student organization with 600,000+ student
activists in all 50 states. And at Turning Point USA, I've seen
firsthand how the College Cartel is brainwashing young people
with their toxic "woke" ideology.

But we're
not giving up. We're fighting back by exposing them in The
College Scam, and I want to send you a copy as a special
thank-you for your support.

Get Your
Copy

When you
read The College Scam, you'll learn:

- My
10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the
judge of whether or not it's a good investment for students OR
taxpayers

- The
real reasons that administrators and professors attack American
Greatness

- How the
government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation
into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

And
remember -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists.
Instead, it combines frontline experience from my eleven years
criss-crossing America to speak with students, extensive research
into the dirty secrets of higher education, and a prosecutor's
intensity to present my case against the College Cartel.

This book
has a phenomenal 4.7 out of five stars on Amazon, with glowing
reviews like:

"Charlie
Kirk does a great job of exposing the craziness on contemporary
college campuses. Even for those reasonably well informed about
this, he adds more valuable information." -- Susan

"Charlie
absolutely nails the problems of the system... Thanks!! Keep
doing what you are doing!!" -- Michal

And there
are hundreds more just like these from grassroots Americans who
are ready to fight back against this rigged, bloated, and broken
college system.

Are you
one of them? Are you ready to arm yourself with the knowledge and
the strategy that will help us dismantle the College Cartel?

Then
please -- let me send you a copy of The College Scam right now.
All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of any amount, even just
a few dollars, to Turning Point USA.

Get Your
Copy

When you
claim your copy, you get the best of both worlds: You'll get a
copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point
USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left's college scam, DEFEAT the
radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!

Join the
thousands of Americans who have already taken advantage of this
limited-time offer, and learn how you can join the fight against
the College Cartel today.

Claim
your copy of The College Scam and help us defend America's
future!

Thank you
for your support,

Charlie
Kirk
Founder &
CEO
Turning
Point USA

4940 East
Beverly Road
Phoenix,
Arizona 85044

name: Kash Patel
subject: New J6 Choir song with Donald Trump
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zv50p3baqstjkvofk7dgnmbn9ngj04k2qhp2gob0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdi6ao36c1h2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9l0atpovme8vl1qheq6ldr2b72r8ohaoa7usccg_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdi6ao36c1h2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zluhjvng7qcgperb9a6dhsq44pgigh0o96oc1ljg_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdi6ao36c1h2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[** _Donate Now >>_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn50qtn96p8ptkp2675sbhm647u9ui5k67ndsfqg_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdi6ao36c1h2bs)

**[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo77btiqij81o8qqb2c51neibd7u7m3anj5c2tfo_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdi6ao36c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zoi8b8ona0ur4u0vpb3hmkrl8c5agjg86rrme92g_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdi6ao36c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb701sfs67drno6t88mln0nmherktdrjgfaccst0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdi6ao36c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zro0bovokoht6gc2904pa3oct9ki5ql9etvevklg_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdi6ao36c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zog97bj1le32n8tvkdn9rivi77t2vjerbsdcu2hg_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdi6ao36c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpbanu6lmmud6inginv2noqfd3cqkt1ktkboanio_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdi6ao36c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ze5qnce53ta3ldlgm66odikbrko8od7jdlbvm770_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdi6ao36c1h2bs)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpabpl0vuoch79m3ngeqvj2m16mg7kvh10g05478_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdi6ao36c1h2bs)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5458ujk7pqlhp9lc9331scsaffc145ke61m5g38_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdi6ao36c1h2bs)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh5i046ochplol8nplajvmpji823iki82hebng9g_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdi6ao36c1h2bs)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zffpnqncp2iobajjed0acp0827imt74qu6rtnqlo_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdi6ao36c1h2bs)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

_The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible._

GOP Presidential

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

subject: This should be common sense

Friend, The Left loves to tout the idea of "equal opportunity," but they're more than happy to strip women and girls of the opportunity to compete fairly in sports without facing off against a competitor twice their size.
---
| [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=43e4921b7baa41a08db0019615b3cca2&_e=LhjtP_TfMcts9bEoNwo1YK6_zP_leZlFAlgpbdiskYY4TtH09W7GxKryXK8fdI01V5iDZ4D5bXv54SihW8Pdh-BGmVLyMP8xKL89LP4tz2-N9nTO0f_LuKlF1QMk-CiuJXCVrRoDOPp44U41D0tvTh86_3nX86zXX60yGqHFYDQ4cPP0yxC3kr3nZnnlRvoldQ04S7o0dnC-AB3UJxHTwqBcslWrRTIeur6kxaCkQcNLxU93-o2RPqqnZ4Rhsg-F0_mMA4jbK8oZbfWd34OOOZNURSEOrf3Jl8i3-AyfxtjIcUYGTPWi_tcLlwz7dp73njCDf7_1Tp_w1nQC12djiK46zOPBqPPhPgIP66pvcFxJSxJ4BfDjZQRMSbpI6aOjPyASaUyhppSiI7NL5KmkX_OgK5SE29q_y7dz106ZuVYzCiUBJqIj7hGC1EUWGUUf)

**When I say it 's time to restore common sense, this is what I mean.** Stories like Riley Gaines' are all too common right now: a woman forced to compete against biological males, being forced to share a locker room with men, and feeling abandoned by elected leaders for not standing up for her and all women and girls in sports. I want our girls and women athletes to have opportunities to compete with fairness and with integrity. That cannot happen when you allow males to compete in women's sports. When the radical Left takes someone that swam on the men's team for three years, then switched to the women's team, and crowns them the women's champion, they're asking us to be complicit in a fraud. **_I am not willing to accept this. _**
---
| | [JOIN MY TEAM AND HELP FIGHT THE FRAUD](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=43e4921b7baa41a08db0019615b3cca2&_e=LhjtP_TfMcts9bEoNwo1YK6_zP_leZlFAlgpbdiskYY4TtH09W7GxKryXK8fdI01V5iDZ4D5bXv54SihW8Pdh-BGmVLyMP8xKL89LP4tz2-N9nTO0f_LuKlF1QMk-CiuJXCVrRoDOPp44U41D0tvTh86_3nX86zXX60yGqHFYDQ4cPP0yxC3kr3nZnnlRvoldQ04S7o0dnC-AB3UJxHTwqBcslWrRTIeur6kxaCkQcNLxU93-o2RPqqnZ4Rhsg-F0_mMA4jbK8oZbfWd34OOOSttif8klVv8E2ou19b_BJJciEdL95iLXjedlpqkdxqzEJgHSx5VVSeFB0YmvbYaGVLy4_PmiTAOkWfDwsAksFurslqUoR3TBcDu7HkWHVtWSmgnXMuLMoUk_oHHv1Y934vHlIvAmLamP0nBu1ivQ_B2_f7aEHNL2jiW1JUWV8lM)
---
In this state, I have signed legislation to keep males from intruding on the safety of women's locker rooms, prohibited puberty blockers and operations on gender for minors, and outlawed the pronoun Olympics being imposed on teachers. Male athletes should not get to take over women's sports, children should not be told they were born in the wrong body, and we should NEVER opt for mutilation for elementary students. Friend, I know this is wrong, and none of it has a place in our society. It's time we step up, say what needs to be said, and take action. My campaign would be greatly impacted by a donation of $50 from every one of our supporters. If you're willing to take action with me, I am asking for your support today.
---

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
---
| Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President

We’re already preparing for our next big fight – state Democrats have a slew of special elections over the next several months, and the Virginia House and Senate are in play this November. President Obama is calling out the importance of Democratic leadership in the states – it’s up to grassroots supporters like you to help elect state Democrats now. **By chipping in _today,_ you can help pave a path for Democratic wins this year and beyond. **
**With your investment in our movement, you’ll be at the forefront of the fight against state Republicans’ extreme agenda, helping elect Democrats who will work to secure a progressive future for states like yours. So, can we count you in?**

clean_body: If we don’t continue fueling our movement to elect state Democrats, Republicans will gain even more power which would spell disaster for Americans everywhere. That’s why we need your help. | | | | | Our records show you haven’t donated this month. | | JULY SUPPORTER RECORD SUPPORTER: REPRESENTING: local Democrats DONOR STATUS: PENDING YOUR SUGGESTED GIFT:$7 With the help of this grassroots team, we made history last November – flipping four chambers and holding onto every single existing majority. But we can’t stop now. We’re already preparing for our next big fight – state Democrats have a slew of special elections over the next several months, and the Virginia House and Senate are in play this November. President Obama is calling out the importance of Democratic leadership in the states – it’s up to grassroots supporters like you to help elect state Democrats now. By chipping in today, you can help pave a path for Democratic wins this year and beyond. With your investment in our movement, you’ll be at the forefront of the fight against state Republicans’ extreme agenda, helping elect Democrats who will work to secure a progressive future for states like yours. So, can we count you in? | | This seems off to me, my friend. The Republican National Committee wants me to sign a pledge saying that I will support WHOEVER the Republican nominee is in order to have a shot at the debate stage. _**I'm not going to do that. I refuse to lie to the American people in order to get a microphone. **_ Let me just go on record again and say, I will not support Donald Trump as our nominee. But I intend to fulfill all other requirements. _**This is not about me supporting the Republican nominee... this is about me refusing to support a process that tries to rig the election for Donald Trump.** _ **I've made one oath:**_To the Constitution_**I do one pledge:** _To the flag_**I've made one vow:**_To my amazing wife_ I refuse to allow the RNC to strong-arm support for a candidate I believe to be toxic and wrong for the United States of America. That's why I need your help. I need to make sure that I hit 40,000 donors to help show the RNC that Americans want other options. [_**And I'm asking you to be one of them with your first $1 donation today.**_](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=34d89e461aaa44c78b8907f4a4a14a11&_m=64156f0f85d646239f1035ad17a86fed&_e=whIADXldn62lDaurV2xYwPSlF6nPvFSce9MjR3eeiMaVtE1NX_u9_JGBRtqVwxhLZRjF-noCDDTvJkj0d9hrkGb6chE52LdCnDicwoqaNIYBGS55MoDB_vljOiCRCCi1pse8ZnqsgWCw9AcwbAvIxhLAeyXpJfh0pFJUe9QNR5aD_bmHW1q2GXFAe3WZWd2XjeiKlHWwgSoWKqV6XK2TUANx_E_ZYU8TWK2s_4PEw1_4mad75TggFBWtCyAbHT7r070Q_tNDBbJyL7YFoSJkT2ff8dDJUHRcGQhFJYgnPTiQ7LT0CEIqQwsPPLjnqb2Dibq6btOKnZjUCH6Nm2IdWnOKYJc1ncVkdVrJh3e_cfDMHCsOBKZUbHQtr24xouwM)
---
---
We can be the movement that saves our great nation. This is the start of something new and I hope you'll be a part of it. [_**All I'm asking for is $1 to get my message on the debate stage.**_](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=34d89e461aaa44c78b8907f4a4a14a11&_m=64156f0f85d646239f1035ad17a86fed&_e=whIADXldn62lDaurV2xYwPSlF6nPvFSce9MjR3eeiMaVtE1NX_u9_JGBRtqVwxhLZRjF-noCDDTvJkj0d9hrkGb6chE52LdCnDicwoqaNIYBGS55MoDB_vljOiCRCCi1pse8ZnqsgWCw9AcwbAvIxhLAeyXpJfh0pFJUe9QNR5aD_bmHW1q2GXFAe3WZWd2XjeiKlHWwgSoWKqV6XK2TUANx_E_ZYU8TWK2s_4PEw19ZelpIVoGeNqWFbkimdV4fyppKyM-ZLLsXO3mcCZq_9JNI_NR7hE268W7wTIuWKxHnxRCS4FKDr7BSdOgKSyn-KaBBfAaiDAAP5vyXiOU7tnJB5An7rDvFXxIyJN9pll-WYPoYlzyvKdUu7e4BZEL4) Thank you,**Will Hurd** _Candidate for President & Former Texas Congressman_

clean_body: I will not pledge loyalty to any politician...| | | | | This seems off to me, my friend. The Republican National Committee wants me to sign a pledge saying that I will support WHOEVER the Republican nominee is in order to have a shot at the debate stage. I'm not going to do that. I refuse to lie to the American people in order to get a microphone. Let me just go on record again and say, I will not support Donald Trump as our nominee. But I intend to fulfill all other requirements. This is not about me supporting the Republican nominee... this is about me refusing to support a process that tries to rig the election for Donald Trump. I've made one oath:To the ConstitutionI do one pledge: To the flagI've made one vow:To my amazing wife I refuse to allow the RNC to strong-arm support for a candidate I believe to be toxic and wrong for the United States of America. That's why I need your help. I need to make sure that I hit 40,000 donors to help show the RNC that Americans want other options. We can be the movement that saves our great nation. This is the start of something new and I hope you'll be a part of it. Thank you,Will Hurd Candidate for President & Former Texas Congressman | | | | www.hurdforamerica.com | | |

name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkplueassp833oo6lggdsiab9g0q456it8q1md90_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdi6ap72cjh2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z88o18d5s8qeist5gvkj4k9ghfuq6ucnpfh9iva8_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdi6ap72cjh2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmg9baomkeve7b0pu8to5rjl7tqs557u5iobrm48_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdi6ap72cjh2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.
