name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Min=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Dave Min Establishes Commanding Fundraising Lead
body:
Min Significantly Outraises Democratic Field In The Money Race While Also Expanding His Enormous Coalition of Support | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/84f3ee980b07/dave-min-establishes-commanding-fundraising-lead-15658808?e=7017cc100e)
---
| |
---
| | **For Immediate Release** : July 17, 2023
**Contact** : press@davemin.com

**Dave Min Establishes Commanding Fundraising Lead ** _Min Significantly Outraises Democratic Field In The Money Race
While Also Expanding His Enormous Coalition of Support_
**IRVINE, CA** — Dave Min is pulling ahead in the race for California’s 47th District. From all angles–money raised, campaign & legislative experience, polling, and endorsements–State Senator Dave Min has clearly established himself as the candidate who will represent the Democratic Party in next November’s general election, and he is primed to keep CA-47 Blue. After two quarters in a row boasting massive fundraising hauls that significantly outpace all other Democrats in the race, Min stands alone in the primary field as a sitting elected, endorsed by labor, teachers and law enforcement, who has a proven electoral and legislative track record.

“**When Dave Min says he raised over $400,000 for the quarter, that’s exactly what he means** ,” said Dan Driscoll, Campaign Manager at Dave Min for Congress. “**No funny business. No loans from the candidate. These are real donations from real people, who understand that there’s one candidate in this race who’s able to beat Scott Baugh next November. Voters need to know which candidate has the legs to actually contribute to a Democratic House majority next year. Senator Min is miles ahead of any other Democratic candidate in the field in terms of fundraising this quarter, total fundraising, cash on hand, and cash on hand for the primary. And he’s done this by creating a broad-based, grassroots coalition of support. This is a fundraising program built to last.** ”

Dave Min is no stranger to tough races. He currently represents over 80% of the 47th Congressional District in the State Senate, and won CA-47 during that election by over 5% in 2020, a tough year for Orange County Democrats, defeating a long-time Republican icon who was thought to be unbeatable. Just after the end of 2023’s first quarter, former Congressman Harley Rouda ended his bid for the 47th, leaving Min as the only Democrat in the race with previous campaign, legislative or federal policy experience.

Following the Q2 reporting deadline, Senator Min has dominating leads among Democrats as far as the most money raised to date, the most cash on hand, and the most money available for the primary election. **He has nearly twice as much in available funds for the primary election– not counting candidate loans– as the next closest Democratic candidate. Min also reported no outstanding debts**. What’s even more notable is where this money has come from. Dave Min is approaching $1 million raised for the cycle, without taking checks from Big Oil or corporate PACs. He's built a grassroots fundraising program designed to last, with over 40% more individual donors this past quarter than the next leading Democrat, and gained 593 new donors in the second quarter. The announcement comes a few weeks after a [Public Policy Polling](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=65fd06556a&e=7017cc100e) poll showed Min with a commanding lead against his likely Republican opponent in the 2024 General Election.

Considering fundraising and endorsements in tandem tells a compelling story about Dave Min’s general election viability. While approaching $1 million raised, he’s also consolidated support from local, state, and national endorsers. Dave is proud to be the only candidate who lives in and represents the district, and who is endorsed by the district's current representative, Congresswoman Katie Porter. In recent weeks, Min has announced endorsements from the Teamsters Joint Council 42, UFCW Local 324, and the International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers Local 447, establishing himself as the clear choice for working families. This comes on top of his already stunning roster of support, which includes the Service Employees International Union (SEIU), the California Federation of Teachers (CFT), the International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers (IBEW) Local 47, California Lieutenant Governor Eleni Kounalakis, Attorney General Rob Bonta, State Treasurer Fiona Ma, Insurance Commissioner Ricardo Lara, Superintendent of Public Instruction Tony Thurmond, the Congressional Asian Pacific American Caucus’s political leadership ASPIRE PAC, more than 50 local Orange County government officials, and more than 60 state legislators. A full endorsement list is available [here](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=5861aaf585&e=7017cc100e).

Taking fundraising, experience, polling, and coalition building into account, it’s difficult to deny: **Dave Min is the Democrat who will be advancing to next year’s general election in the race for California’s 47th Congressional District, and he is in very strong position to keep this seat Blue, which is critical for Democratic efforts to regain the House majority**.

Senator Min, the only Korean-American in the state legislature, serves as Chair of the Senate Natural Resources and Water Committee and as Senate Vice Chair of the Asian and Pacific Islander Legislative Caucus. Min has proven himself an incredibly effective legislative leader in the Senate, authoring 17 bills signed into law by the Governor, including leading legislation on climate rescue, hate crimes, gun violence prevention, family safety, and women’s reproductive rights. Among other things, he has authored first-in-the-nation legislation to end gun shows on state property, including on state-owned county fairgrounds; to end offshore oil drilling; to preserve 30% of California’s open spaces and coastal waters as protected spaces by the year 2030; and to recognize reproductive coercion as a form of domestic violence. He has led efforts to preserve and expand base funding for California’s public schools and was a proud coauthor of 2022’s Proposition 1, which enshrined a right to abortion access in California’s State Constitution. Senator Min has brought back over $200 million to his Senate district, including over $30 million for key wildfire prevention efforts, including the establishment of a new wildfire hand crew station in the fire-prone Laguna Canyon area, and funding for climate innovation, open space access and preservation, and for expanded access to the arts.

Before entering the State Senate, Min was a law professor at UC Irvine, where he taught and researched in the area of business law, and was seen as a leading expert in his field, testifying six times before Congress and regularly appearing on CNBC, CNN, MSNBC, and NPR. Senator Min has spent his career in public service, including working at the Securities and Exchange Commission and as a policy advisor for Senator Chuck Schumer. He resides with his wife Jane Stoever, a UC Irvine law professor who specializes in domestic violence and family law, and their three children, who like their parents all attend public school, in Irvine. Dave is a native Californian, a product of California public schools who graduated from the Wharton School and Harvard Law School, and an Eagle Scout.
##### _California’s 47th is an open Congressional District in Orange County that includes the Cities of Costa Mesa, Huntington Beach, Irvine, Newport Beach, and Seal Beach, and portions of Laguna Beach, Laguna Hills, and Laguna Woods. Incumbent Katie Porter is vacating the seat to run for U.S. Senate. In 2022, Porter defeated former Assemblymember Republican Scott Baugh by 3.44% in this “toss-up” district. State Senator Dave Min currently represents over 80% of Congressional District 47 in Sacramento. In 2020, Min received over 158,000 votes within CA-47, defeating incumbent John Moorlach by 5.15%. 19% of the registered voters in CA-47 are of Asian and Pacific Islander descent, including one of the largest Korean-American populations in the country._

name: Lauren Boebert (parody)
subject: Peter, I’ve had a bad couple of months.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burnett for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2300_db_email?refcode2=image_LB [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2300_db_email?refcode2=image_LB]Peter, I’ve had a bad couple of months.
First, there was that new round of allegations that I misspent campaign funds and flouted federal regulations designed to protect our democracy.
Next, I didn’t even cast a vote on legislation to avoid an economic catastrophe. I was able to tweet 23 times against it, but I’m hoping you won’t notice that I can’t keep my story straight about whether I missed the vote or skipped it “in protest.”
Then, my progressive opponent Debby Burnett’s campaign launch video calling me out went viral on social media. That was really the pits because history shows that a fresh Democratic nominee like her has the best chance of kicking me out of office.
Don’t worry though. I’m not changing one bit! Just last Friday, I was able to get my hateful poison-pill amendment to appease my extremist special-interest cronies included in the defense bill. Political analysts are saying this puts this critical, must-pass legislation in jeopardy, but what do I care about actually funding the Department of Defense?
Rest assured, I’ll continue to ignore the needs of my constituents, focus on my own fortune and fame, and prepare for my next Fox News appearance instead of doing my job.
That’s why I really hope that you won’t chip in $25 to Debby Burnett’s campaign. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2300_db_email?refcode2=link_CTA1] (I’m relying on my extremist pals and dark money to keep me in office, but Debby is counting on grassroots supporters like you.)
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.
Give $25 to Debby Burnett now » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2300_db_email?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode2=abx25-link]
Give $50 to Debby Burnett now » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2300_db_email?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode2=abx50-link]
Give $250 to Debby Burnett now » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2300_db_email?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode2=abx250-link]
Give another amount to Debby Burnett now » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2300_db_email?refcode2=abx-other-link]
Debby Burnett is running for Congress to make a difference for families here in Western and Southern Colorado, which is just not on brand for me.
It would be really awful for me if you gave what you could right now to fuel Debby’s people-powered campaign to flip this seat blue and replace me. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2300_db_email?refcode2=link_CTA2]
So don’t, OK?
Signed,
Lauren Boebert (parody)
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2300_db_email?refcode2=image_bioboxlogo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2300_db_email?refcode2=image_bioboxlogo]Dr. Debby Burnett is running to represent Colorado’s 3rd District in Congress. As a veterinarian for 20+ years, she’s worked with farmers and ranchers across our district to improve their lives and their livelihoods. As the mother of a 16-year-old, she knows how to get 20 things done at once. And as a rural Coloradan who owns a small agricultural business, she understands what the people of Western and Southern Colorado need — and that’s why she’s stepping up to give them a real voice in Congress.
DONATE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2300_db_email?refcode2=btn_biobox]
Paid for by Burnett for Colorado
Burnett for Colorado | PO Box 1761, Gunnison, CO 81230
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/mImAYSx62Eavny28XjqzSg2?unsubscribedata=ElZl8zzHI%2FY0WByvPaoHrDWkbGLE0SZ%2BWtMUfbn0wMDgIy2TLuLhOfzllSa1oNP9fjR4lp%2FYd2TsK0W6MaKHUT7JdwYViHsMQD8l8%2BsB%2FPq5Hpgt4753Axn2ZiFNGAfndpkR6NnBJdsHoqS7TCY5qu5axiZa6rfdo4RU1I8ybwLUX0zmOo6hmoikFw1sh7V5kfyo3Dm1VXdOUL0sd2YCG%2Bgpd0sVvnlTTMQtXDHhho9tUjJPvkd4TFGuDtxyYYgd6DoRSKbANZqmtE%2FarcCR8Tn0jOI7HqO05AlXUhnwaz%2BwHuTLyj%2FVbyFvL5QYgMcmuu2lMQTZgQb3LtwnY%2B%2FTVZdzc4lYcu8iDPi%2BXP65hE1z9uN93As2NWi%2FRBJPJWC%2Btdqxt5P2n5IjQ1qmw3Fcy4E5nTEnVmdfrsQATO1GnMnrK2dwQ7nmPnRVg67WU9Yl .

name: Sign Your Name (via Left Action)
subject: Tell Trump: "If you're too chicken to debate, drop out!"
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Tell Trump: "Debate, you coward!" >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te9f89c84-188b-47df-b402-5f5db32f53c3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb7039498-afc6-4393-be97-eec15c6de419/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | At least half a dozen Republican presidential candidates appear to have qualified for the August primary debate -- but it looks like Donald Trump is too much of a coward to face them in person. Trump has no problem hurling insults at his opponents via social media, or softball interviews, but he is too chicken to do it on the same stage, where they can hit back. Tough. He needs to do it, or drop out altogether. [**Add your name to tell Trump: "Debate, you coward!" >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4b504560-5e56-4a34-8af4-52688a6fc865/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: FINAL NOTICE
subject: We lost you.

body:
We need to hear from you!

Friend,

House Republicans have reached out multiple times, yet we still haven't heard from you!

We wanted to reach out **ONE LAST TIME** and invite you to renew your 2023 sustaining membership. After today, you will be **REMOVED** from our membership roster.
**You 've fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.**

Renewing your membership is of critical importance to the future of the Republican party.

**Here 's why renewing your membership for 2023 is so important:**
1. You will be supporting conservatives across the country as they go on offense and bring the fight to the Radical Democrats.

3. You will be an essential part of defending our majority and fighting for conservative values.

body:
| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. But, to be honest, I'm still being outspent and outraised by the others in this race – and I urgently need to prove that I have a strong team behind me. That's why I'm asking you to personally endorse my campaign.

I’m counting on 15,000 grassroots supporters to endorse my progressive campaign for U.S. Senate before midnight tonight. [I know it doesn't sound like much, but your endorsement will help me reach more voters and prove to all that this campaign WILL be a powerful force for change. So please, will you add your name, Peter? ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlt6psdP9m10Blrp6cIXO7dLYjIQC6ucWb3OImYLKPQgMA1wupCNJMdv4AoOvPpHLhGgbGuqPw3JNBiGgruK36ebKmde03xlaDWvkwJBLrVnA8gV8Th3ul3dq9qKsEuLndcpdoFg6U5kNbQsSgCJCFsDG3sePNE7DmABdHHWZA4afrCWskovgKg1XOcLIrl8xc9nE7-ikq4eYf8xQaTI1iOfNktjo_vqJpXfLYPoYHNlQAzabwXKA6YmJSoqGrTDpeN8pAPNFKVQBSZbYZUkSCgCulsb7n12qeenRdhmLLi_nOi7Atr3hHr3N8G9NYpRyMadY8YnhpkuyJyyqlQ06K4Vu54KbJFFjbxTRqz9TEWcg/3xy/0evOd9_QT3-fYxppbi7RVg/h1/ht_6qMMSAsjdqxT786mXpEJeHST2t6afaqHSHnLEcr8) [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlt6psdP9m10Blrp6cIXO7dLYjIQC6ucWb3OImYLKPQgMA1wupCNJMdv4AoOvPpHLhGgbGuqPw3JNBiGgruK36ebKmde03xlaDWvkwJBLrVnA8gV8Th3ul3dq9qKsEuLndcpdoFg6U5kNbQsSgCJCFs-wkqcZubbqTi4i2CO8hY4nE8b5RY3nplmAw0MCM09_iGYUUJrsRDfPD_xJB1Tht2gSwYcUZ0JGuNA5filkZb-WBf19VmKbIxCov4FkAVqt5eKYFjFWl_-s2hbxFSltvQSRV9KIoDJUoQv9EPPAWWPYW64yvkrR15iYFyqVGQLTmmrPUCxOVsTM6QjV_lnkhlog75dCP5V1stUrctEiMTKw/3xy/0evOd9_QT3-fYxppbi7RVg/h2/4nHgjp_JcD5TDJmyBM26h_CS4N-WBRiWcGRTKbHFCpo) **I've never been afraid to do what's right.** In the aftermath of the 9/11 attacks, when I was still new to the House of Representatives, I stood alone as the sole member of Congress to vote against the 2001 authorization of military force that was the basis for the war in Afghanistan – because I knew the last thing our grieving nation needed was to enter another war. And in the two decades since, I have continued to fight for progress, even in the face of fierce opposition.

**Now, I'm ready to take that fight for progress to the U.S. Senate, but I can't do that without your help.** Recent polling shows that I am statistically tied with the others in this race among informed voters, but those numbers are drastically different among other voters. That's why I urgently need to increase my name recognition and reach more voters with my record – and your endorsement can help me do just that.

**I know we can make history and help me become just the third Black woman ever to serve in the U.S. Senate – _but only if people like you step up now_. **[So please, if you're in this fight with me, will you endorse my campaign today so we can build a progressive future for all tomorrow? ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlt6psdP9m10Blrp6cIXO7dLYjIQC6ucWb3OImYLKPQgMA1wupCNJMdv4AoOvPpHLhGgbGuqPw3JNBiGgruK36ebKmde03xlaDWvkwJBLrVnA8gV8Th3ul3dq9qKsEuLndcpdoFg6U5kNbQsSgCJCFsX8CTGg5aWL9kyfp_-naUb5aSe2NIx23W0s3mUO4mluQiNctTVytJCzDg8cXcTYXKtWiHfcvvJJIfgfYWqjUweNwv-0pfAJl5Go5qNXdWuXgeIG_OLH4hZp8n1hclcoLZ4yWB6AQLKav5Ifjmz09w6z7zUd2FHahkQrkQbVMB74E2U7vcxrMpsfsgO2KPQyIFjwSLqvJPWITi3bCTv5UB0w/3xy/0evOd9_QT3-fYxppbi7RVg/h3/wtsijseYjLE4Dx2cwWDX2cTR0PirchCvN6Uh730S89A)

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, I'm so grateful for the outpouring of support I've received since launched my U.S. Senate campaign a couple months ago. But, to be honest, I'm still being outspent and outraised by the others in this race – and I urgently need to prove that I have a strong team behind me. That's why I'm asking you to personally endorse my campaign. I’m counting on 15,000 grassroots supporters to endorse my progressive campaign for U.S. Senate before midnight tonight. I've never been afraid to do what's right. In the aftermath of the 9/11 attacks, when I was still new to the House of Representatives, I stood alone as the sole member of Congress to vote against the 2001 authorization of military force that was the basis for the war in Afghanistan – because I knew the last thing our grieving nation needed was to enter another war. And in the two decades since, I have continued to fight for progress, even in the face of fierce opposition. Now, I'm ready to take that fight for progress to the U.S. Senate, but I can't do that without your help. Recent polling shows that I am statistically tied with the others in this race among informed voters, but those numbers are drastically different among other voters. That's why I urgently need to increase my name recognition and reach more voters with my record – and your endorsement can help me do just that. I know we can make history and help me become just the third Black woman ever to serve in the U.S. Senate – but only if people like you step up now. | | I hope to see your name on my list of endorsements. Thank you so much, – Barbara Lee Barbara Lee is a proven progressive champion who has spent the last 25 years fighting for our progressive values in the House. Now, she's ready to take this fight to the Senate, where there are currently no Black women serving. Please, split a donation now between The Collective PAC and Barbara Lee to send her to the Senate! | The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. # [Standing Up For Female Athletes](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1424602&post_id=134874864&utm_source=post-email-title&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM0ODc0ODY0LCJpYXQiOjE2ODk2MDU2MjcsImV4cCI6MTY5MjE5NzYyNywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0MjQ2MDIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.i0dE2zCv7n2PazDT5ZDLbNJdrSDTI8XdVwwjMqdpIvA)
### Illinois Freedom Caucus rallies for young girl kicked off swim team
| | [Andy Roth](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/04dd36ff-8b2e-4f4d-8401-5c12b64848e7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| Jul 17
---
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/04dd36ff-8b2e-4f4d-8401-5c12b64848e7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
---
| | | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZmNuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wL3N0YW5kaW5nLXVwLWZvci1mZW1hbGUtYXRobGV0ZXM_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1zdWJzdGFjayZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJmFjdGlvbj1yZXN0YWNrLWNvbW1lbnQiLCJwIjoxMzQ4NzQ4NjQsInMiOjE0MjQ2MDIsImYiOnRydWUsInUiOjkwNTAxMTkyLCJpYXQiOjE2ODk2MDU2MjcsImV4cCI6MTY5MjE5NzYyNywiaXNzIjoicHViLTAiLCJzdWIiOiJsaW5rLXJlZGlyZWN0In0.KvEoCHfcnr_MSYLYDHD58pJHjdzOTDLdOz0H3vcpUoE?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

The Illinois Freedom Caucus may not have much power in such a blue state but that doesn't stop them from fighting back against the LGBT insanity and standing up for the sanctity of women's sports.
Two weeks ago, 16-year-old Abbigail Wheeler was kicked off of her swim team and banned from a YMCA in Springfield, Illinois. Why? Because she raised concern about being forced to change in the women's locker room with biological men.
According to Wheeler, she went to her swim coach, expressing her concern and discomfort after seeing multiple men changing in the women's locker room, to which he responded "There's nothing I can do about it."
When their feelings were discarded, Wheeler and her teammate responded by hanging signs outside the locker room that said "biological women only" and "women deserve to be safe." They were then accused of "hate speech," kicked off the team, and banned from the YMCA unless they apologized.
You can read here full story [here](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/4bffbb12-f309-481d-828b-5f1b10511304?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
In response, the ILFC organized a rally with the Independent Women's Forum outside the YMCA in Springfield with Wheeler, her teammates, and other advocates for women's sports, that was attended by a massive crowd.
"I was uncomfortable with biological men being allowed to undress in the same space as me and my underage teammates. Not only were my feelings discredited but I was removed from my swim team," Wheeler said through tears at the rally.
"What kind of world will we leave for our daughters if we keep silent," ILFC Chairman Rep. Chris Miller also said.
ILFC members Rep. David Freiss, Rep. Brad Halbrook, and Rep. Adam Neimberg all spoke at the event as well.
You can watch the full rally on the [ILFC's YouTube channel](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/3ff97f21-c1af-4c35-8a2b-b34f4a966230?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
**Fighting against the American Library Association**
Last Tuesday, Montana became the [first state](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/921c19d4-d606-49ef-985c-df73f0b8a388?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to break all ties with the American Library Association (ALA) due to their policy of pushing for sexually explicit books in schools and electing a self-described Marxist to be their new president.
The MT Freedom Caucus were the leading voices in calling for their state's library associate to stop funding the ALA and now more Freedom Caucuses are following suit.
The Mississippi Freedom Caucus have now released a [statement](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/8cc742c7-4ad1-45f5-9dcd-d05ec84fa0f4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) calling on their library association to divest from the ALA, determining their state has funded them to the tune of nearly $70,000 in taxpayer dollars since 2015.
"As state legislators, we are particularly charged with ensuring taxpayer-funded institutions take no part in furthering ethically and morally repugnant agendas inconsistent with the values of the State of Mississippi," the statement read.
Freedom Caucuses will always fight back against Marxist indoctrination in our schools.
**Louisiana Veto Session**
In the Bayou State's latest legislative session, Democrat Governor John Bel Edwards vetoed several common sense bills that LA Freedom Caucus members were able to pass both houses of the legislature.
These included Rep. Beryl Amedee's ban on Central Bank Digital Currencies (CBDC), Rep. Danny McCormick's constitutional carry bill, and Rep. Kathy Edmonston's bill to ban covid vaccine mandates in public schools.
Louisiana, however, will officially be holding a session later in the summer to override these egregious vetoes and LAFC members will lead the charge to ensure the legislature gets them done.
**Keep fighting,**

**Andy Roth**
_President
State Freedom Caucus Network_

clean_body: | | | Peter, In the past few months, we’ve seen who the Left truly are. They’ve covered up crimes for the Bidens. They’ve weaponized the justice system against their political opponents. And they’ve expanded their mission to indoctrinate America to our children. I won’t take it sitting down, and I know you won’t either. And EVERYTHING is on the line. We have just hours to go until our extended deadline, and I’m counting on you. 2024 isn’t just a fight for control of the Senate: it’s going to be a fight for the soul of our country. I know that hardworking Americans like you are on our side, but it means nothing if you don’t show up. We can’t let opportunities like this go to waste, and I’m counting on you. Thank you, Josh Hawley | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

name: GIFFORDS
subject: More than 48,000 lives stolen by gun violence
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
These were parents, grandparents, children, friends, and neighbors.
#

Friends -
New provisional data from the CDC reveals that more than 48,000 people were killed by guns in 2022.
These victims were parents, grandparents, children, friends, and neighbors. Lives stolen far too soon by preventable gun violence.
We know that these numbers may be difficult to process. You may feel discouraged. Or you may feel helpless. But we can’t become numb to this crisis. There is far too much work to do. And we can only get it done by working together.
We must keep the pressure on our elected officials and demand that they have the courage to act. Congress must enact more commonsense gun safety legislation, such as universal background checks, that will save countless lives from senseless acts of gun violence.
All of us here at GIFFORDS will not rest until a future free from gun violence is a reality. Please, continue standing with us in this fight.
\- The team at GIFFORDS
* * *

**🔴 Please, don’t click away just yet 🔴**
GIFFORDS PAC works to end gun violence by empowering voters with information and supporting candidates who will fight for safer gun laws.
When you make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC, every penny goes directly towards our lifesaving work.
[**So please, if you’re able to, we hope you’ll consider making a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today. We must keep up our work to prevent more lives from being stolen by gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-july23.pfB_59&refcode=em230717-1-15&t=1&akid=6149%2E3935704%2E1JAVsg)
**[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-july23.pfB_59&refcode=em230717-1-15&anount=3&t=2&akid=6149%2E3935704%2E1JAVsg)**
**[CONTRIBUTE MORE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-july23.pfB_59&refcode=em230717-1-15&t=3&akid=6149%2E3935704%2E1JAVsg)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=6149%2E3935704%2E1JAVsg) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: News Alert via Courier Newsroom
subject: Our recent coverage on Moms for Liberty
body:
The mainstream media has repeatedly failed to capture the seriousness of what Moms for Liberty is doing — but our newsrooms haven’t.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1247%2E120351%2EHe9mj1)
**Peter, we’ve got to talk about Moms for Liberty.**
Born out of the COVID-19 pandemic, this group first gained attention for manipulating misinformation to drive outrage over mask mandates and other safety measures in schools. Since then, their influence and power has grown immensely while the mainstream media has downplayed their actions and painted them as ‘concerned parents.’
Our local newsrooms are picking up the mainstream media’s slack, shining a bright spotlight on Moms for Liberty’s nefarious agenda and exposing them for what they truly are: **an extremist group.** 1
[**To stop bad actors like Moms for Liberty, our reporters need the resources to keep up with them so they can debunk their misinformation in real time. Will you chip in $5 to support their work?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230717?refcode=em20230717&amount=5&refcode2=1247_120351_He9mj1&akid=1247%2E120351%2EHe9mj1)
Moms for Liberty has spread dangerous lies and misinformation about teachers, students, and schools that have divided our communities. They’ve led campaigns banning books, targeting LGBTQ+ students, and ending inclusive school curricula.
They’ve also endorsed over 500 school board candidates, working to have influence in **_all 13,000 school districts_** in the United States.
The mainstream media has repeatedly failed to capture the seriousness of what Moms for Liberty is doing — but our newsrooms haven’t. In Pennsylvania, our reporters at _The Keystone_ provided in-depth coverage of the group’s recent conference in Philadelphia.
They gave readers a peek behind the curtain at the range of right-wing groups who were actually sponsoring the event. They also highlighted the work of local community members who fought back against the group’s extreme agenda by hosting a Banned Book Giveaway:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230717?refcode=em20230717&amount=5&refcode2=1247_120351_He9mj1&akid=1247%2E120351%2EHe9mj1)
[**Through these stories, our reporters are filling in a critical information gap and ensuring their readers know the truth about Moms for Liberty. With your support, they can keep up this critical coverage — so will you chip in $5 today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230717?refcode=em20230717&amount=5&refcode2=1247_120351_He9mj1&akid=1247%2E120351%2EHe9mj1)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230717?refcode=em20230717&amount=5&refcode2=1247_120351_He9mj1&akid=1247%2E120351%2EHe9mj1)**
Thank you for supporting local journalism. We can’t do this without you.
— The Courier Newsroom Team
1 - [The Southern Poverty Law Center](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3749?t=2&akid=1247%2E120351%2EHe9mj1)
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=3&refcode2=1247_120351_He9mj1&akid=1247%2E120351%2EHe9mj1)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1247%2E120351%2EHe9mj1)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

name: Jon Tester
subject: I hate to bother you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
| Peter, you know I hate to bother you, so I’ll keep this quick.

This past month was incredibly busy for Team Tester. From public fundraising deadlines to a new Mitch McConnell recruit jumping in the race to run against me, we’re at a vital turning point.

**That’s why I need your support now more than ever in this campaign.**

The coming months will be critical. We need the resources to respond to any incoming attacks from opponents and national Republicans like Mitch McConnell. McConnell is desperate to buy this Senate seat in Montana, so they’re pulling out all the stops—including recruiting a millionaire self-funder to run against me.

name: Becky Wagner
subject: There’s no doubt my husband made the right decision
body:
I wish I were writing to you under happier circumstances...

Dear Friend,
I wish I were writing to you under happier circumstances...
...but my hero police officer husband, Mark Wagner, is the next big target of the radical anti-police movement and I urgently need your help before they make an example out of him.
That's Mark in the picture I sent you, along with our boys Nolan and Jacob and dog Kilo.
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2dqkfpe1fcif02t36r5p3umkg11nh25eeaahlco_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdh64o73c1h2bs)
Not only is Mark a highly respected officer, he's an incredibly supportive father, a loving husband, and a fierce friend.
He's dedicated his life to protecting others. But we live in far-Left Madison, Wisconsin - and the "defund the police" mob whipped up rage, LIED about what happened, and trashed Mark's reputation.
And now Mark faces 10 YEARS behind bars for doing exactly what he was trained to do in the line of duty - and I'm scared I might lose him. [**That 's why I wrote this letter to you, someone I've never met before, to ask for your help.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z57pjtsiaaggvfc6g08j7j6g67he1vajdeea1qqo_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdh64o73c1h2bs)
But first, let me explain what happened...
On the morning of February 3, 2022, Mark and other officers tried to arrest a _violent_ _criminal_ named Quadren Wilson.
Wilson has a rap sheet a mile long with dozens of arrests for drug distribution, theft, witness intimidation, battery, eluding police, and more. He was wanted for allegedly dealing fentanyl to a man found dead in a restaurant bathroom.
Mark's arrest team planned to capture Wilson in his vehicle using a containment strategy. They pulled in their trucks to block his car on both ends. But Wilson floored the accelerator, spinning his wheels wildly in a desperate attempt to escape justice.
Mark and another officer exited their vehicle to make the arrest. Mark was holding one of those big POLICE shields and had his gun drawn. But Wilson refused Mark's commands to show his hands, continuing to spin his wheels and try to force his way out.
With the wheels screeching and smoking, Mark and the other officer saw Wilson reach into the center console and pull his hand up.
Mark thought Wilson had a gun. He heard what he thought was gunfire. Then Mark felt something hit the shield he was holding and push him backward.** **
**Both Mark and the other officer responded to this life-threatening situation by firing into the vehicle.**
Mark believed his life and his fellow officers' lives were in danger. He did what he was trained to do and stopped the threat.
Thankfully, Wilson survived and no one else was injured. But because Wilson is black and Mark is white - anti-police radicals jumped at the chance to target Mark.
Protesters drummed up a racial firestorm by spreading lies that Wilson "had his hands up" and that he "was shot five times in the back." The corrupt liberal media repeated these lies and painted my husband as a monster.
And on September 22, 2022, the liberal District Attorney caved to the mob and filed BOGUS felony charges against Mark. **Now Mark faces 10 YEARS in prison.**
[**_Now I hope you can see why I 'm turning to you for help today._**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z466bdvin5nl25fg1ekg8cm8kip9afp4o5mgirto_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdh64o73c1h2bs)
Mark dedicated his life to helping others. He's spent 30 years in law enforcement, most of them with the Milwaukee Police Department (MPD).
We knew fighting alone against the anti-police movement here in Wisconsin would be impossible and our hope that justice would prevail was quickly fading when we received a call from **the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF)** offering to help Mark.
This incredible organization helps innocent officers, like my husband, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.
Law and justice experts like President Ronald Reagan's Attorney General Edwin Meese and former FBI Assistant Director Ronald Hosko serve on LELDF's Board. LELDF's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.
In short, these are experts when it comes to policing. And they thoroughly vet cases to determine if an officer was wrongly accused or charged before deciding to help.
They provide legal counsel, expert witnesses, whatever is needed to make sure wrongly accused police officers get a fair shake in court. And they do it all free of charge!
But LELDF doesn't receive any money from the government to help police officers facing unjust charges. They're funded entirely by the generous support of folks like you who can recognize a miscarriage of justice and want to help fix it.
This is why I reached out to you today. I needed to ask you a very important question:
[**_Will you please help my husband Mark fight the unjust charges against him and clear his name by rushing a generous, tax-deductible donation to LELDF today?_**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdorlh120556a26k59vna0bdkvlq8mv9rbndnim0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdh64o73c1h2bs)
Your kind gift today of $35, $50, or $100 to help Mark will mean so much to my family.
Or, if you're blessed with the means to help with a gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more, I pray you will so my husband doesn't spend 10 YEARS behind bars away from his family.
Right now, LELDF is preparing to ramp up legal action in Mark's case. [**So please follow this link to make your tax-deductible donation right away.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zk468l9k9bhr2l78hbnmje8eql1ttqnlpli2c178_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdh64o73c1h2bs)
Any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing. No matter what you're able to give, please say a prayer for Mark and our family.
Thank you in advance for your generous support of my family and LELDF.
With deepest gratitude,
Becky Wagner
P.S. Mark is the type of person who'd offer to donate a kidney to a friend in need just because it's the right thing to do. In fact, that's exactly what he did when he donated one of his kidneys to his former partner of more than a decade! Mark didn't even let his partner know he got checked out as a potential donor. He just said that his partner had young kids who needed him to be around and it was the right thing to do.
This is the type of man the anti-police mob is targeting and trying to destroy: a kidney donor, a youth football coach, a man who assists the elderly from our parish in running errands and doing handy-man projects. A man of faith who's always helping others.
Mark faces 10 years behind bars - simply for doing his job to serve and protect. [**_Will you help him clear his name by making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund today?_** ](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zq74pcia5i7ivf2p3829rfud3rmj33poruu5pk38_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdh64o73c1h2bs) Your generosity will help LELDF mount the strongest legal defenses for my husband and other wrongly accused officers. Thank you in advance for your prayers and support.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

1600 Daily
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zps5rtqrtkbae14h8m051gut9vdu2u83oqn3u87o_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdh64o73c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8or0c1gj8d5hmjpqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4chj6eo71c5h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z13rb4p05f5n17k10d2m49cg6cneqvbc6ku0ou00_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdh64o73c1h2bs)_

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zghqk8s4p7lnbq9nekhqe8iv1pg4e2j17g99sti0_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or0sjhm4oj0sdg649fg)

---

_**EXCLUSIVE MESSAGE ENCLOSED**_
---

As a loyal friend and supporter, I wanted to personally share why I will not be entering the 2024 Presidential Race.

Please take a minute to read my personal message to you.

---

---

\- Mike Pompeo
Sent from my iPhone

---
| | _Mike Pompeo here. I know many Americans are struggling under the weight of Joe Biden 's failures. If you are one of them, please ignore this request for a donation. Save your money, and let's prepare for a big election in 2024. God Bless!_
---
* * *

---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ze8mq2b1k9fli6khk60cfg0qs8342hvl5i0217f8_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdh6cp32cdh2bs "Mike Pompeo Is Calling on All Conservatives to Join Him in Championing Our American Values")
---

_**AN IMPORTANT MESSAGE FROM MIKE POMPEO**_

Where religious freedom is denied, you can bet that tyranny will follow. No country that denies religious freedom can ever rightly claim to be good in some other way. Protecting religious freedom - abroad and at home - is a central American value.

That is why we all must do our part in defending religious freedom.

| | Peter, We cannot allow Biden’s open border crisis to continue and that starts with removing Department of Homeland Security Alejandro Mayorkas.
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=bfdf89d31d764157b07171e520db073e&_e=2YUYoWFLOgjezLwrmZjAom00TSAd4uQTK-mCi6Cv4TshNapegMfxamu28nfAKAn4g9EajKFP3Pcsj4T8Yt0F9iX7K1ObU5ItmJUrRyQ2gBSotjj2MaDS2LUd3Lz4HqSVF1wRAorTqH-USPDx8yjZxzmfnvEXefzpwoitJeWDAVkeX0KsueDlXTLgiCo8nfMlaXu3gVhootiERgGHVfGmxvetoulqq7MdcEHXemu0oH6dNHKBkbrYRJPrFfdYI8JBSU-tuTpUQVvjc2UyFnfOi5zAEsciIQqdQpF_0GyxKNasUKe5TFXBg5yFCfOxVXETqH4Cr7jBrbegvebYSb9OXg%3D%3D)
---
**Why Mayorkas should be impeached:** ➡️ Presided over the worst border crisis in history. ➡️ Lied to Congress about the dire situation at the border. ➡️ Slandered our brave Border Patrol agents.➡️ Failed to maintain operational control of our southern border. ➡️ Shielded millions of illegal immigrants from deportation. **We need your immediate support to hold Mayorkas accountable. ** Your [**urgent donation**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=bfdf89d31d764157b07171e520db073e&_e=2YUYoWFLOgjezLwrmZjAom00TSAd4uQTK-mCi6Cv4TshNapegMfxamu28nfAKAn4g9EajKFP3Pcsj4T8Yt0F9iX7K1ObU5ItmJUrRyQ2gBSotjj2MaDS2LUd3Lz4HqSVF1wRAorTqH-USPDx8yjZxzmfnvEXefzpwoitJeWDAVkeX0KsueDlXTLgiCo8nfMl90pAnyelsEanL1Evo5B2o0cNfya41USve3dYCDFKlqdv1LEhIjGaXI-T2MEy92tadfin8s7Ksrieb-HkR1-cL8gmn18IC8hMfmu0DPgbfw5uuARokxHhm_9Hu6c8rWRHLlNX3pB4tJFR2lA_ys6EVw%3D%3D) will fuel our grassroots efforts in the impeachment of Secretary Mayorkas. **Together, let's fight for secure borders and the protection of our nation's integrity.**
---

subject: Picture a future where every voice matters ...

body:
|
---

Team,
The victories our movement has achieved in recent months, in cases like _Allen v. Milligan_ and _Moore v. Harper_ , are not just singular triumphs. They are rallying cries for justice, echoes of a resolute and unwavering commitment to fairness, equality and equal representation. The victories were made possible because we refused to stand idly by and let our democracy be trampled upon. And while these were momentous wins, our work remains unfinished.
[**Will you make a donation to All On The Line to help us keep up the momentum?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66618680/416984623/-1915986207?refcode=20230717_AOTL_P_EHHA2_RedLiteXopeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZkODQ2NGZmLWJhMjQtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kGDgUMrnA_fmkHSHdWNXP_AP-MqG37w0Z3cGFGFJfVw=)

It is a battle that transcends political affiliations and unites us as champions of democracy. [**But we cannot do this alone. We need your support and belief that a fair and inclusive democracy is not just a lofty ideal, but a fundamental right. clean_body: | Team, The victories our movement has achieved in recent months, in cases like Allen v. Milligan and Moore v. Harper , are not just singular triumphs. They are rallying cries for justice, echoes of a resolute and unwavering commitment to fairness, equality and equal representation. The victories were made possible because we refused to stand idly by and let our democracy be trampled upon. And while these were momentous wins, our work remains unfinished. = = We are here, now, at a critical juncture in our history, where the fight for fair maps and voting rights has never been more crucial. It is a battle that transcends political affiliations and unites us as champions of democracy. Together, we can dismantle the walls of division, shatter the chains of oppression, and create a future where every American's voice is heard, regardless of their race, their background, or their ZIP code. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Imagine a nation where the power rests not in the hands of the few, but in the collective will of the people. Envision a country where maps are drawn with transparency, integrity, and the utmost respect for the rights of all people. Picture a future where every voice matters, where communities are no longer marginalized, and where the promise of democracy is fulfilled. We have the opportunity to shape this future, to forge a path that generations will look back upon with gratitude and admiration. = Together we have achieved so much, but the road ahead is filled with obstacles and challenges and we must remain steadfast. I firmly believe with your support, we will defy the odds, rewrite the narrative, and build a future that reflects the will of the generations to come. In solidarity, Eric H. But Republican special interests are funnelling cash to defeat strong Democrats like Raja. He's counting on grassroots supporters to keep this campaign running strong. Can we count on you to chip in $10 so Raja can keep up the good fight in Congress? | = | | Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress Friends of Raja for Congress PO Box 681202 Schaumburg, IL 60168 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

Donald J. Trump July 16th, 2023
**Bedminster, NJ —** Today, Turning Point Action announced the [results of the 2023 Turning Point Action Conference straw poll,](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kMFuhCAQhp8GbxgcWNADh91uuJi0m7ZJe6UC6haFIMbs2zc0Ta_zTWa-_9dL9LN7SCQuCGCazYYAED0jgJ5dPp95_9FfMe_vL_jKT-woFJ4QQH5E-7_6d6W2i559mYprZeQJXEMqKxvedpx0rRDVJJ2gQ9fxljvLgJ2odmQYTEs7btsvJ3Q1SyBAiWhEwwmjpG61ZYZ0wjAgetAUMWLs9h2cCav25p7TvsR6CEvl5ZRz3H6dFAJ1HEedJ5uTdtqPOo0p7LEOaSws4iGs2a4ZgdqjD7pEV-U3AkUEAvV-O-O3nPSBb8F7rHbv8auNIWVMRMPraFyVpInH7P28cYEYGUsBxeUnAAD__4djZ_I) commissioned by the Trafalgar Group.
The results of the survey show President Trump dominating the field for the 2024 GOP primary with overwhelming support from Republican voters and activists.
**Who is your first pick for president from the current GOP primary field?**
**86% President Donald J. Trump (+78)**
8% Perry Johnson
4% Ron DeSantis
2% Vivek Ramaswamy
President Trump was enthusiastically welcomed by [over 7,000 Republican activists](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8j71ugzAUhZ_msiWyr_8HD00RC1I7tqvhmuLENAg7Qnn7iqrqer6jT-eEZc1penowF0CcExVABPECiL28fL7p_qNvT7q_vp9areR-UHwFxPpc43_1z3KOS0j5SE3bkFc4cdZEz7V1mjlrTDN7suM4OKUn4lKgGqJ0Lrg4SKkU0TA1ySNDwQw3XDMp2NmGKIk5QxJZGIMAySiW232i-3fIdK3bY1nP431psp9rXcvvpg6wq3uqNW4HA-zGOWw5xVvabpwDdqWG-iiAHdeWCa2s4txoI6zlGkRXQLTIms3TuqecU9EGJPs6Hh7CnwAAAP__NAdbAA) on the opening night of the conference held in West Palm Beach, Florida.
In a fiery speech, President Trump vowed to save the economy from Biden’s disastrous economic policies, end Bidenflation, abolish the Deep State, secure America’s borders, clean up America’s streets, and smash the Marxist Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion bureaucracies that are driving up tuition costs and sticking American students with crushing debt.
“Never forget—our enemies want to stop us because we are the only ones who can stop THEM. They want to take away MY freedom because I will never let them take away YOUR freedom,” President Trump said. “They want to silence me because I will never let them silence you. In the end, they’re not after me, they’re after you—and I’m just standing in their way.”

As a Navy veteran and nurse practitioner, I’m not your typical elected official…so I’m going to just shoot you straight. $24.95 That was the average online donation my campaign received last month. Unlike the Big Money Democrats who are funded by millionaires and billionaires, my campaign is fueled by hard working Americans just like you…good folks who love our country and want to support leaders who don’t just talk but actually deliver results. I just talked with my campaign team for our mid-month fundraising check-in, and the bad news is we are behind pace for the month. That’s why I’m hoping you can help us out by making a $24.95 donation to our campaign today. DONATE $24.95 As the Democrats’ #1 target, it is critical that our campaign has the resources we need to fight back against the lies and deceit being spread by the Big Money Democrats. Campaigns are expensive, so I’m hoping you can help fund our next advertising campaign with a donation today. Thanks in advance for your help and support, Peter….it will help us protect the Republican Majority and allow me to keep fighting for common sense in Washington! -Jen Paid for by Kiggans for Congress USE OF MILITARY IMAGES OR RANK DOES NOT IMPLY ENDORSEMENT BY THE U.S. DEPT. body:
| | | [](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/062c785348456fa3/692a0882eebcdc28c3d6b838967d376c/40933)
---
| | Friends, We are so blessed to live in this country and to live in this Commonwealth. I love this time of year when everyone comes together to celebrate the founding of our great nation - kids waive American flags in small-town Independence Day parades, families come together at backyard barbecues, and most of all, we take a moment to appreciate the freedoms that so many fought hard for over the past 247 years. We need more of that. That is why when I am Governor, July will officially be [**_"American Pride Month."_**](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/062c785348456fa3/73937341a9559379c3d6b838967d376c/40933) We will celebrate America, its Founding Fathers, and the core pillars of freedom, liberty, and democracy all month long. America is fundamentally a force for good in the world, despite what Andy Beshear and his supporters think.

---
It's time to vote out those who not only are ashamed of our country but undermine the Constitutional principles that are the foundation of our nation. We are on the front lines for freedom. It has never been more important to fight for what makes our country great. For Kentucky, Daniel Cameron

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: 🚨 Need you to hear about this 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Hundreds of senior military promotions are stalled in the Senate
#

Peter -
My campaign reached out yesterday because we missed our mid-month goal.
And I’m writing today to thank you, because after our push we caught up to where we need to be — and then some.
So really, I mean it: Thank you.
Now, today, I need you to hear about this:
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/2192?t=1&akid=817%2E734936%2E8JAOUs)
The Marine Corps doesn’t have a confirmed Commandant for the first time since 1859. Hundreds of senior military promotions are stalled in the Senate. Have been for months.
That’s all thanks to former football coach (and Alabama Senator) Tommy Tuberville.
My service in the Marines wasn’t for money or for ideology, just for my country.
But Tommy Tuberville doesn’t know the first thing about that. His closest run-in with our armed forces was losing the 2014 Military Bowl.
This is pure politics, Peter. Plain and simple. But worse than that, it’s dangerous.
And that’s another reason why we’ve got to win in Arizona next year.
[**So, if you’re with me, tell Tuberville to get the hell out of the way and let these promotions move forward.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em_tub_militray_blockade/?source=em230717-1-f&refcode2=817.734936.8JAOUs&akid=817%2E734936%2E8JAOUs)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em_tub_militray_blockade/?source=em230717-1-f&refcode2=817.734936.8JAOUs&akid=817%2E734936%2E8JAOUs)
Thank you,
Ruben

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=817%2E734936%2E8JAOUs). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=3&refcode2=817_734936_8JAOUs&akid=817%2E734936%2E8JAOUs)

name: Captain Sam Brown
subject: I shouldn’t be alive.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada
body:
But since I am, I’m fighting for my country. | | | [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=dc5e1db54aa344ac8d886abbda943a0c&_e=P435zs2c3VH6b3TywN1LjSH_5XFnnsXH3NEQETFGTLl5Jw0aTkYclsS2hU9HsmGVjbqieLj4dEbN8qQqgtC-HkA9ONK7KBLnXhWfzXNi3qfTPMGAIY3yi7Se8_GFmDTYfnOm1m8yJVI8gxmzj1A-2sWuRxQXMDraJ4TxoVWPQYUHb4QT7smPOKb2tup7DhRIpBbYDnX2j5tUqd_u8thsWcEMZ00HNZyga3wsmVG29i3mEbBJHY8OWZox4Y_yJhYf2FnV0ne-F4Eu-CevnZCCPnVaeX0lU4FIn-j0ycWVUfTb06MLXCdL5Zal_cZKwgUX5iutphte2A5Ktsf9FvbxfacSQdo-RvCv3eBg9qgjAYwXaJoD1ur81OH77wSiJKAQTXK8k8gqnAHLYtW7SYQHnW6mo3tZTGHKhBGtzzyBRUVbwK1x0P_3Lmu82oNcgSMU)
---
| | Friend, My name is Sam Brown -- I'm a husband, father, small businessman, retired Army Captain, and, as of this week, [**a Republican candidate for the U.S. Senate.**](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=dc5e1db54aa344ac8d886abbda943a0c&_e=P435zs2c3VH6b3TywN1LjSH_5XFnnsXH3NEQETFGTLl5Jw0aTkYclsS2hU9HsmGVjbqieLj4dEbN8qQqgtC-HkA9ONK7KBLnXhWfzXNi3qfTPMGAIY3yi7Se8_GFmDTYfnOm1m8yJVI8gxmzj1A-2sWuRxQXMDraJ4TxoVWPQYUHb4QT7smPOKb2tup7DhRIpBbYDnX2j5tUqd_u8thsWcEMZ00HNZyga3wsmVG29i3mEbBJHY8OWZox4Y_yJhYf2FnV0ne-F4Eu-CevnZCCPnVaeX0lU4FIn-j0ycWVUfROoQ5oJVz9ypd6iDgRbc1Gqa_Ph9pDzmEAN-vRTUob1CNXJUHJz0c2jOsczaiaYoZsT_UM8ehVM8h8P8l4NdNqajQj_qaZC_At1G_XdpxJQi7H57mNqtRSouE62onRBuZQaqiOkYZS1nYSgMWKT09F) [**While I was serving in Afghanistan in 2008, a roadside bomb detonated below the gas tank of my vehicle.**](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=dc5e1db54aa344ac8d886abbda943a0c&_e=P435zs2c3VH6b3TywN1LjSH_5XFnnsXH3NEQETFGTLl5Jw0aTkYclsS2hU9HsmGVjbqieLj4dEbN8qQqgtC-HkA9ONK7KBLnXhWfzXNi3qfTPMGAIY3yi7Se8_GFmDTYfnOm1m8yJVI8gxmzj1A-2sWuRxQXMDraJ4TxoVWPQYUHb4QT7smPOKb2tup7DhRIpBbYDnX2j5tUqd_u8thsWcEMZ00HNZyga3wsmVG29i38HdUS2VGdYNjTen04OGgL9AzlsLFMLmeyAuqg7qvzBIv2BlAdDa_UzYzHTtC43ye6Y_yvLwjoM6aRBNy9_eMr_L76kbwvp8Aig33VcS49O0WGkZWC4rSBQn7sg-8_CMZhbtiRw-VjqzhfrHIGVVzA9oypKsfPM1xdEuHZ6bsspHWJV5DsjpU79HmbivVxpTw%3D)
---
[](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=dc5e1db54aa344ac8d886abbda943a0c&_e=P435zs2c3VH6b3TywN1LjSH_5XFnnsXH3NEQETFGTLl5Jw0aTkYclsS2hU9HsmGVjbqieLj4dEbN8qQqgtC-HkA9ONK7KBLnXhWfzXNi3qfTPMGAIY3yi7Se8_GFmDTYfnOm1m8yJVI8gxmzj1A-2sWuRxQXMDraJ4TxoVWPQYUHb4QT7smPOKb2tup7DhRIpBbYDnX2j5tUqd_u8thsWcEMZ00HNZyga3wsmVG29i3mEbBJHY8OWZox4Y_yJhYf2FnV0ne-F4Eu-CevnZCCPnVaeX0lU4FIn-j0ycWVUfTtBkS6ElkttS79CG64073pwB7Fwx9UqRG6JwmOPeDSFog5JhupfoUrPNOm07L3Fa_bZiIIJOIdA93D9OUiTIvcTLHf5H1dSscNC-SeBCso2xBIkpfAsZMhnA_NcOo7TJTJpTrlbaJDPoFuCnsqtAyL)
---
My body was immediately engulfed in flames. I remember thinking "How long will it be before I burn to death?" But despite our enemy's best efforts,**_I survived._** By the grace of God, one of my soldiers was able to extinguish the flames and save my life as I was staring death in the face. **I truly shouldn 't be alive today.** For three years, I went through over 30 surgeries to recover from my wounds. I was bed bound, and over 30% of my body was permanently scarred. But this experience taught me the most important and valuable lesson that I've ever learned: **_Putting it all on the line in service to the American people is the greatest honor imaginable._** That's why every day since I nearly lost my life, I've dedicated every fiber of my being to continue my service to the greatest country in the history of mankind. [**Friend, I 'm telling you all this because I'm hoping that I can count on your financial support**](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=dc5e1db54aa344ac8d886abbda943a0c&_e=P435zs2c3VH6b3TywN1LjSH_5XFnnsXH3NEQETFGTLl5Jw0aTkYclsS2hU9HsmGVjbqieLj4dEbN8qQqgtC-HkA9ONK7KBLnXhWfzXNi3qfTPMGAIY3yi7Se8_GFmDTYfnOm1m8yJVI8gxmzj1A-2sWuRxQXMDraJ4TxoVWPQYUHb4QT7smPOKb2tup7DhRIpBbYDnX2j5tUqd_u8thsWcEMZ00HNZyga3wsmVG29i3mEbBJHY8OWZox4Y_yJhYf2FnV0ne-F4Eu-CevnZCCPnVaeX0lU4FIn-j0ycWVUfSbnjSGQvK7vnWQjQtsp37WJ1GBopUyFXEBTbB_MmuVnvQyUzALzUp1C7gkAJDgzH6uhz5R1kpGYChXMceu3V61G3RtqittNvNKGq2wjoLo9cPN6_WC1HjthuAQbFt1e1pqboz21JAfqIDKRSaMGTS0) -- but I don't want to ask you to part with your hard-earned money without telling you my story. **_The American people DESERVE a champion who can stand in the fight without flinching. With your help, I can be that champion. _**
---
[**SEND AN ARMY CAPTAIN TO THE SENATE**](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=dc5e1db54aa344ac8d886abbda943a0c&_e=P435zs2c3VH6b3TywN1LjSH_5XFnnsXH3NEQETFGTLl5Jw0aTkYclsS2hU9HsmGVjbqieLj4dEbN8qQqgtC-HkA9ONK7KBLnXhWfzXNi3qfTPMGAIY3yi7Se8_GFmDTYfnOm1m8yJVI8gxmzj1A-2sWuRxQXMDraJ4TxoVWPQYUHb4QT7smPOKb2tup7DhRIpBbYDnX2j5tUqd_u8thsWcEMZ00HNZyga3wsmVG29i3mEbBJHY8OWZox4Y_yJhYf2FnV0ne-F4Eu-CevnZCCPnVaeX0lU4FIn-j0ycWVUfSAgMtJ2vprFrMOcyWRfX13aLIhOCeQRbcQ9aM7IGw5Vt55s_MG0E_sYk5hV63cSfuCmnmHSMMDo-W6A_4dZmhYkehBRTf7FbFQQHP0Y52QWoBbk0bF0-_vBPnj7pE0wp6Q4BBeP-hwe0yl9VPnsWuf)
---
Friend, my candidacy is truly unique because there's NOTHING that Joe Biden, the Washington establishment, or the media can do to me that's worse than what I went through on the battlefield in Afghanistan. [**Can you help me out and chip in $10, 15, or even $25 so that I can continue serving our country?**](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=dc5e1db54aa344ac8d886abbda943a0c&_e=P435zs2c3VH6b3TywN1LjSH_5XFnnsXH3NEQETFGTLl5Jw0aTkYclsS2hU9HsmGVjbqieLj4dEbN8qQqgtC-HkA9ONK7KBLnXhWfzXNi3qfTPMGAIY3yi7Se8_GFmDTYfnOm1m8yJVI8gxmzj1A-2sWuRxQXMDraJ4TxoVWPQYUHb4QT7smPOKb2tup7DhRIpBbYDnX2j5tUqd_u8thsWcEMZ00HNZyga3wsmVG29i3mEbBJHY8OWZox4Y_yJhYf2FnV0ne-F4Eu-CevnZCCPnVaeX0lU4FIn-j0ycWVUfSalyQymTcOU_lOPvJnwTXXqRRf0GQkI62VptEzW3zMg8ciN8FfP_J4iumLLH2KGs0OFHbvB10Lts8j3JTBNaY7CminLzddrOvrIIWLh3GrEIxyiFppBhcR5tBKVFrhbGzdOp4_pPLfDRCs0riPqkGr) Now more than ever, we need leaders who are willing to serve -- even when things get difficult. Nevada deserves nothing less. America deserves nothing less. You deserve nothing less. We owe it to our nation, to our state, and to everyone who has sacrificed in service of our country. [**Please, join my team today!**](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=dc5e1db54aa344ac8d886abbda943a0c&_e=P435zs2c3VH6b3TywN1LjSH_5XFnnsXH3NEQETFGTLl5Jw0aTkYclsS2hU9HsmGVjbqieLj4dEbN8qQqgtC-HkA9ONK7KBLnXhWfzXNi3qfTPMGAIY3yi7Se8_GFmDTYfnOm1m8yJVI8gxmzj1A-2sWuRxQXMDraJ4TxoVWPQYUHb4QT7smPOKb2tup7DhRIpBbYDnX2j5tUqd_u8thsWcEMZ00HNZyga3wsmVG29i3mEbBJHY8OWZox4Y_yJhYf2FnV0ne-F4Eu-CevnZCCPnVaeX0lU4FIn-j0ycWVUfTly5oGfr31k_Yg9Ie2GisumEZsjFV1xDgVdzx8-NfE7zPkx7jIcQqNjDoysfmWwfg5ZS7NvYDMOib3Be3ikLnlisnrwPQFaounGdIW_A3EZZAyHO0EH5oICZl_nM2uw-iFfNzdb52N55rP_XCiFG6l) Duty First,
---
[](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=dc5e1db54aa344ac8d886abbda943a0c&_e=P435zs2c3VH6b3TywN1LjSH_5XFnnsXH3NEQETFGTLl5Jw0aTkYclsS2hU9HsmGVjbqieLj4dEbN8qQqgtC-HkA9ONK7KBLnXhWfzXNi3qfTPMGAIY3yi7Se8_GFmDTYfnOm1m8yJVI8gxmzj1A-2sWuRxQXMDraJ4TxoVWPQYUHb4QT7smPOKb2tup7DhRIpBbYDnX2j5tUqd_u8thsWcEMZ00HNZyga3wsmVG29i3mEbBJHY8OWZox4Y_yJhYf2FnV0ne-F4Eu-CevnZCCPnVaeX0lU4FIn-j0ycWVUfQtauyH3ZYxgf9nzRhIhHUJBidHUvpTSsxdchbNWr6uZu-EIqga2sIQmHfQdDKr7q93DRLgVqyGDNn2z4zUqQRY0suj0g2r4gP0cGS_3xZJ1DtTK5HPNTNfw5OuQXBu0J-FLodYxaYA4AM7mplMyev5)
---

name: ?CRITICAL ELECTION UPDATE?
subject: Everything is about to change, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LaRose for Senate
body:
CRITICAL update for you, Friend >> Today, Frank LaRose officially announced his candidacy for this MUST-WIN Senate seat. Will you join the team today & help send this Army Green Beret to the Senate?

| |
---
| | | Friend, this is Frank LaRose.

You may have heard of me. But if not, let me tell you a little more:

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662866%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4trsRxuDjn%2fkTJQwUIft6A&sysid=1)
---

I grew up working on a small, family-owned farm in Northeast Ohio.

After high school, I decided to serve my country by joining the Army. At the age of 20, I became the youngest ever Sergeant in the 101st Airborne. I completed Special Forces training & was eventually awarded the Green Beret.

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662866%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4trsRxuDjn%2fkTJQwUIft6A&sysid=1)
---

During my decade in uniform around the globe in places like Iraq & Kosovo, I saw first-hand the horrific lengths that corrupt regimes would go to in order to hold onto power.

When I finished my deployment, I promised myself that I’d never allow our country to sink to that level of corruption.

_**So when I see the DC “elite” use the overwhelming power of the state to silence conservatives & imprison their political opponents, it makes me sick to my stomach.**_

**That’s why today I’m announcing my candidacy for the most important Senate race in the country.**

I’m not a career politician or DC swamp creature. I’m a husband, father, Christian, & strong conservative who's tired of the lies & corruption.

I’m reaching out because I’m running against a Far-Left Liberal Senator who votes with Biden 98% of the time & has Hollywood donors lining his pockets with millions to crush me - he raised $3.4 million in the last three months alone!

So if we’re going to take back our country, it’s going to be because of the support from Patriots like you.

**[I’m humbly asking, Friend, will you chip in just $9 today to help this Green Beret& strong conservative win?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662867%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9OIoXiTupaEJOJYzpjho1A&sysid=1 "I’m humbly asking, Friend, will you chip
in just $9 today to help this Green Beret & strong conservative win?")**

---

We can’t take back our country without you.

Please, help me start my campaign strong & I promise I will make you proud.

Yours in service,
Frank LaRose

Here’s what Vote Mama Founder, Liuna Grechen Shirley, had to say about endorsing Greta:
“Now more than ever, we need leaders who will defend our most basic rights — the right to vote, our reproductive rights, and our health care freedoms. Mississippi’s current Attorney General authored the lawsuit that overturned Roe v. Wade, refuses to hold corrupt officials accountable, and prioritizes special interests above everyday Mississippians. Unlike her opponent, Greta Kemp Martin has dedicated her life and career to fighting for equity and opportunity. I am confident that she will use the full power of the Attorney General’s office to stand up for women and children, and champion progress to move her state forward.”
Greta will always defend our rights instead of rolling them back. That’s why more and more national groups like Vote Mama are supporting a strong Mississippi AG candidate – but we won’t win without a solid team standing with Greta every step of the way in these last few months of our campaign.

Greta’s opponent isn’t just bad for Mississippi, she’s outright dangerous to our entire country. This means we’re calling on our supporters in every part of the country to fuel this campaign through the finish line.

[No matter your zip code, we need you standing with us. Will you chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can to help elect a strong, pro-choice champion for the people as Attorney General in Mississippi?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66620141/416989480/-456841951?refcode=BEB_EM_230717VMEndorse_l2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzNDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWVjZThkM2ItYmQyNC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HqvADa_mYCm19W-wgaKsXKTQs7NGtjjZIPoZ4bta-S4=)
[CHIP IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66620142/416989481/-456841951?refcode=BEB_EM_230717VMEndorse_b1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzNDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWVjZThkM2ItYmQyNC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HqvADa_mYCm19W-wgaKsXKTQs7NGtjjZIPoZ4bta-S4=)
We can’t do this without you,

Team Greta
Greta Kemp Martin was born, raised, and educated in Mississippi. She is an active member of the Mississippi Bar, and currently works as the Litigation Director for Disability Rights Mississippi, the protection and advocacy agency for the state. As Attorney General, Greta will fight for the rights of everyday Mississippians, and stand up for the working people of this state.
---
[DONATE TODAY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66620143/416989482/-456841951?refcode=BEB_EM_230717VMEndorse_biobox&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzNDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWVjZThkM2ItYmQyNC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HqvADa_mYCm19W-wgaKsXKTQs7NGtjjZIPoZ4bta-S4=)

name: EJ
subject: Can you help my mom win?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terán for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_071723_EJ&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_071723_EJ&amount=5]
Our son EJ asked if he could help out with his mom’s campaign. He wanted to share why he’s so proud of his mom and the campaign she is running. So here’s a note from EJ (with some help from me).
If you would like to join our campaign with a $5 contribution, it would really mean a lot. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_071723_EJ&amount=5] -Eddie (Raquel's husband)
Hi my name is EJ, Raquel Terán is my mamá, and she is running to be in Congress.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_071723_EJ&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_071723_EJ&amount=5]
My mamá always tells me that the reason she is running is to fight for kids like me.
So we can go to good schools with good teachers, and have nice playgrounds to play with my friends, and a healthy planet to live on.
Since she started running, she talks on the phone with a lot of people and goes to events, sometimes I go with her.
I would love to see my mom become a Congresswomen. Nobody will do a better job in Congress than my mom. And she told me we can go to Washington DC when she wins.
Thank you for helping her.
EJ

body:
Let us know what you think, Peter!

Peter, It’s no secret that public school teachers in America are underpaid. In fact, nearly 75% of Americans think that teachers are “asked to do too much work for the pay they receive,” according to a recent _NPR_ /Ipsos poll. **What do you think? Should teachers be paid more?** | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66620746/416991626/-1978335139?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzOTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmZmNjM5MzAtYmYyNC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zoE9NwGUn2JuRlpDpk1DUMuiCxxdHgG6yxufcjdbVHk=&emci=f952bbbf-6e22-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=6ff63930-bf24-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=13775345) | [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66620747/416991627/-1978335139?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzOTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmZmNjM5MzAtYmYyNC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zoE9NwGUn2JuRlpDpk1DUMuiCxxdHgG6yxufcjdbVHk=&emci=f952bbbf-6e22-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=6ff63930-bf24-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=13775345)

If you said yes, _Shawn Wilson agrees._
That’s why his vision for Louisiana includes increasing teacher pay to exceed the southern regional average and rewarding improved school performance. It’s all part of his plan for a robust and nationally recognized public school system in Louisiana!

**So please, take a moment to respond: Do you think that public school teachers should be paid more?**

Fellow American,

When I entered this race, I had never run for office before. I didn’t have years of campaigning under my belt, or a list of political donors to help support my campaign.

I bet most grassroots conservatives only knew my name from _Fox News_ appearances.

But now, 4 months after announcing my campaign for President of the United States, I am climbing in the polls - _even polling ahead of a former Vice President, a sitting U.S. Senator, and multiple governors._

I am proud of the outsider campaign we are running. As the first millennial to run for the GOP nomination, I want to foster national pride among young Americans. I want to restore the values that make America great: faith, family, patriotism, and hard work.

We need a PRIME spot on the debate stage to discuss this with voters across the country, and these poll numbers are KEY. But I really need help securing new donors. **[Fellow American, please help however you can to make sure we continue to take on the Washington elites.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=b127b5a8b15f4171b516fffba682a8f4&_e=83gUxsIeYbmfZOPv8UdSgdgmPUlP-7CJiJZtJi2SEimulEEeNkFi3454rleRTPVBFcDREjAn4-dKZGphjUW4DkPG6TNZjgC756DOLXJJ36F41asNhJQe2spdD1fYd9CPJEXKDnD7F0zYN7STZiXU0XJ59wo_dpm6NRdV2taCKEzB2hIBt4_Jf4EgOKkxiTPzkD-w-8p0YDLhggHtSwDWcpR7pcHQi9zEbE0NNX0mdQzwsCexw2mLWeyKqFs5aMScxnwOZ-F-JK_56c6s6eMbhSntwhTgYntARsM_ZishegIY-tz1ZzOcx-qPwybWBR7rn0Wt4pkcz4QkHUt2metELYM5lskwi96PAzlDQDMrW-NCr6EItBb6iYbg5TCDAjnziJH6j1ltIsqEQZL6H10vPw%3D%3D)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Gov. Roy Cooper (via DLCC.org)
subject: re: Republican supermajority
body:
I’m reaching out to you today with a critical message about supermajorities, Democratic leadership, and the importance of building our power at the state level. | | |
---
| | It’s North Carolina Governor Roy Cooper, and I have an important opportunity for you. **I hope you’ll take a moment to hear me out:** As a Democratic Governor in a state with a Republican-controlled legislature, I’m no stranger to tough legislative fights. And as a key supporter in the fight to elect state Democrats in some of the most competitive races on the ballot, I know _you_ aren’t either. In states all across our country, far-right Republican legislators have been waging an all-out assault on our rights, our freedoms, and even our very democracy itself – and in North Carolina, we’re seeing the consequences of these attacks in real time. Only weeks after securing a razor-thin supermajority in the legislature, GOP lawmakers used their power to override my veto with every Republican voting yes (even the Republicans who promised their constituents to protect the right to abortion) and every Democrat voting no. **But they didn’t stop there.** _Now,_ Republicans are trying to game the system to hang on to their supermajority for years to come, creating new barriers to voting rights and giving themselves more power over state elections, all while checking off boxes on their far-right wishlist, including public education cuts and tax breaks for the wealthy. _I refuse to let these attacks go unchecked._ **We need to do everything in our power to break up Republicans’ narrow supermajority – and we’re not too far out of reach: The GOP is clutching on to its veto-proof power with just a _one-seat margin_. ** [Will you chip in $7 right now to expand Democratic power, break up Republican supermajorities, and secure a more progressive future in North Carolina and beyond?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yoKG8CTelWWDHki88pvURt5lFkc261i6fo4fZB1WZBMCpJPdtb5bSu29s_bTjrsO67kVAQwR2nbffpqVywMVrpvf9IevZqGVZFpAejkxO89AUsn6c_VK_zm5P63fb9ssAUdmfBVgMNrxD-UUckSHVohACB8G0HDrCww4j_AFwL9Ejma_F3EB6EuXKyn6y2JklrFfMCXcL9CK8y5sKXTCYKcIP8gccIrwVaUipKRMb8HZ8ARKwo2VCrtTIIAhjhyQHiA_8C_mEaTOJ11kWl7PZpCwwqA_hWsEovr6jTHr4ElVxskw0OFXUZARd8YEHWOoFXk3_B-fjXvnbFMJnnv1JRE2WgEiLR9K-wH0MxjATpEdYNIuLUB-wzcCyHOsAm15bVE6gKXxHSHp0kHn44Jec4B4uMpgKT-fNmBwatqlvPqqCiwXgU-eAn3icUCBx6j-EJqEIjAVXX34eejriP-BA9/3xy/Cla3VDDMRraHfV5aIHv7cQ/h0/PoB1AL1srtesM0IQ-F82XmnRUvNAZPFqD4NI0fP9akQ) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

Republicans aren’t just abusing their power in North Carolina – GOP state legislators are furthering their far-right agendas across the country.
We can fix this problem at the ballot box: By electing Democrats to state legislatures nationwide, we can fight back against Republicans' extreme platform and elect leaders who will fight for a more progressive future in states like yours.
**We’ll need a tidal wave of support to make this vision a reality – and that starts with grassroots Democrats like you stepping up to the plate and investing in this fight.**
