clean_body: I’m reaching out to you today with a critical message about supermajorities, Democratic leadership, and the importance of building our power at the state level. | | | | | It’s North Carolina Governor Roy Cooper, and I have an important opportunity for you. I hope you’ll take a moment to hear me out: As a Democratic Governor in a state with a Republican-controlled legislature, I’m no stranger to tough legislative fights. And as a key supporter in the fight to elect state Democrats in some of the most competitive races on the ballot, I know you aren’t either. In states all across our country, far-right Republican legislators have been waging an all-out assault on our rights, our freedoms, and even our very democracy itself – and in North Carolina, we’re seeing the consequences of these attacks in real time. Only weeks after securing a razor-thin supermajority in the legislature, GOP lawmakers used their power to override my veto with every Republican voting yes (even the Republicans who promised their constituents to protect the right to abortion) and every Democrat voting no. But they didn’t stop there. Now, Republicans are trying to game the system to hang on to their supermajority for years to come, creating new barriers to voting rights and giving themselves more power over state elections, all while checking off boxes on their far-right wishlist, including public education cuts and tax breaks for the wealthy. I refuse to let these attacks go unchecked. We need to do everything in our power to break up Republicans’ narrow supermajority – and we’re not too far out of reach: The GOP is clutching on to its veto-proof power with just a one-seat margin. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Republicans aren’t just abusing their power in North Carolina – GOP state legislators are furthering their far-right agendas across the country. We can fix this problem at the ballot box: By electing Democrats to state legislatures nationwide, we can fight back against Republicans' extreme platform and elect leaders who will fight for a more progressive future in states like yours. We’ll need a tidal wave of support to make this vision a reality – and that starts with grassroots Democrats like you stepping up to the plate and investing in this fight. With gratitude, Roy Cooper Governor, North Carolina | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. LaRose's track record speaks for itself. Just look at his recent sins, team:

LaRose is the same guy at the center of the August 8 special election for Issue 1 — a ballot measure that is a blatant attempt to rig the rules to lock in Ohio's extreme abortion ban and stop efforts to restore our rights.

He's the same guy who recently approved misleading ballot language for Issue 1 _that was so confusing_ the State Supreme Court ordered his office to rewrite it.

And he's the same guy who sent out **wrong** ballot language days before ballots needed to be printed, costing Ohio taxpayers hundreds of thousands of dollars.

**[We can't let a sneaky, manipulative politician like LaRose take this Senate seat. Will you split a donation between Ohio Democrats and Sherrod Brown right away to help us fight back?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66620996/416992533/-1000558387?refcode=em23_230715_larose_fndd_gq_act___todp_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230715_larose_fndd_gq_act___todp_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=6a487bdd-bf24-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTQ4N2JkZC1iZjI0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ONqBP2CVgK-LSWLeiP0CCqcCBFJk918e4v1tQ2u0fwA=)**

body:
You’ve been handpicked as one of our top supporters »
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49626?t=6&akid=9203%2E878179%2Ep4Auht) **Listen, President Biden has been an INCREDIBLE President and defender of our democracy.** [**So you’ve been personally selected to sign our letter thanking President Biden for fighting for the American people! Please, we need 10,000 signatures by midnight to demonstrate massive support! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49626?t=7&akid=9203%2E878179%2Ep4Auht) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49626?t=8&akid=9203%2E878179%2Ep4Auht)
---
TO: President Biden
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you. **Dear President Biden,**

**_I’m so thankful for everything you’ve done as President!_**

Over the last two and a half years, you’ve fought TIRELESSLY for the American people — defending abortion rights, confirming an incredible Supreme Court Justice, saving Social Security from GOP cuts, and creating millions of jobs.

**I know standing up to MAGA Republican attacks isn’t easy, especially now that Donald Trump is running for President again.**

So as your reelection race kicks into high gear, I wanted to show my support and thank you for being such an amazing leader for our country! [**I hope you know that there are MILLIONS of us across the nation who stand with you. That’s why I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to Voter Protection Project to thank you and to keep electing incredible Democrats up and down the ballot »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49626?t=9&akid=9203%2E878179%2Ep4Auht) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49626?t=10&akid=9203%2E878179%2Ep4Auht)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

body:

| |

| | | | | | | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=510eed76cea74aa3adc34c1a04295118&_e=8QYuvtuVI1mHF7YcHhfpPy3EbYn9jb6CzZLADizA6t471uUD4yKcZbL-YLyQB2ohH8TOtZLRCxDX8WAVo1LDzp11EuyKy6DIqsF_co6szozcVkwE1meSEGzitfa44FaWS53e3DcZ9BoZ1Hmiv7ycSdoe-afc6n-2rMSMhrkZw6M8eBfDDlpdEOzB2oCXYdA-ef1RTLAbzWYjqcerxWs7Lixx8DYv4HAF7Vcquz_xnGGaG-Vz8V77cWjm9BFMj05O67-EYr4GNGvbhdiR-OGonLdHHBH5kK_TrVX0XC7lWkA8xSzIBJ1zY6FyUlGvbCpt-6CVa61nhoylp7XmnovaZOAlRJJMmqyDRVQb3UF897YJWJW8uGDwGbaQOiT2pkpZfss2RJtkZzfeE-JU0i3NYWoIvo-4ycE7YQfnyVp2FH2viDxJQgX_ztU_y3SIW-np-pBqrGAI5lXYQQli0LL1ulVpSBWwauzOGt5Tl137DDM%3D)

**MARK ROBINSON RESPONDS AFTER RADICAL DEMOCRATS CALL ON HIM TO RESIGN**
---

In 2020 we made American history & humiliated the radical Democrats when I became the first black Lt. Governor of North Carolina.

**But because I 'm a conservative that blows a hole in their sacred narrative, they called on me to step down before I was sworn in and they called for my impeachment after I took the oath of office. **

Those calls continue to this day- and that is all they will ever be.

And now I'm the leading conservative candidate running for Governor of North Carolina.

Every poll shows this is going to be the closest race in America.

But Joe Biden & the liberal elite are spending millions to permanently end my candidacy because of who I am & what I represent. My existence as a black conservative enrages them.

They hate that I was able to pick myself up by my bootstraps to pursue the American Dream & determine my own destiny.

**They hate that the first black Governor of North Carolina could be a Republican like me & with your support today, it most certainly will.**
**[SUPPORT MARK ROBINSON FOR GOVERNOR](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=510eed76cea74aa3adc34c1a04295118&_e=8QYuvtuVI1mHF7YcHhfpPy3EbYn9jb6CzZLADizA6t471uUD4yKcZbL-YLyQB2ohH8TOtZLRCxDX8WAVo1LDzp11EuyKy6DIqsF_co6szozcVkwE1meSEGzitfa44FaWS53e3DcZ9BoZ1Hmiv7ycSdoe-afc6n-2rMSMhrkZw6M8eBfDDlpdEOzB2oCXYdA-ef1RTLAbzWYjqcerxWs7Lixx8DYv4HAF7Vcquz_xnGGaG-Vz8V77cWjm9BFMj05O67-EYr4GNGvbhdiR-OGonLdHHBH5kK_TrVX0XC7lWkA8xSzIBJ1zY6FyUlGvbCpt-6CVa61nhoylp7XmnovaZH3G9dC217_E-NCTnMOTDLeJ2ejlA3b8jGdGEnlY2RcqHvTvr3MHLRdBghAoBXh7Ya0IkIccmvYfn0da1Py9P_0FQUU_pzmlF_bFQHlo2s76WYF73Xu2O_kTjoTAGjHoQB9yyMPRb0UGYgjshzE6STA%3D)**
---

I won't beat around the bush a minute more- this is the most important battleground race in the nation & together we can deliver Joe Biden & the liberal narrative a humiliating & historic upset.

**So I 'm humbly asking if you'll support me with your kindness & generosity just one more time before Biden & the Democrat machine hit us with their million dollar advertising blitz to end my candidacy.**
**[SUPPORT MARK ROBINSON FOR GOVERNOR](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=510eed76cea74aa3adc34c1a04295118&_e=8QYuvtuVI1mHF7YcHhfpPy3EbYn9jb6CzZLADizA6t471uUD4yKcZbL-YLyQB2ohH8TOtZLRCxDX8WAVo1LDzp11EuyKy6DIqsF_co6szozcVkwE1meSEGzitfa44FaWS53e3DcZ9BoZ1Hmiv7ycSdoe-afc6n-2rMSMhrkZw6M8eBfDDlpdEOzB2oCXYdA-ef1RTLAbzWYjqcerxWs7Lixx8DYv4HAF7Vcquz_xnGGaG-Vz8V77cWjm9BFMj05O67-EYr4GNGvbhdiR-OGonLdHHBH5kK_TrVX0XC7lWkA8xSzIBJ1zY6FyUlGvbCpt-6CVa61nhoylp7XmnovaZPvEneDCa8obQcIEjY8dqNj7horilJP0svTbqKoP-o58ryf_ZRQkoOw-Z4aJjOTImSl9nOpgzlVN-re2DlOlRBqdUKWPFv7taUBXP82IEdQXVsYL4hrS4prd2ZUZTUrRx9hHGnknnfK3E2Xw_y7ODUo%3D)**
---

This is the most important race in the nation & this is the most impactful thing you can do to help us make history & defeat Joe Biden.

THANK YOU.

-Mark Robinson

name: Senator Rick Scott
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,
---
I want to take a moment to personally thank you for all you’ve done for our campaign so far.

From the Governor’s mansion in Florida to the Senate, nothing I’ve done would be possible without the generous and steadfast support of patriots like you.

You’ve been an incredible part of our team, but with so much noise out there, I want to take a moment to remind you what we’re fighting for. For too long, politicians have used the same playbook.

They cut mediocre deals, enjoy the perks of office, and answer to their friends in special interest groups instead of their constituents.

__**That’s not me.**_ _

I’m not afraid to do what’s right for America, whether it’s taking on those in power or making hard choices when it comes to spending.

I’m not going to lie, that’s made me a lot of enemies in Washington...but, my job is to fight for YOU in the Senate, not the DC establishment.
[**Now, I need your help to keep our fight going.**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=97dfcd20091c444a86ca7dfae0a81ed7&_e=brDNqLpCW-rk8NfOy8OFc0Fziv3EE5VkKmNwc94uQ5b5V6gJQnu0z5PcNYW-zwKDzaAsqpaLDjHXp-TQh-13PERCxYanKVwnTlgEMmgnG-cLcbSEPh9keTT4WFAp95QlhQBumGQo5y1S-lruQqaCwJiAw9xm6sOKkBJCCrHkD9pyCfzqOQez3NgE9KnEDpY3laYeC67wDE-dvZG3f-pNJYPIYCPK5J1DvIfOQLK2K0-Y4V-6c_aP8KuNuAOOur3A-KFf_eTYE4H5omOwWs3eJtfdbQz5YT87DXMnlzfi9ABDXWwnGX5Dy9bq9icdFmFjz9b4qT8JCV_qy1nckGsGmCy4t9LCR2qQT5aP2QvZoqmIK1qCPt1yOAvFlCXswkzp)__

I’m up for re-election next year, and the last time I ran for Senate, we won by less than 1% of the vote.

_And this year, it could be even closer._

**I can’t count on Washington’s special interest groups to help us, and that’s why you are so important to this campaign.**

[**Can you pitch in now and help us fuel our fight for 2024?**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=97dfcd20091c444a86ca7dfae0a81ed7&_e=brDNqLpCW-rk8NfOy8OFc0Fziv3EE5VkKmNwc94uQ5b5V6gJQnu0z5PcNYW-zwKDzaAsqpaLDjHXp-TQh-13PERCxYanKVwnTlgEMmgnG-cLcbSEPh9keTT4WFAp95QlhQBumGQo5y1S-lruQqaCwJiAw9xm6sOKkBJCCrHkD9pyCfzqOQez3NgE9KnEDpY3laYeC67wDE-dvZG3f-pNJYPIYCPK5J1DvIfOQLK2K0_Qtzd81gff4Dyb0nXrDdHU3_lGyqarOML17VxT65ZAjVj9ek2E78vui-ppcVPicYvlcrO5ohDidcqMcyutAGDAuh2F23pTekNJeRVDIqwKU-e7mXLBN-F0OhCqX4vh2INqYofwq_7boDkzHPy5w1Zr)
---
| | [**DONATE TO HELP WIN FLORIDA & TAKE BACK THE SENATE**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=97dfcd20091c444a86ca7dfae0a81ed7&_e=brDNqLpCW-rk8NfOy8OFc0Fziv3EE5VkKmNwc94uQ5b5V6gJQnu0z5PcNYW-zwKDzaAsqpaLDjHXp-TQh-13PERCxYanKVwnTlgEMmgnG-cLcbSEPh9keTT4WFAp95QlhQBumGQo5y1S-lruQqaCwJiAw9xm6sOKkBJCCrHkD9pyCfzqOQez3NgE9KnEDpY3laYeC67wDE-dvZG3f-pNJYPIYCPK5J1DvIfOQLK2K0_dJXsa9WY7gVMz7p4i1T46_BoPFXp39zaVnmipcEpl7zqHWgb6kn89tbLevjWy1OPQSpcxIT6VVPDmG3vVez6ESI6tLzrv-mubEKTeyB35u1QvEsYFGyLW5ri9EEtmgeMTIP8CVLcKOl09inxPpMIK)

clean_body: | | | Peter, I want to take a moment to personally thank you for all you’ve done for our campaign so far. From the Governor’s mansion in Florida to the Senate, nothing I’ve done would be possible without the generous and steadfast support of patriots like you. You’ve been an incredible part of our team, but with so much noise out there, I want to take a moment to remind you what we’re fighting for. For too long, politicians have used the same playbook. They cut mediocre deals, enjoy the perks of office, and answer to their friends in special interest groups instead of their constituents. That’s not me. I’m not afraid to do what’s right for America, whether it’s taking on those in power or making hard choices when it comes to spending. I’m not going to lie, that’s made me a lot of enemies in Washington...but, my job is to fight for YOU in the Senate, not the DC establishment. I’m up for re-election next year, and the last time I ran for Senate, we won by less than 1% of the vote. And this year, it could be even closer. I can’t count on Washington’s special interest groups to help us, and that’s why you are so important to this campaign. | | | | Thank you, Senator Rick Scott | | | A message for you, from Senator Rick Scott: Joe Biden’s America includes record high inflation, open borders, unlimited spending, and increasing crime. Defeating the radical Left has never been more important and it will be no easy task. Peter, with your support, I can continue to protect our Conservative values. I can’t do it without patriots like you, so Thank you for your support, Senator Rick Scott | | Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida | | Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Reverse ‘money machines’ popping up across America
body:
You probably haven't seen one of these - YET.

| Dear Reader, You probably haven't seen one of these - YET. But you will soon. Machines like the one in this picture are popping up all across America. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6c582fc38f154a27a3ac8445b6793e41&_e=JhkRJmv35sJJWI2IBud5ykHK3QO7Ar4tZeWDJ5OBdb_EI0wc3NbeQNUw-zyFywq2ovoFRXrlb-9kSAUV1W_3OxWTqlLcwudFN3MVwuiM7-9yTiSt1vRbmhqNRO-1ib1j-V4dnhSWydh1V37MdsMASH6roEQvNQtD-MXQdyCWTgZbttQErcLoOFQ8zo75qrYeWipOW0kqvkr4DsC4PM6XVzzMB9hFPAxB8GBxr-R_euM2IkTpilOCIn3rW6skiy5xjnfLLQvpUuCLeAJEf8Ol2Kn79Md_2JowrJFBtNONKQ4%3D) If you've been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you've almost certainly walked by one without knowing. The experts are calling it a 'Reverse ATM'. According to the _New York Post_ , restaurants and other businesses are using them to avoid handling cash. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6c582fc38f154a27a3ac8445b6793e41&_e=JhkRJmv35sJJWI2IBud5ykHK3QO7Ar4tZeWDJ5OBdb_EI0wc3NbeQNUw-zyFywq2ovoFRXrlb-9kSAUV1W_3OxWTqlLcwudFN3MVwuiM7-9yTiSt1vRbmhqNRO-1ib1j-V4dnhSWydh1V37MdsMASLilY9e-sT8bzS6kSbl9H29q6I3RoZLWMY6IggfKip55QFNdWmJ2Cvq_qJdTG9r6H8hMG89BKn0F4Lgz9aNwxlKH_LijTKgRD8qSJVxnpfvcP0iBXlJaf2CGyt_ewQJYGmQyd9EKukt2dg6JkGuOLmk%3D) They've been installed at places like Citizen's Bank Ballpark in Philadelphia... Miami International Airport... They've even been used at the Super Bowl. Why are these machines suddenly appearing out of nowhere? And what does it mean for your money? I recently arranged an interview with former Goldman Sachs managing director, Dr. Nomi Prins, to get her take. There's nobody in America who's more aware of the inner workings of the banking system. In the interview, Dr. Prins explained these strange 'reverse ATMs.' And she said she expects them to play a key role this Summer as our nation's financial system is overhauled for the first time since 1971. According to her research, many Americans will be blindsided by what's to come. BUT, folks who understand the 'Reverse ATM' phenomenon before it becomes obvious to the average American could actually profit in the weeks ahead. Dr. Prins accurately predicted the 2008 crash, the lockdown crash, and connected the dots between the White House and the Federal Reserve. And now, she says:
> "My research shows the Fed is installing the infrastructure for a massive overhaul to our financial system, and I expect it to go live by the end of July. In other words, time is short."
To help folks prepare, she's recorded a briefing that explains exactly what she sees coming, how it will play out, and how much time you have to prepare. [Click here now to see Dr. Prins' free presentation.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6c582fc38f154a27a3ac8445b6793e41&_e=JhkRJmv35sJJWI2IBud5ykHK3QO7Ar4tZeWDJ5OBdb_EI0wc3NbeQNUw-zyFywq2ovoFRXrlb-9kSAUV1W_3OxWTqlLcwudFN3MVwuiM7-9yTiSt1vRbmhqNRO-1ib1j-V4dnhSWydh1V37MdsMASJoqmR9gghdHYdK5_PtNir_D1mV51cJn-KaxlVdRM5SyjTAsGvX_nmuzP92qoNFVa0qyKn721INieMRr6MVjO_PkjS16L4ntWzO_nQ-oapuKIDv7eeHkqH6cTzzsTqpsDODK0eVVdBaPuzvfuYyXBMU%3D) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar overhaul to the financial system, folks who stayed on the sidelines lost almost everything. But folks who acted quickly had the opportunity to rescue their retirement accounts before they were decimated. [Click here to see how.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6c582fc38f154a27a3ac8445b6793e41&_e=JhkRJmv35sJJWI2IBud5ykHK3QO7Ar4tZeWDJ5OBdb_EI0wc3NbeQNUw-zyFywq2ovoFRXrlb-9kSAUV1W_3OxWTqlLcwudFN3MVwuiM7-9yTiSt1vRbmhqNRO-1ib1j-V4dnhSWydh1V37MdsMASA2XSPPbSh1PFBgfF4se4XIMYmbq6Rp6XCpSnuF2_OK2icHzT70iQcA6RoNw04JF_9AMuU_mpzHcqCIPGQy7cMDSNqm0dT_8Oxn9SleJLvMJRnyo8RB8zo2npNmlwUfyV_DJ5ZL8DxR3yxpxSf-4yfE%3D)
---

name: Josh Shapiro
subject: 6 months ago:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
Today marks exactly 6 months since I was sworn in as Pennsylvania’s 48th Governor.

Derek, today marks exactly 6 months since I was sworn in as Pennsylvania’s 48th Governor.

In that time, we’ve faced unprecedented challenges, but we’ve gotten through them together. We’ve also made historic progress in the fight to open up the doors of opportunity to every Pennsylvanian.

**I’m honored and humbled to wake up every day with the opportunity to serve, and I know our work is just beginning. So today, Derek, I want to say thank you. I would not be here without your support, and I hope I can count on you as we continue forging ahead. Sincerely,

Josh

P.S. Below is the note I sent on the day I was sworn in. I wanted to share it with you again, because my words are just as true today as they were then, and I’m grateful you are on this team.

\-------- Forwarded Message --------

From: Josh Shapiro
Subject: The honor of a lifetime
Date: January 17, 2023

Derek,

This morning, I took the oath of office and was sworn in as Pennsylvania's 48th Governor.

As I addressed the people of our Commonwealth, I talked about some of the stories I heard as I traveled across Pennsylvania these last two years. Stories of people who inspired me, who taught me. Stories that have driven me to serve.

Stories from people like the grandmom in Lawrence County who told me not to let us go back to what it was like before Roe.

Stories from people like Tim, who did backbreaking work on our roadways, just to have company executives steal his hard-earned benefits.

I’m mindful of the fact that folks shared those stories — thousands of you, all across our Commonwealth — because you believe I can make a difference for you.

Derek, I’m truly humbled that the people of Pennsylvania have entrusted me with that responsibility. Not just the responsibility to serve as your 48th Governor, but the responsibility to stand up for what’s right, to bring people together, and to get real things done.

The people have given us a clear mandate. Not just by virtue of the historic number of votes for our campaign, but by the way we all came together — by what that number represents. Democrats, Republicans, Independents, rural, urban, and suburban voters from across the Commonwealth.

You sent a clear message when you came together to resoundingly reject extremism.

Together, hope defeated fear.

Unity triumphed over division.

We proved that we value our freedoms, and we’re willing to do the hard work necessary to protect our fundamental rights.

And so, with my faith firmly rooted in we the people of Pennsylvania, with my heart open to others and my eyes fixed ahead, I am prepared to do my part to move our Commonwealth forward.

Thank you for all the support you’ve provided along the way, my friend. Together, we’re going to build on this historic coalition and get big things done for Pennsylvania.

With gratitude,

Josh Shapiro
Governor of Pennsylvania

clean_body: Today marks exactly 6 months since I was sworn in as Pennsylvania’s 48th Governor. Derek, today marks exactly 6 months since I was sworn in as Pennsylvania’s 48th Governor. In that time, we’ve faced unprecedented challenges, but we’ve gotten through them together. We’ve also made historic progress in the fight to open up the doors of opportunity to every Pennsylvanian. I’m honored and humbled to wake up every day with the opportunity to serve, and I know our work is just beginning. So today, Derek, I want to say thank you. I would not be here without your support, and I hope I can count on you as we continue forging ahead. As we mark this historic milestone, chip in to help us keep fighting for every Pennsylvanian: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Sincerely, Josh P.S. Below is the note I sent on the day I was sworn in. I wanted to share it with you again, because my words are just as true today as they were then, and I’m grateful you are on this team. \-------- Forwarded Message -------- From: Josh Shapiro Subject: The honor of a lifetime Date: January 17, 2023 Derek, This morning, I took the oath of office and was sworn in as Pennsylvania's 48th Governor. As I addressed the people of our Commonwealth, I talked about some of the stories I heard as I traveled across Pennsylvania these last two years. Stories of people who inspired me, who taught me. Stories that have driven me to serve. Stories from people like the grandmom in Lawrence County who told me not to let us go back to what it was like before Roe. Stories from people like Tim, who did backbreaking work on our roadways, just to have company executives steal his hard-earned benefits. I’m mindful of the fact that folks shared those stories — thousands of you, all across our Commonwealth — because you believe I can make a difference for you. Derek, I’m truly humbled that the people of Pennsylvania have entrusted me with that responsibility. Not just the responsibility to serve as your 48th Governor, but the responsibility to stand up for what’s right, to bring people together, and to get real things done. The people have given us a clear mandate. Not just by virtue of the historic number of votes for our campaign, but by the way we all came together — by what that number represents. Democrats, Republicans, Independents, rural, urban, and suburban voters from across the Commonwealth. You sent a clear message when you came together to resoundingly reject extremism. Together, hope defeated fear. Unity triumphed over division. We proved that we value our freedoms, and we’re willing to do the hard work necessary to protect our fundamental rights. And so, with my faith firmly rooted in we the people of Pennsylvania, with my heart open to others and my eyes fixed ahead, I am prepared to do my part to move our Commonwealth forward. Thank you for all the support you’ve provided along the way, my friend. Together, we’re going to build on this historic coalition and get big things done for Pennsylvania. With gratitude, Josh Shapiro Governor of Pennsylvania | = | | | = Text JOSH to 32210 By participating, you agree to the for recurring autodialed marketing messages from Josh Shapiro to the phone number you provide. No consent required to buy. Msg&data rates may apply. PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA Thank you for supporting Josh Shapiro's campaign. name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7185d8be7a11499d822472823345900d&_e=YB5-5_KJ29i8VCNPYG_CY-ko7PbBAll0mmzgXi6MjYPajtJrEFNslZcdotz1UzySj6-OQ5yIobW2uceoKgRz3BlSjlPbv7md6h6z13-rvO2RY4Etl8ZBrfNyLbuRdVZYGh151WtEW71eNYbRWH2VlDmo2DOQ7nSy-auyClX5C-ewiSw1djnVmakghc0euFYbX-gj2d0pEpuREGQxb6pBgQigflqbfFfXNZyjyfI51q9t3mfT1GbW4bjeC8xWMgQgpgF5jK_cpo28mkpP-LMFVQ%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7185d8be7a11499d822472823345900d&_e=YB5-5_KJ29i8VCNPYG_CY-ko7PbBAll0mmzgXi6MjYPajtJrEFNslZcdotz1UzySj6-OQ5yIobW2uceoKgRz3BlSjlPbv7md6h6z13-rvO2RY4Etl8ZBrfNyLbuRdVZYoWfNaSJzk4omQGHbY6KaTjdgs6jM66dO2tnmuP-HiJoZvLz4InsM8Ejm6KBSEOl5vYUBq8OeclhJ8jzNrfqVVaiCOgVxAp1iiTxqJOGOv1AB24zIrKmADkLEFFL9isStkLVDuU9Dsn1LaJCvcVsmfg%3D%3D)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7185d8be7a11499d822472823345900d&_e=YB5-5_KJ29i8VCNPYG_CY-ko7PbBAll0mmzgXi6MjYPajtJrEFNslZcdotz1UzySj6-OQ5yIobW2uceoKgRz3BlSjlPbv7md6h6z13-rvO2RY4Etl8ZBrfNyLbuRdVZYkuNST3yfvZtZEMfsmWHohgB-QDV8TOxRHoWbR3yoG4FYiGRy8BEjcdKim5gxhr2AacLkVeLdO0Kt3BiCCVQD8KHoj851Nb8HXKcxvj-oRPrbbaLhwrtfzVXBFuTTiUssNCLXYbOGJhxHzLoDbTxvPA%3D%3D)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[** _Donate Now >>_**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7185d8be7a11499d822472823345900d&_e=YB5-5_KJ29i8VCNPYG_CY-ko7PbBAll0mmzgXi6MjYPajtJrEFNslZcdotz1UzySj6-OQ5yIobW2uceoKgRz3BlSjlPbv7md6h6z13-rvO2RY4Etl8ZBrfNyLbuRdVZYuXVc0hWt7HwrqvrZHLJ96Jlrksg3FXWz9zmzk2Dn3WJDpKnYQkDjz01NUoxip3b-anfh_A4eJHML7TQw3H_Y4vM940uzDrAyMjEXPBplL4oFAU-0wKscMxqzwbkzzRuQtaJLUqFMv90LiOqF-_5V1A%3D%3D)

clean_body: Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? Friend, Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? They sing the national anthem. And they have sung this song proudly every night for more than 700 straight nights. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag. We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no " deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. It's time to act and help to support these families. My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families? Click below to show your support today! Support the January 6th Families Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donor Status: MISSING Goal: 1,000 Donors I launched the Kash Foundation to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself. I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out. Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. Please hurry. And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored. For Freedom, Kash Patel The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible. Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

clean_body: Your response represents every Republican in your state. The most important thing our Party must do is elect a REPUBLICAN to the White House AND elect a REPUBLICAN Majority to the United States Senate, Friend. The chaos and ineptitude of Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and their cronies in the Senate have devastated our once GREAT country. Loyal grassroots supporters like you can be the difference between putting CONSERVATIVES back in charge to restore American greatness or potentially losing the Senate to Chuck Schumer, Adam Schiff and other radical Socialists forever. That's why I'm asking if you will take one of the most important surveys to date: I don't think I can stress to you just how important this is, Friend. We have ALL felt the horrible effects of the Biden-Harris "agenda," and this may be our LAST CHANCE to correct it. ****************************************************************************************************** Senate Republicans asked me to review responses from our top patriots in every state across the country, and YOUR answer via the Presidential Canvass has been selected for review. Please don 't wait too long before I'm forced to move on to the next patriot in your state". Thank you, Kellyanne Conway ****************************************************************************************************** | Paid for by the NRSC. Friend,

We get this question a lot.

**" Where is my money going?"**

Well -- it's pretty simple, so let us help clear the air.

**1\. Every dollar you contribute helps us show America that conservatives have the grassroots momentum to win our elections in 2024.** Every contribution and donor that contributes to our cause let the left know Americans are FED UP with their mismanagement of our nation. [**A gift of $1, or ANYTHING, helps show America that conservatives are READY for what 's coming. **](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=406ccf35162346ea9c8390491816672d&_e=Nfu8GWux78UfFKuDZRQ1fxnpspWR9hu_gfFkti5EsY1fBWsiYba-V5dVjBO_Xdih_zaQTrQX1YOzetVEIdvtnO1sCPO1thA9AJx_dlUjFwNfnnmG7_MrHycmUrRfzQPky-a8UtW82OqGcdhs9cNyCMt-6ym9EkcQPqs4g3_vC9eyhbypTgdXl2tDlW9HLyHntR5DLQqm_KWQDVG3OY_-_lXttce_WO6AU-ltgCHTxbcFSR6dpZJXUQpEXVDkE5svlVb29rDQ9Et_MYMUrAYrDBcIBE8bLhk9tZ1QKYiHkhFn0Cw89iDGCiL6w2HbF4vR)

**2\. Your contribution enables us to launch MASSIVE on-the-ground operations to invigorate entire communities to VOTE in the next election.** Your money is used to help ensure conservatives across KEY BATTLEGROUND STATES are ready and able to WIN the upcoming election.

3\. The fact of the matter is campaigns cost money -- a lot of money. Your donation will help us fight until Election Day. [**Contributions of any amount help us buy yard signs, keep campaign offices running, and empower volunteers and operatives to spread our message across America.**](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=406ccf35162346ea9c8390491816672d&_e=Nfu8GWux78UfFKuDZRQ1fxnpspWR9hu_gfFkti5EsY1fBWsiYba-V5dVjBO_Xdih_zaQTrQX1YOzetVEIdvtnO1sCPO1thA9AJx_dlUjFwNfnnmG7_MrHycmUrRfzQPky-a8UtW82OqGcdhs9cNyCMt-6ym9EkcQPqs4g3_vC9eKEwfJmrtkQN2MiXDj1uMz6kcuPUblGipWzTwXHw0okLMAxfsoqnB8b_Wrf67DNQpLw11ci7i8n6uZ1MaiwDp41EvFttLlODPWPO-zm6h5RM7RQzuFxafsPmcV-pDodl_Jnan1E_A6ifCtFAWP_bUB) | [ **CONTRIBUTE HERE** ](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=406ccf35162346ea9c8390491816672d&_e=Nfu8GWux78UfFKuDZRQ1fxnpspWR9hu_gfFkti5EsY1fBWsiYba-V5dVjBO_Xdih_zaQTrQX1YOzetVEIdvtnO1sCPO1thA9AJx_dlUjFwNfnnmG7_MrHycmUrRfzQPkp_TAui3IXyQw2tOk4GmVUhxFlVEnZuYBBWx08QdnWNiYm5eaPJzdTH-tHWlboUqSNfyCqoU7oDdxz9jxxUm_tSR-oCOqdUplv6nWKGqKzHZulFNbxu4ggyxSyVjbYt_tjxUjASRGs_egy1Ptl5n9SxTDiBN8YM80dblUHQ8ia5Q%3D)

clean_body: It's ours. | | | This isn't Trump's party, it's ours, Folks. I am working to elect Chris Christie because I believe in his policies and his leadership. He has repeatedly said there aren't two roads to the presidential nomination, just one,and it goes straight through Trump. Chris Christie is taking on Trump because he believes in truth, he believes in America, and has a plan to bring us back to prosperity. Thank you, MariaTeam Christie | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---

name: Rep. John Ray Clemmons
subject: Fighting for a safer Tennessee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Gloria Johnson Treasurer
body:
https://tnhousedems.com/ [https://tnhousedems.com/]
Hi Peter,
We are nearly a month away from the proposed special legislative session announced by Governor Bill Lee. While I remain hopeful this session will be officially called by the governor, we must face the reality of the TN GOP and their stubborn refusal to take even the smallest steps toward making Tennessee communities safer from gun violence.
House Democrats will continue to fight for Tennessee’s families and challenge GOP legislators who remain determined to ignore Tennesseeans calling for change. To be more effective, we must grow our numbers in the legislature and break the supermajority if we are to have any hope of a better future for Tennessee families.
Invest in our effort to grow our Democratic Caucus and break the Republican supermajority today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tnhousedems2023]
Your investment allows us to do what we need to be successful and elect state legislators who will support common sense gun reform. A safer Tennessee is within reach if we work to elect Democratic candidates across the state in 2024. Thank you for standing with us in this fight.
Rep. John Ray Clemmons
State Representative
Caucus Chairman
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tnhousedems2023]
Paid for by Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Gloria Johnson Treasurer
Tennessee House Democratic Caucus
P. O. Box 198082
Nashville, TN 37219
United States

name: Kash Patel
subject: New J6 Choir song with Donald Trump
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zervnv7a1ckqfi5ink0f5motujb8g4pgqg7apfmo_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdh6eor4cth2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9sqegg5o8pamma7oklc3fmlneoc07jmchnmjaf8_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdh6eor4cth2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zl1hopah8b1q00sbilgfbub849hfcg427f0prlp8_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdh6eor4cth2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[** _Donate Now >>_**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zau4uea5qm6kae0s816afflg69un495j5fdu0ako_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdh6eor4cth2bs)

**[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfmogepoi7tl271qbthp1rnqk1lse97f935o7ih8_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdh6eor4cth2bs)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zm1cv27f38k27aqnntjcisromami17i5og281ai0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdh6eor4cth2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z91539ka6rn3najgvjtmofl0mqe5cp41g48f5ovo_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdh6eor4cth2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zcroh4ufc51q7a3k5ot9ar2bepnu9al7et67pdqg_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdh6eor4cth2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqub8uhuq79dc7s1b2s9fbgr6ibqoga4kdj2gddg_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdh6eor4cth2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zpbvgun8t1798kj6o7ur7dbugtolnsugehimkn7o_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdh6eor4cth2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zg22v3hs97m1v1qnhd1bf9dobrmi73hjak48nnoo_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdh6eor4cth2bs)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zr65qqro65meoslu5e6ma55gpi68vsa7228sl28o_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdh6eor4cth2bs)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z06osmovijg9ejml2b150cig78occuqth91cnv5g_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdh6eor4cth2bs)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3gcbuaq353rpndsfe4hb3kfc953q6c3s5tgqpo8_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdh6eor4cth2bs)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zs1m4bcrqlrv9d0e4i7g0bj69jkci1cdvnnu5hco_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdh6eor4cth2bs)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

_The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible._

American Defense News

name: Tony Vargas
subject: my heart just sank
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Vargas for Congress
body:
|
---

| | I just received an emergency phone call that made my heart sink. Kevin McCarthy just jetted into Nebraska -- mere days after I launched my campaign -- to pick up a massive campaign check and swiftly sabotage my chances of unseating Don Bacon. [**I’ll repeat that: Unless I can respond ASAP, our chance to kick Don Bacon out of office and win back the House for Democrats will be ripped away in an instant.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66621969/416996955/1698358150?refcode=20230717_em_fr_b1_tony_30&amount=15&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDBiMjA2MS1jMzI0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vSsezrqSWu9Z7bJeAB9cOMv5thoneufx8FOdYbvC4OE=) [**_I hate to alarm you, but if I get buried under McCarthy’s cash, my chance to win could be over before it begins. I refuse to let MAGA Republicans buy Bacon another term in power. But I only have until 11:59pm today to raise $12,500 to counter their attacks. So I’m asking: Is there any way I could count on your immediate $15 to rescue our historic chance to win this race? I have never needed your help more than I do in this moment. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66621970/416996957/1698358150?refcode=20230717_em_fr_b1_tony_30&amount=15&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDBiMjA2MS1jMzI0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vSsezrqSWu9Z7bJeAB9cOMv5thoneufx8FOdYbvC4OE=) I can’t overstate how important your support is. name: Hearing Aid Advice
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade yet...
body:
Dr. Marco Vietor and Paul Crusius have been creating successful businesses since college.

| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpa7vra0jv9v9ebhhqsldo8oso90qe1ran7ihbr8_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdh6eor4cth2bs)
---
| 2 Germans are crushing the market with these powerful hearing aids
---
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5d4r2kt7m9ddotfgengea4cbi9t9ksab7fd4vmg_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdh6eor4cth2bs)
Dr. Marco Vietor and Paul Crusius have been creating successful businesses since college. Now they lead hear.com, the fastest growing hearing aid company in the world. This is their story.

Let's be honest, very few people want to wear hearing aids. Although there have been huge breakthroughs in technology, most people don't use them simply because they are still big and ugly. However, Dr. Marco Vietor and Paul Crusius wanted to change this perception with **a revolutionary device developed with top German hearing aid engineers** formerly from Siemens. After many years of research and development, this team of engineers came up with a game-changing hearing aid that's completely crushing the market with powerful German technology.

**The result:** A hearing device that packs cutting-edge technology in a design so small, it completely disappears inside the ear. It's called the Horizon Mini by hear.com.
[Check if you qualify](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zovq0eockbpemqjc1a8domo432purt852nh56pv0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdh6eor4cth2bs)
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdau5pd4prvj7icg6ca8uj59rj3dsu5e2388voa8_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdh6eor4cth2bs)
Horizon Mini comes with smartphone connectivity, allowing you to control the device with your iPhone or Android. In addition, this new device uses a unique algorithm that is clinically proven to deliver better than normal hearing. You will notice remarkable improvements in your ability to clearly understand speech, even in noisy environments like a busy restaurant.

Limited no-risk trials now available

It's really no surprise that this level of innovation is changing lives all over the world. People are experiencing the everyday benefits of this amazing device with hear.com's **45-day no-risk trial.**
[Check if you qualify](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgql56c0e8gdbf9obod3av3ico00d4fmq4it9jrg_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdh6eor4cth2bs)

name: Rubio, Marco
subject: Ignore if you can’t handle this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rubio Victory Committee
body:
Please read this message to the end, but only if you’re prepared to handle the reality of our situation.

| |
---
| | | It's Marco. Please read this message to the end, but only if you’re prepared to handle the reality of our situation. With only about 30% of folks opening these messages, I believe that by opening this, you’re someone who can handle it. I know it's hard to tell fact from fiction these days, but I’m going to level with you and tell you the truth.

On top of only about 30% of our friends opening these messages, only about 1% will go the extra mile by donating. Conservatives like me rely on emails, texts, mail, and phone calls to raise money for our cause, so I'm humbly asking you to read this all the way through. If you still think your $1 doesn't matter, then I want to simply thank you for hearing me out.

**Here's the truth...**

The Democrats stopped our Red Wave in 2022, and we need every little bit if we want to fund the programs needed to win in 2024 - and we need it today.

I don't have deep-pocketed billionaires I can call on to hit these goals. I rely on a couple of bucks here and there from hard-working Americans receiving these messages when they can afford it.

**If everyone reading this chipped in just a little bit, we would be able to reach our goals and keep up with the Democrats' millions raised. I know it's not much, but all I need from you today is the price of a cup of coffee, a candy bar, or a donut.**
---
| | [I’LL CHIP IN, MARCO!](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662889%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=B1mOpl3Z%2bxDtGdRMyDsA1A&sysid=1 "I’LL
CHIP IN, MARCO!")
---
_**[The Democrats rely on megadonors who give thousands at a time, but I rely on folks like you who can give $10, $13, or even $26.25 to fuel our fight to restore the American Dream.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662880%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fA%2b7lsCDU8IxODOavjsxeQ&sysid=1 "The Democrats rely on
megadonors who give thousands at a time, but I rely on folks like you who can give
$10, $13, or even $26.25 to fuel our fight to restore the American Dream.")**_
_Democrats are hoping I give up on you.

They're hoping you give up on me.

They're hoping both of us give up on conservative values altogether._
We can't let them run this country into the ground. I'm rolling up my sleeves and continuing to fight for hard-working families like yours - making our country better, stronger, and safer.

_I hope you don't give up on me or our shared values._ A lot of folks are going to ignore this, but I need patriots like you to see what's at stake if you ignore this.

**If you think you're better off than you were 5 years ago, then I understand why you don't want to donate today.**
**But if you think we need to get this country back on track and the American Dream restored, please donate whatever you can afford by midnight!**
---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662881%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=knpviMUohBEoJB3k7MGeZA&sysid=1 "DONATE NOW")
---
| Thank you so much for hearing me out.
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662882%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=75KO2vh6WkYR2lNz70%2fSVQ&sysid=1)
---
Marco Rubio
---
| | |

* * *

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662883%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RXYIwOha18v1jvfKMFstwA&sysid=1)
---

You can claim a signed copy of Marco Rubio’s new book, _Decades of Decadence_ , today!
| [CLAIM A SIGNED COPY](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662884%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Yehk1Obuf5aF1u3SqYhkJA&sysid=1 "CLAIM A SIGNED COPY")
---

These signed versions are only available to top conservatives, and you are one of them. We don’t want you to miss out on this awesome opportunity.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662895%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IbzF8J%2bKTvPBYwJvAaqBiA&sysid=1 "The Democrats Agenda: Abolish the filibuster, increase taxes, open the
border. Stop the radical Democrats:")

We need you to stop what you’re doing immediately and take this seriously. **What you choose to do in the next 30 seconds could determine the future of our country.**

The fate of our country is currently hanging on by a thread. Now you have two choices and you decide what happens next:

1\. Ignore this message and let the Democrats continue to divide America and turn us against each other.

**2\. We can work like a team to make sure America’s best days are ahead of us. **

The choice is not between Republicans or Democrats. The choice isn’t between Left or Right. _The choice is between commonsense values and radical lunacy._

**[If you’re committed to stopping the radical Left from taking over our country, we need you to step up NOW.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662896%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BxcyMcHrJdrTa9TMYejjmA&sysid=1 "If you’re committed to
stopping the radical Left from taking over our country, we need you to step up
NOW.")**
| [STOP THE DEMS](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662897%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VXG2%2fEwrrC78ioDvaSeneQ&sysid=1 "STOP THE DEMS")
---

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: The Supreme Court has lost the faith of the American people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Friends, I’ll keep this short, but it has to be said:
The Supreme Court has lost the faith of the American people.
From the absolutely gutting Dobbs decision that we’ve spent a year grappling with to the slate of deeply disturbing decisions just this month, I know a lot of folks are reeling and scared for what all this means for our future.
We need significant, structural reform to restore the legitimacy of the Court, and to restore faith in our democracy.
Add your name to my petition now if you agree that it’s time to reform the Supreme Court. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/m397MmKOqUWO-3OskXB7ig2]
In a country that thrives on checks and balances, it’s important to say that our lack of faith in the Court doesn’t come from disagreeing with their decisions (though that’s certainly a horrific byproduct) - it’s that the Court itself is steeped in corruption and ethics violations .
From Clarence Thomas to Brett Kavanaugh, there are too many questions left unanswered - about who funds their vacations, who sends them gifts, who pays off their debts, and more - and no one but Congress is willing to hold them accountable. Our Court is supposed to be free from undue political influence, but it’s painfully clear that’s no longer the case.
If you agree that it’s time to take action on this, please sign my petition today demanding a serious look at judicial reform. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/m397MmKOqUWO-3OskXB7ig2]
Thanks for your support.
-Sara
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Min=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Dave Min Establishes Commanding Fundraising Lead
body:
Min Significantly Outraises Democratic Field In The Money Race While Also Expanding His Enormous Coalition of Support | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ff9d69f0a19f/dave-min-establishes-commanding-fundraising-lead-15658848?e=7017cc100e)
---
| |
---
| | **For Immediate Release** : July 17, 2023
**Contact** : press@davemin.com

**Dave Min Establishes Commanding Fundraising Lead ** _Min Significantly Outraises Democratic Field In The Money Race
While Also Expanding His Enormous Coalition of Support_
**IRVINE, CA —** Dave Min is pulling ahead in the race for California’s 47th District. From all angles–money raised, campaign & legislative experience, polling, and endorsements–State Senator Dave Min has clearly established himself as the candidate who will represent the Democratic Party in next November’s general election, and he is primed to keep CA-47 Blue. After two quarters in a row boasting massive fundraising hauls that significantly outpace all other Democrats in the race, Min sits far ahead in the Democratic field in fundraising alone in the primary field as a sitting elected, endorsed by labor, teachers and law enforcement, who has a proven electoral and legislative track record.

“**When Dave Min says he raised over $400,000 for the quarter, that’s exactly what he means,** ” said Dan Driscoll, Campaign Manager at Dave Min for Congress. “**No funny business. No loans from the candidate. These are real donations from real people, who understand that there’s one candidate in this race who’s able to beat Scott Baugh next November. Voters need to know which candidate has the legs to actually contribute to a Democratic House majority next year. Senator Min is miles ahead of any other Democratic candidate in the field in terms of fundraising this quarter, total fundraising, cash on hand, and cash on hand for the primary. And he’s done this by creating a broad-based, grassroots coalition of support. This is a fundraising program built to last.** ”

Dave Min is no stranger to tough races. He currently represents over 80% of the 47th Congressional District in the State Senate, and won CA-47 during that election by over 5% in 2020, a tough year for Orange County Democrats, defeating a long-time Republican icon who was thought to be unbeatable. Just after the end of 2023’s first quarter, former Congressman Harley Rouda ended his bid for the 47th, leaving Min as the only Democrat in the race with previous campaign, legislative, or federal policy experience.

Following the Q2 reporting deadline, Senator Min has dominating leads among Democrats as far as the most money raised to date, the most cash on hand, and the most money available for the primary election. **He raised more in the second quarter, and has nearly twice as much in available funds for the primary election– not counting candidate loans– as _the rest of the Democratic field combined_.** What’s even more notable is where this money has come from. Dave Min is approaching $1 million raised for the cycle, without taking checks from Big Oil or corporate PACs. He’s built a grassroots fundraising program designed to last, with over 40% more individual donors this past quarter than the next leading Democrat, and gained 593 new donors in the second quarter. The announcement comes a few weeks after a [Public Policy Polling](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=653a078e7f&e=7017cc100e) poll showed Min with a commanding lead against his likely Republican opponent in the 2024 General Election.

Considering fundraising and endorsements in tandem tells a compelling story about Dave Min’s general election viability. While approaching $1 million raised, he’s also consolidated support from local, state, and national endorsers. **Dave is proud to be the only candidate who lives in and represents the district, and who is endorsed by the district's current representative, Congresswoman Katie Porter**. In recent weeks, Min has announced endorsements from the Teamsters Joint Council 42, UFCW Local 324, and the International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers Local 447, establishing himself as the clear choice for working families. This comes on top of his already stunning roster of support, which includes the Service Employees International Union (SEIU), the California Federation of Teachers (CFT), the International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers (IBEW) Local 47, California Lieutenant Governor Eleni Kounalakis, Attorney General Rob Bonta, State Treasurer Fiona Ma, Insurance Commissioner Ricardo Lara, Superintendent of Public Instruction Tony Thurmond, the Congressional Asian Pacific American Caucus’s political leadership ASPIRE PAC, more than 50 local Orange County government officials, and more than 60 state legislators. A full endorsement list is available [here](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=f6bf074cda&e=7017cc100e).

Taking fundraising, experience, polling, and coalition building into account, it’s difficult to deny: **Dave Min is the Democrat who will be advancing to next year’s general election in the race for California’s 47th Congressional District, and he is in very strong position to keep this seat Blue, which is critical for Democratic efforts to regain the House majority.**

Senator Min, the only Korean-American in the state legislature, serves as Chair of the Senate Natural Resources and Water Committee and as Senate Vice Chair of the Asian and Pacific Islander Legislative Caucus. Min has proven himself an incredibly effective legislative leader in the Senate, authoring 17 bills signed into law by the Governor, including leading legislation on climate rescue, hate crimes, gun violence prevention, family safety, and women’s reproductive rights. Among other things, he has authored first-in-the-nation legislation to end gun shows on state property, including on state-owned county fairgrounds; to end offshore oil drilling; to preserve 30% of California’s open spaces and coastal waters as protected spaces by the year 2030; and to recognize reproductive coercion as a form of domestic violence. He has led efforts to preserve and expand base funding for California’s public schools and was a proud coauthor of 2022’s Proposition 1, which enshrined a right to abortion access in California’s State Constitution. Senator Min has brought back over $200 million to his Senate district, including over $30 million for key wildfire prevention efforts, including the establishment of a new wildfire hand crew station in the fire-prone Laguna Canyon area, and funding for climate innovation, open space access and preservation, and for expanded access to the arts.

Before entering the State Senate, Min was a law professor at UC Irvine, where he taught and researched in the area of business law, and was seen as a leading expert in his field, testifying six times before Congress and regularly appearing on CNBC, CNN, MSNBC, and NPR. Senator Min has spent his career in public service, including working at the Securities and Exchange Commission and as a policy advisor for Senator Chuck Schumer. He resides with his wife Jane Stoever, a UC Irvine law professor who specializes in domestic violence and family law, and their three children, who all attend public school in Irvine. Dave is a native Californian, a product of California public schools who graduated from the Wharton School and Harvard Law School, and an Eagle Scout.
##### _California’s 47th is an open Congressional District in Orange County that includes the Cities of Costa Mesa, Huntington Beach, Irvine, Newport Beach, and Seal Beach, and portions of Laguna Beach, Laguna Hills, and Laguna Woods. Incumbent Katie Porter is vacating the seat to run for U.S. Senate. In 2022, Porter defeated former Assemblymember Republican Scott Baugh by 3.44% in this “toss-up” district. State Senator Dave Min currently represents over 80% of Congressional District 47 in Sacramento. In 2020, Min received over 158,000 votes within CA-47, defeating incumbent John Moorlach by 5.15%. 19% of the registered voters in CA-47 are of Asian and Pacific Islander descent, including one of the largest Korean-American populations in the country._
---

| | | This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. When my Republican colleagues and I asked for your vote last fall, we made a Commitment to America of exactly what we would get done for you if entrusted with the majority.

The House is now spearheading the commitment to hold Joe Biden and his cronies accountable to you, and let me tell you - the Biden family corruption our investigations have uncovered in just a few short months is _**damning.**_

**But here 's the thing:**

When the Clintons went after Trump...
When Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi went after Trump...
When Merrick Garland and the FBI went after Trump...
And when Alvin Bragg went after Trump...

**They ALL had the media, Hollywood, Big Tech, and D.C. bureaucrats to peddle their LIES.**

Now, all those forces are converging all their resources to SHUT DOWN what my colleagues and I are uncovering about their puppet in the White House. Which is why I'm coming to you today, Friend. clean_body: This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. | | | | | This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. When my Republican colleagues and I asked for your vote last fall, we made a Commitment to America of exactly what we would get done for you if entrusted with the majority. The House is now spearheading the commitment to hold Joe Biden and his cronies accountable to you, and let me tell you - the Biden family corruption our investigations have uncovered in just a few short months is damning. But here 's the thing: When the Clintons went after Trump... When Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi went after Trump... When Merrick Garland and the FBI went after Trump... And when Alvin Bragg went after Trump... They ALL had the media, Hollywood, Big Tech, and D.C. bureaucrats to peddle their LIES. Now, all those forces are converging all their resources to SHUT DOWN what my colleagues and I are uncovering about their puppet in the White House. Which is why I'm coming to you today, Friend. I need your help to keep the pressure on Joe Biden and fend off the attempts to undermine our investigations. "Can my colleagues and I count on you?" | | | | | | Democrats' dark money dollars are pouring in to distract voters and undermine our investigations. If we don't see some immediate backup from our grassroots supporters, I fear Joe Biden and his cronies will get off scot-free with their sketchy schemes. name: Kash Patel
subject: New J6 Choir song with Donald Trump
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zddm6jhtvhuflm5fjuohlof7mefes21msaskmmj0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdh69ob2c1h2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2za6o4k2ev043gucoeidmlpli3dgkusacqj04tlvg_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdh69ob2c1h2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0rscjsbo957m36oqjga9jh1gu59sbaim1mkdol0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdh69ob2c1h2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[** _Donate Now >>_**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zfb2pu4bjba9rfm710h3dc3ln5s735hrg6cgjego_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdh69ob2c1h2bs)

**[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zr7f3m8fo2dipi6hsrj7369akth28fc9da35ss6o_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdh69ob2c1h2bs)

[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqli1obr8ika2lhb3540tn36fv0iaovi247klua8_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdh69ob2c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgshhgunjuv1d855emb4nthpc4i148a053ss4gbo_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdh69ob2c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zs3pflgjnc9fvjtrj1up5jam0rpmvmi0mltv6m20_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdh69ob2c1h2bs)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbsnoam6rqot081g5slf7jninj4dlrcp9m9njofo_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdh69ob2c1h2bs)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zll42p69bv4eq3sh441fcd11vv311au52mfd2qa0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdh69ob2c1h2bs)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqm2knqla2jlpol8btafmeq3qshnfit5tnig6ejo_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdh69ob2c1h2bs)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zi4c154ttkk25b4savedf5r7vgoihfkhr3hp4t58_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdh69ob2c1h2bs)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

name: Derek Marshall for Congress
subject: PETITION: Higher education shouldn't be a debt sentence.
disclaimer_text: paid for by a modest 0
body:
**Student debt shouldn't exist.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66623874/417003889/1502360243?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTE4NTY2NC1jODI0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bR9Yj_2-VoUFQ52l_TE6Dqwp-q-Oe81xx8yjARxsdNU=&emci=79f238f0-671f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=01185664-c824-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=21617867)
[**Sign on if you agree that a college education shouldn't bury students in debt! Tell Congress to pass the College for All Act!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66623876/417003891/1502360243?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTE4NTY2NC1jODI0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bR9Yj_2-VoUFQ52l_TE6Dqwp-q-Oe81xx8yjARxsdNU=&emci=79f238f0-671f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=01185664-c824-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=21617867)
Higher education leads to greater lifetime earnings and [provides economic benefits to society](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66623878/417003893/-30164863?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTE4NTY2NC1jODI0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bR9Yj_2-VoUFQ52l_TE6Dqwp-q-Oe81xx8yjARxsdNU=&emci=79f238f0-671f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=01185664-c824-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=21617867).

However, going to college is increasingly expensive, and the high cost is contributing to rapid growth in student debt and a growing financial burden on Americans.

**The College for All Act, introduced by Sen. Bernie Sanders and Rep. Pramila Jayapal, would provide tuition free community college and public vocational school for all students and free university for the vast majority of families.

[Join Derek Marshall and sign on to tell Congress that we will all benefit from free higher education - pass the College for All Act!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66623880/417003895/1502360243?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTE4NTY2NC1jODI0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bR9Yj_2-VoUFQ52l_TE6Dqwp-q-Oe81xx8yjARxsdNU=&emci=79f238f0-671f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=01185664-c824-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=21617867)**

Not only would this bill increase college access, it would help tackle the student debt crisis. It would be paid for by a modest 0.605 percent tax on Wall Street transactions, affecting primarily the wealthiest traders.

"Today, this country tells young people to get the best education they can, and then saddles them for decades with crushing student loan debt,” Sanders said.

**In 2008 the middle class bailed out Wall Street speculators whose recklessness caused millions of Americans to lose their jobs, homes, savings, and ability to send their kids to college. Now it is time they repay the favor.

[Add your name to support the College for All Act! ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66623882/417003897/1502360243?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTE4NTY2NC1jODI0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bR9Yj_2-VoUFQ52l_TE6Dqwp-q-Oe81xx8yjARxsdNU=&emci=79f238f0-671f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=01185664-c824-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=21617867)**

We all do better when we all do better.
**-** Derek Marshall for Congress

[Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66623884/417003906/-727517715?amount=10&refcode=pl_footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTE4NTY2NC1jODI0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bR9Yj_2-VoUFQ52l_TE6Dqwp-q-Oe81xx8yjARxsdNU=)

[Meet Derek](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66623885/417003916/-75347818?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTE4NTY2NC1jODI0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bR9Yj_2-VoUFQ52l_TE6Dqwp-q-Oe81xx8yjARxsdNU=&emci=79f238f0-671f-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=01185664-c824-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=21617867)

Box 2836 Victorville, CA 92395 (760) 486-2416 Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress | |

body:
| | |

Friend, we can barely believe this: Despite losing the 2020 election, inciting an insurrection and facing multiple criminal charges, **Donald Trump is polling MILES ahead of his competitors in the 2024 primary. Even worse, Trump's campaign raised over $35 MILLION last quarter — despite two indictments. **
Now, the Republican National Convention is less than a year away — and it seems all but guaranteed that Donald Trump will be the GOP nominee. The stakes here couldn't be any higher.
President Biden has spent the last two and a half years rebuilding our country and our democracy from the wreckage of the Trump administration. But now, Trump could be on track to retake power and destroy all the progress we've made! We have to stop him.
Grassroots people like you defeated Trump in 2020 — but we need to know that you'll stand against him again in 2024. **That's why we've chosen you to represent 43614 in our exclusive online poll. So please, respond before 11:59 p.m. to tell us where you stand:**

Dear Friend,
---
Yesterday's revival in Vermont was POWERFUL!! Believers gathered to be the hands of feet of Jesus— not to be served, but to serve! And boy did they serve! Believers from all across the nation generously donated financially, and Believers on the ground faithfully purchased, trucked in, and distributed the supplies. And it was all capped off with praise and worship to the One true God!!

_**Watch the recap to see the devastation, the recovery, and the response!!**_
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=4be48788ea044f9ea570fbc535f9c163&_e=bI7WGg5WQfyzYhWdq8zA5j1nDaZ1CUcHFAICunWCbcGVnSSLJnD00_D9sxbFc_JJMwP1-XfXncQILMcmhBhr9idbp-V85dhlHpqaI1BtyWzTDfZ8QVBE3WyzEYzHoFN7UQPFvuyJhzjI5YRN6nFI7D3PxnDx7t5cwCOYz_0_vDHoCjuG8WqR6bIiBUokfDSG_a7PXRFpXn-8EpnSh6fuc12uTzMnkFZPxsytS13b180oKDrz8pI--QvkKQXHtX3rNgVXsyAsxDVeaxRbd8qFFpDx-Mau9azU4mDA9fzc42lwFdmB7-IghV0ByacBIw-5)
---
God is on the move, and He is present in the pain and the joy alike! God orchestrated this timing, and we were HONORED to be able to serve the people of Vermont!
---
Till all hear,
---
---
Sean
