name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: I’d be really grateful if you took the time to read this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
I'm hoping you'll read this all the way through.

| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | |
---
| | | This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. I wanted to take a few minutes today to share something personal with you, but it’s going to take a bit of explaining. **If you get to the end and still don’t understand my commitment to America, then I’m just appreciative that you took the time to read this in its entirety.**

I wanted to take some time to discuss my background so you understand where I’m coming from when I’m fighting for the American people.
| | [](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTk4LTMwYWJlMDkwOWRiOTRkOWI5OGYwYmJjZGZkYzRmMzU3IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS53aW5yZWQuY29tL2tldmluLW1jY2FydGh5L2Jpby8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMwNzE3X0FFLUxMLjExMDEzMl90MTM2MzkxMC03OTMmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjMwNzE3X0FFLUxMLjExMDEzMl90MTM2MzkxMC03OTMifQ/pEFETWSxQO1MedpdYOFQbQ "Kevin as a baby with his dad")
---
| [](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTk4LTMwYWJlMDkwOWRiOTRkOWI5OGYwYmJjZGZkYzRmMzU3IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS53aW5yZWQuY29tL2tldmluLW1jY2FydGh5L2Jpby8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMwNzE3X0FFLUxMLjExMDEzMl90MTM2MzkxMC03OTMmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjMwNzE3X0FFLUxMLjExMDEzMl90MTM2MzkxMC03OTMifQ/YpD6uAifxLRvcpXCa1R6GQ "Kevin with his siblings in 1968")
---
_My dad and I, circa 1966._| _My siblings, Shelly and Mark, and I, circa 1968._

I come from a working-class background. My grandparents were immigrants. My mom, Roberta, was a homemaker. My dad, Owen, was an assistant city fire chief. **They instilled a strong work ethic in me that I carry with me every day.**
| [](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTk4LTMwYWJlMDkwOWRiOTRkOWI5OGYwYmJjZGZkYzRmMzU3IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS53aW5yZWQuY29tL2tldmluLW1jY2FydGh5L2Jpby8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMwNzE3X0FFLUxMLjExMDEzMl90MTM2MzkxMC03OTMmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjMwNzE3X0FFLUxMLjExMDEzMl90MTM2MzkxMC03OTMifQ/HrGpJeQzAyglm_aYuewe_Q "Kevin working the counter at Kevin O's Deli & McCarthy's Yogurt.")
---
_Working the counter at Kevin O's Deli & McCarthy's Yogurt. (Sorry for the image quality, but at least you’ll know it’s authentic!)_

When I was 19, I ran my first business, Kevin O’s Deli, selling sandwiches out of the back of my uncle's yogurt shop. Eventually, I sold the deli to pay my way through college. It taught me a lot about personal responsibility, and **I quickly learned how overregulation by the government affects small businesses. **
| [](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTk4LTMwYWJlMDkwOWRiOTRkOWI5OGYwYmJjZGZkYzRmMzU3IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjMiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS53aW5yZWQuY29tL2tldmluLW1jY2FydGh5L2Jpby8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMwNzE3X0FFLUxMLjExMDEzMl90MTM2MzkxMC03OTMmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjMwNzE3X0FFLUxMLjExMDEzMl90MTM2MzkxMC03OTMifQ/q8tAqrFtXbILlpi0AUT6pw "Kevin speaking with a farmer on the campaign trail in 2010")
---
_Speaking with a farmer on the campaign trail in 2010._

After Kevin O’s Deli and my experience with government overreach, I decided it was time to make a change. I knew public service would be a positive way for me to channel my frustration as a former small business owner, while also helping others in similar situations. Little did I know that working in the California State Assembly would pave the way to holding one of the most prestigious roles in our country: _**Speaker of the House of Representatives.**_
| [](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTk4LTMwYWJlMDkwOWRiOTRkOWI5OGYwYmJjZGZkYzRmMzU3IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjQiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS53aW5yZWQuY29tL2tldmluLW1jY2FydGh5L2Jpby8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMwNzE3X0FFLUxMLjExMDEzMl90MTM2MzkxMC03OTMmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjMwNzE3X0FFLUxMLjExMDEzMl90MTM2MzkxMC03OTMifQ/CjuGjdXytQrFkN2R_ICoGw "Celebrating Republicans’ success in taking back the House in 2022.")
---
_Celebrating Republicans’ success in taking back the House in 2022_

This brings me to my main point: **my Commitment to America isn’t some political ploy – _it’s deeply personal._**

**As Speaker of the House, I promise to deliver on our commitment to America and the American people.

[If you support my efforts as Speaker, please chip in whatever you can afford – $5, $10, even $25 if you can – to help me continue this fight.](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTk4LTMwYWJlMDkwOWRiOTRkOWI5OGYwYmJjZGZkYzRmMzU3IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjUiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS53aW5yZWQuY29tL2tldmluLW1jY2FydGh5L2Jpby8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMwNzE3X0FFLUxMLjExMDEzMl90MTM2MzkxMC03OTMmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjMwNzE3X0FFLUxMLjExMDEzMl90MTM2MzkxMC03OTMifQ/uIB8NihuxJ3KBF7AwZu34Q "If you support my efforts as Speaker, please chip in whatever you can afford – $5, $10, even $25 if you can – to help me continue this fight.")**

| | [STAND WITH SPEAKER MCCARTHY](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTk4LTMwYWJlMDkwOWRiOTRkOWI5OGYwYmJjZGZkYzRmMzU3IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjYiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS53aW5yZWQuY29tL2tldmluLW1jY2FydGh5L2Jpby8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMwNzE3X0FFLUxMLjExMDEzMl90MTM2MzkxMC03OTMmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjMwNzE3X0FFLUxMLjExMDEzMl90MTM2MzkxMC03OTMifQ/0ZKX-w6YJoDdDtcHU0JmaQ "STAND WITH SPEAKER MCCARTHY")
---

If you’ve read this through to the end, thank you so much for your time. I hope you understand why our commitment to America is so important. I’m so grateful to have your support.

Thank you,

name: The David Horowitz Freedom Center
subject: Barack Obama’s True Legacy
body:
He led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police doing their jobs.

| |
---
| | Friend, Joe Biden may go down in history as the worst "president" of the United States...but Barack Obama is still the worst thing that happened to our republic. Because he laid the groundwork for everything we've seen since 2020 back in 2008. _ _ _He led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police doing their jobs._ _ _ _He championed the castration of our military, making us a laughing stock on the world stage._ _ _ _And he was even the real mastermind behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt._ The devastation and destruction we're seeing today has been over a decade in the making - and most of the American people have no clue what we're up against. **That 's why Freedom Center colleagues Robert Spencer, Daniel Greenfield and Jamie Glazov have joined other conservative powerhouses to publish _Barack Obama 's True Legacy_ -[ and why I want you to be one of the first to receive a copy.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fefbd58483de400a913b0dc86d4b8cff&_e=B-zUVVzsPnajLDV0fKhhf0hmRFGlGXKl6pxjq5Ugx__K697nBbKq509MQBjazwCmOPIVimsE-aLnnj5brXyIo_A-C5cN1kKvLpr1LxKgFUUqKVgjgce3AVkZ1MjFb6mpdZOgLWCTuKX-VJ9byBjJGFiFzr0Pe25jbMhbmWIxDK74UBgwx0yVhCDxQ8-x_URrY-TF23oh3ks0ejlt42rht--Gq41Fc1EjEqAoT8afQ_pwYmY2Ik77RySLKMIxn4vaRF8Ggfw54FOsH6zb4yGbz-q2J4_A5Sj6WrVlUE61ghk4bxfiG0EnPmF_oNSm2w75XrY1qYJvICrK4cuUYdR18R82XVIVDIJusXn_1ZeVeZQJxlXcU9dJlK2T7yLFU1Oc)** So many of our fellow citizens think the nightmare we've been living for the past three years came from nowhere. They think that this "administration" is made up of incompetent fools and that our drastically declining standard of living is the result of Joe Biden's cognitive state. But the truth is much darker, friend. **This decline was by design - and in many ways, Barack Hussein Obama was its chief architect.** That's why I believe _Barack Obama 's True Legacy_ is one of the most important books of the year, [**and why if you give a generous gift of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today today, I 'll send you a complimentary copy.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fefbd58483de400a913b0dc86d4b8cff&_e=B-zUVVzsPnajLDV0fKhhf0hmRFGlGXKl6pxjq5Ugx__K697nBbKq509MQBjazwCmOPIVimsE-aLnnj5brXyIo_A-C5cN1kKvLpr1LxKgFUUqKVgjgce3AVkZ1MjFb6mpdZOgLWCTuKX-VJ9byBjJGFiFzr0Pe25jbMhbmWIxDK74UBgwx0yVhCDxQ8-x_URrY-TF23oh3ks0ejlt42rht--Gq41Fc1EjEqAoT8afQ_qyc42Dg676CNzSwWZRw7nXnv7GhWGK9WjJ9IIGMc7GhKMbQuU2bsTG2UtKkLXBusb_zPmHeB-SSJpL2o958kDoRfosL2Z3XaoKYs52l1kZS2rtCuvP-b4bI5OamwQVUORR3IREyVt6h_ETeDuaH1mP) In his first week in office, Joe Biden signed a record number of executive orders, taking a wrecking ball to all the hard work President Trump did to get our country back on track. He brought us back to where Obama left off, and now, with his White House full of Obama holdovers, he intends to finish what his old boss started. We can't let that happen, friend. But if we can't stop an enemy that we don't understand. That's where this incredible book comes in, and why I need patriots like you to read it immediately.

| | Sincerely,

Michael Finch President, The David Horowitz Freedom Center

name: me, Donald J. Trump (2)
subject: re: 85%
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
Wow! We’re nearing 100%... | | | Friend – I had to give you an important update...

---
After my speech at Turning Point, a straw poll was conducted to see who the most active Republican primary voters want to be our Party’s 2024 presidential nominee.

---
**I am honored and _humbled_ to say that I came in first place with 85%.**

---
We’re almost at 100% at this point – and it’s still only July.

---
I made a promise to you that I would wrap up the primary as quickly as possible – and it’s going faster than I had even hoped.

---

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66625678/417010375/31770608?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230717_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTcyMTZlYzgtY2MyNC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zq93j_VyAM5YKs68R9c6kCgum__oS_Vq78SJB4vez64=) Here’s something you may not know: I lost the first time I ran for Congress in 2016. I’ll be honest, Peter, it was a tough loss. I was ready to get to work to serve my community. But my opponent defeated me by fewer than 7,000 votes — so I shook off the dust and ran again in 2018. This time, I won, unseating the Republican incumbent who beat me two years before and cementing a Democratic House majority. **It’s thanks to this grassroots team that I won again in 2020 and 2022 — but it wasn’t easy._Our race last November was the most expensive congressional contest in Minnesota history._** It’s deeply important to me to finish the work we’ve started together. My priority has always been listening to the concerns of the citizens I represent and working across the aisle to create stronger communities and an economy that works for every Minnesotan. We’ve done so much to achieve that — helping families and small businesses recover from the pandemic, investing in our country’s infrastructure and passing legislation to cap the cost of insulin at $35 a month and cut costs at the grocery store and the gas pump. So I’m reaching out to you today because I’m counting on your support to help restore our Democratic House Majority. **I was up against millions in spending from special interests and super PACs determined to roll back our progress in 2022, and the attacks from the National Republican Congressional Committee have already started.** **[So much is at stake in this election and anything you give will make a huge difference. clean_body: | = = Here’s something you may not know: I lost the first time I ran for Congress in 2016. I’ll be honest, Peter, it was a tough loss. I was ready to get to work to serve my community. But my opponent defeated me by fewer than 7,000 votes — so I shook off the dust and ran again in 2018. This time, I won, unseating the Republican incumbent who beat me two years before and cementing a Democratic House majority. It’s thanks to this grassroots team that I won again in 2020 and 2022 — but it wasn’t easy.Our race last November was the most expensive congressional contest in Minnesota history. It’s deeply important to me to finish the work we’ve started together. My priority has always been listening to the concerns of the citizens I represent and working across the aisle to create stronger communities and an economy that works for every Minnesotan. We’ve done so much to achieve that — helping families and small businesses recover from the pandemic, investing in our country’s infrastructure and passing legislation to cap the cost of insulin at $35 a month and cut costs at the grocery store and the gas pump. So I’m reaching out to you today because I’m counting on your support to help restore our Democratic House Majority. I was up against millions in spending from special interests and super PACs determined to roll back our progress in 2022, and the attacks from the National Republican Congressional Committee have already started. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to HER Time and Angie Craig will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Rep. name: Mark Hamill
subject: These are dark times. Adam Schiff gives me hope.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| Over the last six years, our democracy has been tested like never before. And in those dark times, Adam gave me hope.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=3017%2E5257348%2EOxS8-q)
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=july2023_abs_em.rnu5kc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230717_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=3017%2E5257348%2EOxS8-q)
Hi Derek –
I hope you’ll give me a minute to explain why I’m supporting Adam Schiff for the U.S. Senate.
Over the last six years, our democracy has been tested like never before. And in those dark times, Adam gave me hope.
Hope that our democracy would survive. Hope that not only would we get through this, but that we would come out on the other side and our democracy could be strong again. **_Hope._**
Here’s the thing – it would have been easy for Adam to stay on the sidelines, and let someone else take all the heat for defending our democracy against Trump’s many abuses of office. But instead he stood up, and led us through dark times. And as I got to know Adam better during those years, I saw true character and determination. A willingness to put himself and his career on the line to hold a dangerous demagogue accountable.
And he was damn good at it. It’s exactly why, just last month, the extreme MAGA cronies went after Adam and censured him. **Because they know just how effective he is. When he takes on a fight, he gets the job done.**
**[That’s why I’m supporting Adam Schiff for U.S. Senate. And I hope you will, too.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=july2023_abs_em.rnu5kc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230717_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=3017%2E5257348%2EOxS8-q)**
I’m a lifelong Californian – born in Oakland, live in Los Angeles – and I know we need someone who will get stuff done. On housing and homelessness, on affordability and health care, on climate change and our planet. We need someone effective.
**[And nobody will be a more fearless or tireless fighter for our democracy and our state than Adam Schiff. Nobody. And with Trump running again, Adam is the best person possible to keep holding him accountable.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=july2023_abs_em.rnu5kc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230717_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=3017%2E5257348%2EOxS8-q)**
I hope you’ll join me in supporting Adam. And thanks for reading this email.
– Mark Hamill
[DONATE](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=july2023_abs_em.rnu5kc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230717_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=3017%2E5257348%2EOxS8-q)

name: Team Trump
subject: State Of The Race — Questions You Should Be Raising
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DONALD J
body:
| | |
---
**MEMORANDUM**
**TO:** Ron DeSantis for President Donors and Other Interested Parties **FROM:** Chris LaCivita and Susie Wiles - Donald J. Trump for President 2024
**DATE** : July 17, 2023 **RE:** State Of The Race — Questions You Should Be Raising
As Governor Ron DeSantis hits the road over the next week, seeking more funds for his campaign, we believe it is important to provide you, the donors who generously fund and raise money, with a list of relevant questions considering the current circumstances faced by his campaign.
Let's recap those circumstances:

• Every public poll now shows Ron DeSantis trailing President Trump by a significant margin.
• Senior campaign officials have even confirmed this disparity, acknowledging they are "way behind" and fighting an "uphill battle." The candidate himself acknowledged his polling showing him in the "twenties."
**According to NBC News, DeSantis campaign officials have said:
**
• "From my understanding, if we don't see a bump in the polls, we are basically going to shut down the idea of a national operation," a DeSantis-aligned operative said.
• This person stated that a shift needs to happen because it is clear to activists and donors that the current operation is not working. Ron DeSantis needs to signal to them that he recognizes this fact before any future poll shows him falling from second place nationally or in an early state.
_According to American Pulse, a nationally recognized Polling firm, a New Hampshire survey released on Friday, July 14th, showed Ron DeSantis and Chris Christie essentially tied, with 10.5% and 10.0% respectively. President Trump was at 47.5%.
_
**According to ABC News:
**
• DeSantis' early struggles to catch President Trump have led some of the Florida governor's major donors to privately question his viability as a presidential candidate while Trump is still in the race, as multiple sources have told ABC News..
• Sources have also indicated that some top donors who had planned to support DeSantis have started exploring other primary candidates, including meeting with individuals like Chris Christie, Senator Tim Scott, and former South Carolina Governor Nikki Haley.
As if that were not enough, the full extent of disorganization within the DeSantis campaign is now coming to light after public filings revealed that the campaign is spending unsustainably on a bloated payroll and not raising sufficient funds necessary for a long-term campaign.
**NBC News summarized it well:**
• "The numbers suggest, for the first time, that solvency could be a threat to DeSantis' campaign, which has touted its fundraising ability as a key measure of viability. They reflect the broader reality that DeSantis stalled after his launch, polling ahead of the Republican primary pack but far behind former President Donald Trump."
**The New York Times also raised a point:**
• "As a fuller financial picture of the 2024 presidential race emerged with Saturday's campaign filing deadline, trouble appeared to lurk below the surface for Gov. Ron DeSantis of Florida."
• "Mr. DeSantis is spending hand over fist, and his dependence on large donors suggests a lack of grassroots support."
If the campaign has not demonstrated sufficient enthusiasm to build a national fundraising base who is motivated to contribute, how can they effectively implement what they call a "long slog strategy"?
The answer is simple: They can't.
With the DeSantis campaign arm, Never (Always) Back Down, knocking on thousands of doors in the scorching summer of Nevada and South Carolina with out-of-state and unmotivated door knockers, there are not many positives to highlight.
As investors, you undoubtedly have some questions, and here are a few that should be raised:
• What exactly are the 93 individuals on the campaign payroll doing?
• Can you provide assurance to SuperPAC donors that Jeff Roe is not claiming $0.68 for each dollar spent, as his private investment information suggests?
• What is the campaign's expenditure breakdown, and can you provide the return on investment for direct mail and online fundraising operations?
• Despite the SuperPAC and affiliated organizations like the Club for No Growth and Koch Brothers operations spending tens of millions of dollars to prop up Ron DeSantis while attacking President Trump, the numbers have not budged. In fact, they have moved in favor of President Trump. What is the campaign's plan to change this trajectory?
• If the Corporate Media is responsible, as the Governor has stated, for the polling collapse (not Republican voters), why seek attention from Jake Tapper?
• The SuperPAC's pollster, who is spending millions of dollars of your money, often highlights the Governor's high favorability rating. However, people are still widely supporting President Donald Trump. Isn't that a problem?
• How much has the campaign and SuperPAC spent on unmotivated door knockers?
• Even Governor DeSantis is now admitting his post-midterm polling numbers were a “sugar high.” Were you as donors aware that the Governor and his team thought this?
Of course, if I were you, I wouldn't hold my breath expecting any answers or accountability. Given the aforementioned points, if you still collectively pour millions of dollars into the failing Ron DeSantis campaign, you can't say you weren't warned.
**PAID FOR BY DONALD J. TRUMP FOR PRESIDENT 2024, INC.
[WWW.DONALDJTRUMP.COM](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJxckEGPmzAQRn_NcAuCGWzDgUNTF1WNWvWW3KLBhsSRDSgYoeyvXxEle9jr-55GT8Nh8q5_1KD2gHh1dgZEoB-AeCj2p3_ycDzo3f7v6ndaimLdVvwJiPExdV_q60raBXZ-o0ontkZTojFJV-eyrGSuJJXJtRZlW_VlVRWlLQyKilrmFjmjnBEz5MTVmCFlKld5mZNQKeeWSGRsBTP3bQ9FtrohtePA3t7ifQlTasaQ-Poa4zQ_kxrA5rsA1CwxnENn3RKA9KtWbnAel7vpgLRxZ34xw2FidxmA9LvovYxD7IYIpCupBKA8D95ZID2b36fQ6Js9PuHzn6Q_uvA__hJ_OLnXdlqd926WCorsshVsaZ8BAAD__2Gpd48)**

[Privacy Policy](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJxkkEGvnCAUhX_NdafBi4AuXHRKTVPzmrdr080EAd8wASWKNfbXN05muun2Oyc337kqRO_GowVxAcSbMysgAv0EiH11-fmd9z96mV_edp9Lzqr9TPEzIKYj2n_V55XCBuX8SYXMTIu6Rq0z25a8bngpOK2zW2uHodG2YQ0rjRrYSFBVpmJYG0ZYbVjmWiRIiShFWZeUiUKVhlJGlGFKqXEYoSK7mwozT8qbe1q2EAs9h8y3t5Ti-lDqALt93_8rAXZxcb-VPvI4e6ePHMk5qQPabSlcgzVuC0Dlcwo_4Tpvi7ZApXZX9WRahajcxwRUvnRfyTwlOyWgsuGCAfLr5J0BKr--67d075vp1wM-nk3lHxve0xf2TWVLa-LuvHcrF1CRj9PgdP4bAAD___migVk)

Governor Ron DeSantis has never backed down from a tough fight. He's a native Floridian with blue-collar roots, played baseball at Yale, and graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. name: James O'Keefe
subject: Their final attack on me . . .
body:
14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

| | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuvqjumisnbg74int6hpr23pspfbh5vskv3uf7bo_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdj68oj6cdh2bs)
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zm2sk2qcbtlee66li2cqgfu9uvhu66gvobfbu86o_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdj68oj6cdh2bs)
Dear Friend,

Fourteen years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

You’ve seen my work. Most Americans have.

In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me.

It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I’m unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and **no one to stop me.**

Since I was fired, I’ve chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. **And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned.**

Those 14 years were formative.

When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle.

I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership.

Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan’s quote on leadership: “Winning has a price. **And leadership has a price**.”

I’ve been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, **yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded.**

In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me.

And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That’s why I’m writing you today to **[ask for your support to my legal defense fund.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zubmvcjg6hjeju674poi6rkjfkgfsjm62vki5sr0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdj68oj6cdh2bs)**

My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up **[the fund to pay attorney costs](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zihbnehtuo9upkmlqps7a9em626sm9lfsfmhgg78_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdj68oj6cdh2bs)** that will quickly pile up.

As I mentioned, this isn’t my first rodeo so I know that **the cost will exceed $500,000**.

Good attorneys aren’t cheap, and my pockets are not deep.

No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me.

That’s where you come in. **[Will you chip in and help me defend myself](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcp5ivpok6jep1gqtqbsfgg26ogottdu0mjjtjdg_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdj68oj6cdh2bs)?**

When you do, I’ll be following up as the case progresses but I’ll also keep you informed of the great work I’m doing at OMG . . . and it’s exciting!

A fresh start, being forced to start over, I’ll admit is thrilling. And I’m starting armed with all of the lessons I’ve learned to avoid the pitfalls I’ve experienced.

Me and my teams are more efficient, we’re more productive, and our work hits like a sledgehammer.

But my work will be silenced if my former employer gets their way. Or the distractions of a court battle and its costs may become overwhelming.

**[I’m asking you to STAND UP FOR ME, so I can keep working](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6nhbtt8ibiv0f2fl80106r6cfigqd1gd46p5eug_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdj68oj6cdh2bs)**. And I’ll commit to you that **I will NOT let you down**.

So please, **[make a donation to my legal defense fund through Liberty Guard](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjilobi4m9dkoolf0gvuf1t9miq1qg5b56djlel0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdj68oj6cdh2bs)**. We have a long way to do to hit our goal, so please, donate as much as you can.

Thank you for your direct or indirect support over the years. Your views, donations or simply talking about my work to friends and family has kept me going for 14 years . . . **and we cannot stop now!**

Respectfully,

James O’Keefe

P.S. I have 20 days to file my response to the lawsuit. I have to raise enough money to pay for a retainer and cover the legal work to defend against this lawsuit. This is unfortunately urgent so please, **[donate today](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zaahdl3j6870b7h8ur14hngeibdfeqkqi6467fe0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdj68oj6cdh2bs)**.

---

body:

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66626195/417012116/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzMzNTY2Ny1jZTI0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KRoRUfMcGZHBKtQAFfEWIMQjjUF3_x0LMbwonq_FPgc=&emci=4376f831-af24-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=7c335667-ce24-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, We can’t stress this enough. **A GOP takeover of the General Assembly would be absolutely devastating for abortion access in the South**. Every single anti-abortion bill introduced in the VA General Assembly in 2023 was defeated by Democrats. If we lose control of both chambers, there’s nothing stopping Republicans from banning abortion at 15 weeks. Or worse. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66626196/417012117/-423155490?refcode=mw_em_230717_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzMzNTY2Ny1jZTI0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KRoRUfMcGZHBKtQAFfEWIMQjjUF3_x0LMbwonq_FPgc=) Your donation is crucial to our work to elect a Democratic majority in Virginia and protect access to reproductive health care. _**[Rush $5 today to help us safeguard abortion in the Commonwealth>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66626197/417012118/-423155490?refcode=mw_em_230717_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzMzNTY2Ny1jZTI0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KRoRUfMcGZHBKtQAFfEWIMQjjUF3_x0LMbwonq_FPgc=)**_ Thank you, Team Warner —------- Forwarded message ------— Derek, Right now, abortion in Virginia is legal up to 26 weeks, and even later if the pregnant person’s life is at risk. The Commonwealth is the _only Southern state that hasn’t banned or rolled back abortion rights since Roe was overturned._ But this freedom hinges on this year’s election, where our entire state legislature is on the ballot. And right now, **GOP candidates are united around a 15-week abortion ban.** I’m determined to put a stop to their draconian ban by making sure Democrats win their races to hold on to the Virginia Senate and take back the House of Delegates. _**[Can you chip in $5 before our mid-month deadline to fuel my work to elect pro-choice Democrats to the General Assembly?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66626198/417012119/-423155490?refcode=mw_em_230717_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzMzNTY2Ny1jZTI0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KRoRUfMcGZHBKtQAFfEWIMQjjUF3_x0LMbwonq_FPgc=)**_ After _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned, I read one too many devastating stories about the impact it had on women in Virginia and around the country. Doctors having to consult lawyers before providing abortions to women in dire health conditions. Women fleeing to other states to receive life-saving care, paralyzed with fear of the repercussions they’d face. This is unacceptable. Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z385drhi6gr95ncvsfmnbf4te9nqvno9oetkfof0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdj68oj6cth2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zohd5tnu2lcnm2ann7b38f2dnkl8hs7dd949cqjg_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdj68oj6cth2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z8i0f3rd466vcvv4rpnf3gq7jmu0n35o2vglqh0g_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdj68oj6cth2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=000534cb006e49aaad5a75fca10a4d88&_e=mue_EqI1WTl2GINs5iA78udnBd6z7sZM_oTmYfDkCxwaEdAlVYS_onYndlioFP0XcoyFZW6g1639B-y9pqA8tHK07iIb3j2dP1hGOu3xLsd4xqPbrYpnR1M3EaoQqzSsq-9xYtxjHnvkRWsh4MHdDXlgKUc5RnD6uezhT-iXNEodnQw2teVSitP_1uSPHcBEOgRkuyxhGomy9dOmQsBT0PwJ9Le6EKEFu8ZZ9XYcxTHmEj948s6xYPNwmJRNUMcpvK4goOoFa7-5lLiQnkw6gdLzcNboRzkI7aBYND0AJ6GWoU_5Fj4b360EDBIM4PTsXlsh_aAwdpajAPmVkFewt9vbGd4MTuqq8qs50uoB-NTw3Z1z-1d4d1R0_MWAfoAQVlAACj3zZ_jJvFe3SP9i2PVI8_4sbYuqh09QYTNRTAbEWuFwyuz--KE8u2vXDCtl)
**This. Is. Huge.** The Texas Senate race is about to be the most expensive race in the entire country next year. Ted Cruz’s opponent, Colin Allred, raised $6.2 million in just two months. **This will be the biggest and most expensive Senate race next year.**

[**STAND WITH TED CRUZ >>**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=000534cb006e49aaad5a75fca10a4d88&_e=mue_EqI1WTl2GINs5iA78udnBd6z7sZM_oTmYfDkCxwaEdAlVYS_onYndlioFP0XcoyFZW6g1639B-y9pqA8tHK07iIb3j2dP1hGOu3xLsd4xqPbrYpnR1M3EaoQqzSsq-9xYtxjHnvkRWsh4MHdDXlgKUc5RnD6uezhT-iXNEodnQw2teVSitP_1uSPHcBEOgRkuyxhGomy9dOmQsBT0PwJ9Le6EKEFu8ZZ9XYcxTHmEj948s6xYPNwmJRNUMcpvK4goOoFa7-5lLiQnkw6gdLzcNboRzkI7aBYND0AJ6EDmfwvH2E0b90sI7lMePkKrQQQzQ7yY39ig67UN9J_-vM098IGhvMpuzqbKG3YPhPlDscd8iHi5jfprVB8LLsUCn41FPsq5AgvO_q_iWo-LdnlaImL9USiXTH0o92Rg_otRmOmmSWpxLfnzhG7ibiP)
In the 2018 Senate election:

* **It was surprisingly close;** Ted Cruz won by ONLY 3%

* **Cruz’s opponent raised $80 million** for the seat 6 years ago. In 2018, Beto O’Rourke raised $6 million in 9 months. Colin Allred has hit that number in LESS THAN TWO MONTHS ALREADY.

This is not a race we can take for granted. The extremist left has made Senator Ted Cruz their #1 target to beat. They will use everything at their disposal to win this seat and attempt to eliminate any chance for a Republican voice in the Senate. [**We need your help, Fellow American.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=000534cb006e49aaad5a75fca10a4d88&_e=mue_EqI1WTl2GINs5iA78udnBd6z7sZM_oTmYfDkCxwaEdAlVYS_onYndlioFP0XcoyFZW6g1639B-y9pqA8tHK07iIb3j2dP1hGOu3xLsd4xqPbrYpnR1M3EaoQqzSsq-9xYtxjHnvkRWsh4MHdDXlgKUc5RnD6uezhT-iXNEodnQw2teVSitP_1uSPHcBEOgRkuyxhGomy9dOmQsBT0PwJ9Le6EKEFu8ZZ9XYcxTHmEj948s6xYPNwmJRNUMcpvK4goOoFa7-5lLiQnkw6gdLzcNboRzkI7aBYND0AJ6Eqbd47TZOr6X6-2WonQ4nAicsf6sP7YLVxsp5wu58QU8iOqHfbud6Q7TU8B46HGROR4Tyhuqq_b7NC7me6A9Y1Up-fs2bVvngGp6Vdx1ClkFRnH0SfLPgba4_hUyoX1k7yCLuG3JOYm6D6wpPHkIo2)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62964734:6KPBTGINZ:m:1:3299561967:777BC3DBB766421A2137FBF4E3924A75:r)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** CHIP IN NOW ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62964735:6KPBTGINZ:m:1:3299561967:777BC3DBB766421A2137FBF4E3924A75:r)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62964734:6KPBTGINZ:m:1:3299561967:777BC3DBB766421A2137FBF4E3924A75:r)

body:

---
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=020003bb38b9486f8a199dd0604ec77c&_e=TPCNiqWO2zInjQhJWcBgMhTFHFcn68azakXsaOU-qv9Cjfaoe8qzhLRgKlnAvqJ5f1466TgR7nNXXfzMFOcvi6gfs8EhgWbeRQSCsy0JjoeCc9Hx8GIeTh1darfVb7YLLLwCfvEhVgy-K8veVO_5QPh9lWzJqq32PVoUryv5qWp2B30e6bLrRKH1TAqNZthOb5QadQUKB9iQsnYgvsanuqBENnC7U42jGjwbkosKFBMhvyrx3KFv39AYiBf2TBi8L0IZ9dlDEAW-fk8mRwsiFAAhombPUcA91KmATFdAW8vxuo7nrvAFwF_iNvVrPiX2HJR0y_RzV_F9CwL8g8OnwOqjC2kZLErI7_qdtxO4KxFxjLWntFrSZjwxbis9MrFlJJD2TObpC-Y--M3V700Uqg0u9hU0jgeUlOfLhRnxf_is2UYtYH4G6rFvX_QfYp5tisu1dZFyqF0Fe68EXyocjQ%3D%3D)
**This. Is. Huge.** The Texas Senate race is about to be the most expensive race in the entire country next year. Ted Cruz’s opponent, Colin Allred, raised $6.2 million in just two months. **This will be the biggest and most expensive Senate race next year.**

[**STAND WITH TED CRUZ >>**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=020003bb38b9486f8a199dd0604ec77c&_e=TPCNiqWO2zInjQhJWcBgMhTFHFcn68azakXsaOU-qv9Cjfaoe8qzhLRgKlnAvqJ5f1466TgR7nNXXfzMFOcvi6gfs8EhgWbeRQSCsy0JjoeCc9Hx8GIeTh1darfVb7YLLLwCfvEhVgy-K8veVO_5QPh9lWzJqq32PVoUryv5qWp2B30e6bLrRKH1TAqNZthOb5QadQUKB9iQsnYgvsanuqBENnC7U42jGjwbkosKFBMhvyrx3KFv39AYiBf2TBi8L0IZ9dlDEAW-fk8mRwsiFAAhombPUcA91KmATFdAW8vxuo7nrvAFwF_iNvVrPiX2t6aMWU5IRyUVXNI5oLDY7ugRaq5z1Cxu9sBERX0ywFxtg9CRo2k3cBg9SRiKjGZ3Tvo5gHGhH4CMgUhb23Mrj2_aizOhIefeLg_v0CepBw9Ib-hwMULvIzxax_uxlNfGuoRQkbPCKwGCSEELq3IbaQ%3D%3D)
In the 2018 Senate election:

* **It was surprisingly close;** Ted Cruz won by ONLY 3%

* **Cruz’s opponent raised $80 million** for the seat 6 years ago. In 2018, Beto O’Rourke raised $6 million in 9 months. Colin Allred has hit that number in LESS THAN TWO MONTHS ALREADY.

name: Tim Scott
subject: About this week
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR AMERICA
body:
I've got good news and bad news

| |
---
| | | Friend,

My team set an ambitious goal for this week: **_[100 donors from every state.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztlasni97kdh1ct7epuod3k4vqt52ecv0vd7amj0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdj6cp72c5h2bs "100 donors from every state.")_**

We had a meeting to go over the numbers and I've got good news and bad news.

The bad news is that we still need 3 more donors from your state to knock this goal out of the park.

**_The good news? All it takes is a $1 gift to help._**

---
| | | [CHIP IN $1](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0qfoptbpclkuflb1bo4hj8eqmrf4dglucdank78_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdj6cp72c5h2bs "CHIP IN $1")
---
| | | [CHIP IN A DIFFERENT AMOUNT](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zbo3jr97uhpibbalbnao70g2llgbfv09tpjnmcvo_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdj6cp72c5h2bs "CHIP IN A DIFFERENT AMOUNT")
---

I know I've been able to count on your help in the past, which is why I knew you would be a good person for me to ask for help again.

**_[If you can, would you chip in just $1 to help me hit my weekly goal?](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zc0kqh1fvtejrguu39am920fkd6m3radeedejm2g_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdj6cp72c5h2bs "If you can, would you chip in just $1 to help me hit my weekly goal?")_** It's not easy to fund a campaign and I won't be able to do this without you.

Thank you for your commitment to Team Tim Scott and to our mission of restoring Faith in America.

God Bless,

Tim

---
* * *
---
| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zl1q3ii8d3fv8m12nkddhnhqqu1rau15agdurbn8_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdj6cp72c5h2bs "JOIN ME NOW")
---

_If you 're able-bodied, you work.
If you take out a loan, you pay it back.
And if you commit a violent crime, you go to jail.

America needs more victors and less victims._

These aren't just conservative values, they're American values. And as President, I will defend them.

**_[If you agree, will you join my team?](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z56k8apjs2n9fcbpbp79nr1oq5afkpme7gi2qvlg_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdj6cp72c5h2bs "If you agree, will you join my team?")_**

---
| | | [STAND WITH ME](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0g6b1d6mvu9qsmqpcp4ngjqo6rhnisvai78klkg_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdj6cp72c5h2bs "STAND WITH ME")
---

Democrats have chosen a culture of grievance over greatness, and victimhood over victory. **We CANNOT let them destroy our values and destroy our country.**

I believe that with faith and American values, our country's future can be brighter than ever before. But this fight isn't going to be easy.

**_[I need your help! Will you join me in the fight for America's future?](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zq59bmp7fembtmbld0javohd0fun799qafei90do_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdj6cp72c5h2bs "I need your help! Will you join me in the fight for America’s future?")_**

Thank You & God Bless
- Tim Scott

---
| | | [STAND WITH ME](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zm32sev7p9ca8di7le262938019i7ggh0a9vdfcg_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdj6cp72c5h2bs "STAND WITH ME")
---

name: Team Lucas Kunce
subject: The national GOP is bailing out Josh Hawley
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
What we learned from Hawley’s FEC filing this weekend:
#
We got some big news over the weekend, Peter.
On Saturday, every Senate candidate across the country was required to submit their second quarter fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission. **Here’s how it shook out in Missouri’s U.S. Senate race:**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35041?refcode=em20230717-3412&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3412%2E614464%2E7wIFLJ)
**Our campaign set another fundraising record — $2.3 million raised since January, all thanks to real people just like you. That’s the most ever raised in the first 6 months by a U.S. Senate challenger in Missouri.**
Lucas + our whole team are blown away by the support you’ve shown this campaign over the last six months and we’re so proud to be a truly people-powered movement.
But here’s the rub: **Over these last six months, national GOP insiders and mega-donors have done everything in their power to bail out Josh Hawley.**
**FIRST:** After a poll showed Hawley’s approval underwater with Missouri voters — at just 42% — insiders at the National Republican Senatorial Committee have now spent months attacking Lucas.
**THEN:** National Republican groups transferred hundreds of thousands of dollars into Hawley’s campaign to bail him out after our grassroots movement outraised him.
**AND NOW:** GOP mega-donors have launched a brand new Super PAC to prop up Hawley’s flailing campaign and fund _even more_ attacks against Lucas.
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY: CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35041?refcode=em20230717-3412&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3412%2E614464%2E7wIFLJ)**
**We already knew that national Republicans view the movement we’re building together as a threat, but this makes it clearer than ever: They know Lucas Kunce can defeat Josh Hawley.**
If these are the kind of resources they’re willing to spend in the off-year to make Josh Hawley look strong, it’s only a matter of time before they start spending even more to ramp up their attacks.
**That’s why we need your help today, Peter.** Lucas launched this campaign in January so we’d have time to raise the money we need to mount a serious challenge to a corrupt, incumbent politician like Hawley — and the best way we’ll be able to do that is by keeping up our record-breaking grassroots momentum.
We don’t need our grassroots supporters to match these giant mega-donor checks. But we do need the resources to get Lucas’ message in front of voters and continue building a winning campaign. Any amount makes a difference.
**[So please, will you rush a donation of $10 or whatever you can afford to our grassroots movement to elect Lucas Kunce? Lucas doesn’t take a cent from corporate PACs or any corrupt exec responsible for stripping our country for parts — he’s relying on real people like you to power our campaign forward.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35041?refcode=em20230717-3412&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3412%2E614464%2E7wIFLJ)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35042?refcode=em20230717-3412&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=3412%2E614464%2E7wIFLJ) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35042?refcode=em20230717-3412&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=3412%2E614464%2E7wIFLJ) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35042?refcode=em20230717-3412&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=3412%2E614464%2E7wIFLJ) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35042?refcode=em20230717-3412&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=3412%2E614464%2E7wIFLJ) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35042?refcode=em20230717-3412&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=3412%2E614464%2E7wIFLJ) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35042?refcode=em20230717-3412&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=3412%2E614464%2E7wIFLJ) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35041?refcode=em20230717-3412&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=3412%2E614464%2E7wIFLJ)
---
This is our chance to defeat Josh Hawley and finally take Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat back for everyday people — and we can’t afford to waste it.
Thanks for all your help,
— Team Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230717-3412-footer&t=11&refcode2=3412_614464_7wIFLJ&akid=3412%2E614464%2E7wIFLJ)**

name: Tuberville Survey Team
subject: RE: Your Priorities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
Share your thoughts >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/6d667358b4f448d8/031740bb08c15144c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---

We’re briefly reaching out to see what your **TOP POLICY/ISSUE PRIORITIES** are for the remainder of July, August, and September. name: Our Revolution
subject: NEWS: Leveraging power ahead of 2024
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
| |
## INSIDER NEWS FROM THE FRONTLINES OF THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION
* * *
## **HEADLINES: Our Mission | Student Debt Town Hall | Ro Khanna Joins Our Activists | Wages, Climate, Healthcare | 1000 Progressives & Counting | Seattle Endorsements**** |** ** & MORE!**
★ ★ ★ [
](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8915?t=11&akid=4463%2E5885482%2Exjdgrs) [](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8915?t=12&akid=4463%2E5885482%2Exjdgrs) **** As we approach **Our Revolution’s 8th Birthday** , let’s revisit the mission given to us by our founder **Bernie Sanders** : Organize and mobilize the grassroots behind policies and candidates that put people over corporate power.

Since 2016, we’ve elected over **1000 progressives** at every level of government, and our **popular policies** have majority, mainstream support.

And, heading into 2024, we have a concrete plan of action to leverage this power for real wins - because **progressives are now a key voting bloc** that can’t be ignored.

As Our Revolution Executive Director **Joseph Geevarghese told NPR’s Morning Edition** this week: _“Biden has got to fight like hell in the remaining period of time to show voters that he’s doing everything in his power to deliver on the pocketbook issues that matter to them.”_

That’s why Our Revolution is organizing our grassroots base to push NOW for actions that President Biden can deliver on like **student debt, climate, healthcare, wages,** and more — Democrats cannot fail to deliver at this moment.

[**Despite our corrupt political system, there is a path to victory on these critical issues, but it will take collective action and resources. Please pitch in a donation to support vital organizing work.**](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8915?t=13&akid=4463%2E5885482%2Exjdgrs) ★ ★ ★ [](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8915?t=14&akid=4463%2E5885482%2Exjdgrs)
★ ★ ★ [](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8915?t=15&akid=4463%2E5885482%2Exjdgrs) News broke on Friday that **President Biden** canceled $39 Billion in student debt for 800,000 borrowers through administrative fixes.

This BIG WIN comes after Our Revolution hosted a **LIVE** [**Student Debt Town Hall**](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8883?t=16&akid=4463%2E5885482%2Exjdgrs) **with Rep. Ro Khanna** where our members shared powerful stories and discussed our inside-outside push.

**The President can still use his executive authority to cancel debt, pause payments, and crack down on predatory lending practices.** [](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8915?t=17&akid=4463%2E5885482%2Exjdgrs) "The President should cancel student debt in the Higher Education Act. He should zero out the accounts,” **[Ro told us on Monday.](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8875?t=18&akid=4463%2E5885482%2Exjdgrs)** “If the Supreme Court rules against us then let’s see if they’ll actually enforce the collection of debt that has already been canceled.”

“Congress has given the Executive the power to do this. The President needs to push and invoke these authorities and cancel it," [**Ro said on the call.**](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8876?t=19&akid=4463%2E5885482%2Exjdgrs) “We’ve got to be assertive at a time that the other side is taking action that is unconstitutional.” [](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8915?t=20&akid=4463%2E5885482%2Exjdgrs) While Rep. Khanna teams up with progressive lawmakers to work the levers of power from the inside, on a parallel outside track, we’re organizing our grassroots members to flood comments into the Secretary of Education to show the strength of our demand.

You can help! Submit your story online, explaining how restarting student debt will affect you and your family. Some of our members will even be featured at the live virtual hearing by the **Department of Education** on Tuesday!

Make sure to mention your activism with **Our Revolution** , and we will make sure your story is heard during this important rule-making process!

[**SUBMIT YOUR STUDENT DEBT STORY**](https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/student_debt_relief/?t=21&akid=4463%2E5885482%2Exjdgrs)
★ ★ ★ [](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8915?t=22&akid=4463%2E5885482%2Exjdgrs)
Barbara Koehrer - an Our Revolution member since 2016 - spoke out at our Student Debt Town Hall on Monday. **[Barbara told us she owes $176,000](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8877?t=23&akid=4463%2E5885482%2Exjdgrs)** and financially struggles to care for her aging parents. “The first time I felt financially free was due to the pandemic and the pausing of loan payments,” she said.

**[Virginia Spindler, 63, told us her family has $237,000 in student debt.](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8878?t=24&akid=4463%2E5885482%2Exjdgrs)** “We wanted our daughters to go to college and sold our house to help. If payments resume, we'll struggle with housing and food,” Virginia said. “It hurts to look at old family photos because it reminds me of what we've lost." [](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8915?t=25&akid=4463%2E5885482%2Exjdgrs) **[Vanessa Torres, 36, told us she has $186,000 in student debt](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8882?t=26&akid=4463%2E5885482%2Exjdgrs)** , mostly from law school. “I grew up very poor, often homeless, raised by a single mom dealing with addiction. I knew an education was the only way out of poverty for me,” she said.

“I got accepted to my dream school - Harvard - but now I can't afford the payments because rent has sky-rocketed. I worry about my siblings, and wish I could buy us a home so we’d always have a place to live,” Vanessa said.

These stories are painful — but more than getting angry, we need to get active. Restarting student debt - with interest - in the middle of an affordability crisis will be an economic disaster. Let's make sure the President delivers on his promise to 45 million Americans. ★ ★ ★ **Our Revolution** is waging major campaigns on the issues that matter most to our members in this moment of progressive leverage ahead of 2024: [](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8915?t=27&akid=4463%2E5885482%2Exjdgrs) **Raise the Wage** \- Our Revolution is partnering with **One Fair Wage** to put a **$20+ MINIMUM WAGE** on the ballot in critical swing states like OH and AZ in 2024. Not only will this motivate our voters to the polls, but it will mean millions of people getting a long overdue pay raise so they no longer have to choose between rent and groceries. [ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8915?t=28&akid=4463%2E5885482%2Exjdgrs) **End Fossil Fuels** \- The climate fight is heating up right now as Manchin, Sinema, and the GOP prepare to double down on fossil fuel drilling in must-pass bills this fall. Right now, we’re teaming up with our allies at **Greenpeace** and **Friends of the Earth** to make sure progressives in Congress have enough votes to block Big Oil. [](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8915?t=29&akid=4463%2E5885482%2Exjdgrs) **End Medical Debt & Big Pharma Price Gouging** \- Bernie is leveraging his power as HELP Chair in the Senate to block nominees in exchange for lower drug prices, and our members are organizing on the outside to stop medical debt by taking on price-gouging hospitals and predatory debt collectors. ★ ★ ★ **ONE FAIR WAGE CHICAGO** [
](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8915?t=30&akid=4463%2E5885482%2Exjdgrs) **Our Revolution** joined **One Fair Wage** and new Chicago **Mayor Brandon Johnson** \- who we helped elect! - for a [**Server for a Day**](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8879?t=31&akid=4463%2E5885482%2Exjdgrs) event at Netroots on Thursday.

The event is part of our campaign to get the Chicago City Council to pass an **$18 an hour minimum wage** and give Chicago workers a well-deserved pay raise — and not leave tipped workers behind! ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ [](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8915?t=32&akid=4463%2E5885482%2Exjdgrs)
We mentioned at the top that **1000 Our Revolution-backed candidates** have been elected to public office - and we’re still just getting started!

While the 2024 presidential race is taking center stage in the media, we’re getting a jump start on making sure progressives pick up more House and Senate seats — including replacing corporatists like **Kyrsten Sinema** in Arizona.

Our voter mobilization strategy has been **battle-tested against billionaire SuperPACs** , and we have a proven record of winning 2 out of 3 races we’ve endorsed in.

[**We truly appreciate everyone who has invested in the success of Our Revolution, and hope you’ll pitch in now to give us a head start on the important races we must win in 2024.**](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8915?t=33&akid=4463%2E5885482%2Exjdgrs) ★ ★ ★ [](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8915?t=34&akid=4463%2E5885482%2Exjdgrs) New endorsements rolling out in Washington State!

Our Revolution and Pramila Jayapal are backing **Jorge Baron** and **Teresa Mosqueda** for King County Council and **Tammy Morales** for Seattle City Council!

These endorsements were made with democratic input from Our Revolution members in Washington. Ballots dropped on Friday and election day is August 1st! ★ ★ ★
[](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8915?t=35&akid=4463%2E5885482%2Exjdgrs)

**Bernie never gives up the fight, and neither do we!**
When you pitch in a donation of $10 ($5 if you’re already a monthly member), we’ll send you this iconic new Bernie sticker as our thanks.

[**HELP EXPAND OUR WORK!**](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8880?t=36&akid=4463%2E5885482%2Exjdgrs)

★ ★ ★

[](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8915?t=37&akid=4463%2E5885482%2Exjdgrs)

[**WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN!**](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?t=38&akid=4463%2E5885482%2Exjdgrs)

★ ★ ★ |
---|---

* * *
[Facebook](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1&akid=4463%2E5885482%2Exjdgrs) | [Twitter](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=2&akid=4463%2E5885482%2Exjdgrs) | [Instagram](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=3&akid=4463%2E5885482%2Exjdgrs) | [Youtube](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=4&akid=4463%2E5885482%2Exjdgrs) | [Website](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=5&akid=4463%2E5885482%2Exjdgrs) | [Sign Up](https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/signup_2109/?t=6&akid=4463%2E5885482%2Exjdgrs)
---
[](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5919?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230717_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter_rs.Si-zHB&t=7&akid=4463%2E5885482%2Exjdgrs)

****Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America.

[Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the establishment by committing to a recurring donation of just $5 or more a month!](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5920?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230717_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter_rs.zdESXp&t=8&akid=4463%2E5885482%2Exjdgrs)

**** | [GIVE MONTHLY](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5921?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230717_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter_rs.M8BdLu&t=9&akid=4463%2E5885482%2Exjdgrs)
---
****
**** [GIVE ONCE](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5922?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230717_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter_rs.WTEDrg&t=10&akid=4463%2E5885482%2Exjdgrs)
---

[Click here to unsubscribe from Our Revolution's email list.](https://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=4463%2E5885482%2Exjdgrs)

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.

subject: 29 Days and Counting
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BECKY EDWARDS FOR CONGRESS
body:
As our temperatures get warmer and warmer, this race for Congress is also heating up. | | | | |
---
# 29 Days and Counting
|
---
Team Becky,
As our temperatures get warmer and warmer, this race for Congress is also heating up.
As of today, **there are just 29 days** until ballots begin to drop. What does that mean? It means we have less than a month before thousands of votes are cast in the primary race for Utah’s second congressional district.
In the meantime, every single day matters.
I’m sure you know me by now–an effective five-term lawmaker, the only candidate in this primary who has balanced a budget as a legislator, and a proud 30-year resident of CD2. But I need to get that message to every voter in our district.
[**Would you be willing to chip in to help us get there? Even $29 will help us reach hundreds of voters!** ](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=9857a22cb3&e=6484bb6dd5)
With appreciation,
Becky

|

name: James O'Keefe
subject: Their final attack on me . . .
body:
14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0hauutq0ic9f3ai7hna0ef0cetpqekg171n1iko_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdj62o75c1h2bs)
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4r2cfrhn5iralb1t4vqk14m524gk0m5tfdt7mtg_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdj62o75c1h2bs)
Dear Friend,

Fourteen years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

You’ve seen my work. Most Americans have.

In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me.

It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I’m unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and **no one to stop me.**

Since I was fired, I’ve chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. **And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned.**

Those 14 years were formative.

When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle.

I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership.

Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan’s quote on leadership: “Winning has a price. **And leadership has a price**.”

I’ve been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, **yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded.**

In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me.

And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That’s why I’m writing you today to **[ask for your support to my legal defense fund.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc9c2vnqmjt6hgr9s8mogqp0d31nh20msedetdjo_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdj62o75c1h2bs)**

My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up **[the fund to pay attorney costs](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zudm45ugfenv3ndg5p1rk2b41qpll7sbd0n87m90_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdj62o75c1h2bs)** that will quickly pile up.

As I mentioned, this isn’t my first rodeo so I know that **the cost will exceed $500,000**.

Good attorneys aren’t cheap, and my pockets are not deep.

No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me.

That’s where you come in. **[Will you chip in and help me defend myself](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zao1a0esfqmt10ia2ffijvh930vhpalc9sdi3jgo_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdj62o75c1h2bs)?**

When you do, I’ll be following up as the case progresses but I’ll also keep you informed of the great work I’m doing at OMG . . . and it’s exciting!

A fresh start, being forced to start over, I’ll admit is thrilling. And I’m starting armed with all of the lessons I’ve learned to avoid the pitfalls I’ve experienced.

Me and my teams are more efficient, we’re more productive, and our work hits like a sledgehammer.

But my work will be silenced if my former employer gets their way. Or the distractions of a court battle and its costs may become overwhelming.

**[I’m asking you to STAND UP FOR ME, so I can keep working](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbmrthtpu755h6l34ne7cbqnmpqtp9809duphtm0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdj62o75c1h2bs)**. And I’ll commit to you that **I will NOT let you down**.

So please, **[make a donation to my legal defense fund through Liberty Guard](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6h6bm1toqg4nu3trjiaf9v852ghpst0udl31uao_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdj62o75c1h2bs)**. We have a long way to do to hit our goal, so please, donate as much as you can.

Thank you for your direct or indirect support over the years. Your views, donations or simply talking about my work to friends and family has kept me going for 14 years . . . **and we cannot stop now!**

Respectfully,

James O’Keefe

P.S. I have 20 days to file my response to the lawsuit. I have to raise enough money to pay for a retainer and cover the legal work to defend against this lawsuit. This is unfortunately urgent so please, **[donate today](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6e2taai5vvsfvnknnhulla80pvuu3va04b5lhio_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdj62o75c1h2bs)**.

---

body:

Here's something I'm proud of as I run this campaign: I'm living my values.

I refuse to take corporate PAC money to fund our campaign. _Instead, I’m focused on gathering small-dollar donations (from emails like this one!) and building a mighty group of supporters._

Even as I run for Congress, I am still hard at work for you in the legislature. Fighting climate change, getting forever chemicals out of toys and cosmetics, and stopping big corporations like Ticketmaster from ripping off consumers are too important for our communities.

I hope this is clear: **Nothing is more important to me than the people I serve, and am planning to continue serving in Congress.** It’s crucial that in this election, where voters will elect their first new representative in two decades, we get it right.

Your early support will help send a proven progressive, community-focused leader to Washington to fight for you. And because I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC money, I rely on donations from supporters like you!

**[Your $3 donation will help fund our on-the-ground operations and keep our momentum high in these summer months. Can I count on you to contribute your first donation right now? Peter, America is catching on to what the people of Florida have become accustomed to for five years now:** when Governor DeSantis says he is going to do something, _he does it._** Need proof? **_Just take at the latest polls coming out of Nevada, Wisconsin, Pennsylvania, Arizona, and Georgia_** that show Ron DeSantis BEATING Joe Biden. **No other candidate can show that**. The Left is terrified of Gov. DeSantis.
* They know he _will_ rip up Bidenomics at the roots.
* They know he _will_ build the wall and stop the invasion.
* They know he _will_ give parents back their voice in the classroom by banning CRT and pornographic content for young kids.
* They know he _will_ put an end to the culture of losing and excuses that has surrounded the Republican party.
* They know he _won't ever_ back down.

We've let the radical Left win for far too long, and it has crippled our country. Ron DeSantis is the only candidate in this race who can crush Joe Biden next November (_and has the record of doing exactly that_). That's why we're asking for your support today. Today, we're making it easier for you to support the Governor. **With just the tap of a button, you can send in a $25 donation --an amount that will make an incredible impact on the Governor's presidential campaign**. _By clicking below, you are making an immediate contribution:_

We're asking you to **match your most recent contribution** to help our team put an END to America's nightmare under Joe Biden's administration. **Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=e99b0d972b27425a9df4e43a7d15a9e0&_e=J-3msFltPYibcUm7KRcx9RgiCjZUgsHs87fd67d6_bP98fdh3TlCRhERHeM8zR9LliT4896dZS2xElzrTxYlAg5coRK6ps6xl2NnrQhdijT2ZxGn91Ivcf-aV0ErSPRqeK0SkCHEX69hZq7me6sXZR1LRsp3Bx5v-2l9G9pYC30gy7gm3YpyPJ3AcC6iTCTkg6C4VJzpvujAY8KyHESA90TW6CPo8RtXclIe59xKgLJQvY09OiInYRpD2NDp9rDNarP8zQQUxJHMPzb4w_mLfowfEW8qTj6xQu8og9_4P6sV48dWx0NXT3rQNajeLdsJg3PDGkb8FB62fuhcqcTh4Vj4WMGIC17xQ2sOCJQqkgWbAkAcFQ7CFQY2WIZ0k7dhxtkUcXpiJVSbJnblVTFcOw%3D%3D)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
