Ron DeSantis is the ONLY candidate in this election with a winning record against Faucism, the woke mob, and ESG. Can we count on your support? By clicking below, you are making an immediate contribution | | If you've saved payment information with WinRed, your donation will go through automatically. We're ready to see our Great American Comeback come to life. Gov. DeSantis has the energy to kick this campaign into overdrive, and with your help, we're going to get there. In Freedom, Team DeSantis Meet Ron DeSantis | | | | | A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment. In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health. In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular. Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities: Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates, Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities, Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT, Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable, Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency, Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation, Turning Florida into a model for election integrity, Protecting the unborn, Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state, Expanding education freedom, Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities, Lowering prescription drug costs, Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable, Creating a universal school choice program, Delivering record-breaking tax relief, Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership, Supporting law enforcement and our veterans, Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders, Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court, ...and so much more. After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn't stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism." Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: Record tax relief ESG prohibitions Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state's infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). #
---
Hi friends, Nikki recently sent over our reelection campaign’s Official Priorities Survey and asked people like you to share your top priorities as we map out our strategy for the weeks and months ahead. We received an outpouring of thoughtful responses, so we wanted to take a moment to share what’s been top of mind for folks across our grassroots movement:
* Jean wrote that we must include climate-smart regenerative agriculture practices in the 2023 Farm Bill — comprehensive legislation that Nikki is working hard to pass in Congress.

* Steve expressed concerns about the lack of access to affordable housing, with Tina and Susanna agreeing that finding affordable housing options for the most vulnerable members of our society is critically important.

* And Bharat summed up his top priorities by simply responding: “All of the above.”

Nikki is working across the aisle in Congress to deliver meaningful results for Jean, Steve, Susanna, Bharat, folks in IL-13, and families across the country. Just last month, she launched “Farm Bill 101,” an initiative highlighting how the food programs and agricultural research she’s advocating for in the Farm Bill will benefit communities across Central and Southern Illinois. **[If you’re ready to keep fighting alongside Nikki to make progress on these issues (and more!), will you chip in a few dollars to support our reelection campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66632525/417023634/-930160167?refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230717_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTJmNmQ3Ny1kODI0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1BL9zx23ziTpIy7y2VQZDe4kYzctrO0rz0uZUiTKieA=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66632526/417023635/-930160167?amount=10&refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230717_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTJmNmQ3Ny1kODI0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1BL9zx23ziTpIy7y2VQZDe4kYzctrO0rz0uZUiTKieA=)

name: Ro Khanna
subject: A blank check to defense contractors
body:
#
Peter,
For decades, legacy military contractors have charged the federal government [exorbitant amounts of money](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/136026?t=1&akid=29933%2E1203867%2EmYlEWC) for everything from fighter jets to basic hardware. Lockheed Martin, for example, has used its monopoly on F-35 fighter jets to profit from maintenance only they can provide, and the work needed to support and upgrade existing jets is expected to cost taxpayers over $1.3 trillion. TransDigm, another contractor responsible for supplying spare parts for the military, was found to be charging the Pentagon [more than four times the market price](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/136027?t=2&akid=29933%2E1203867%2EmYlEWC) for their products.
And this latest defense budget only feeds this pattern. This defense spending proposal constitutes [56 percent](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/136028?t=3&akid=29933%2E1203867%2EmYlEWC) of our nation’s discretionary budget, and about half of that is allocated to defense contractors.
Keeping America strong starts at home. It means ensuring access to quality, affordable healthcare and education, strengthening our economy with good-paying jobs, and giving Americans the tools they need to pursue the American Dream.
[**Sign if you agree: Bloated military spending is not the answer. We must put our tax dollars to help working Americans at home.**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/136031?t=4&akid=29933%2E1203867%2EmYlEWC)
I was proud to be the sole dissenting vote on the $886 billion defense budget in the House Armed Services Committee recently. The decision was obvious to me: We can’t continue to sign a blank check to price-gouging defense contractors while Americans struggle here at home.
We have an obligation to invest taxpayer money in programs and policies that are designed to support the American public and move our country forward. It’s time for us to put our country’s needs before the profits of monopolistic military contractors.
In solidarity,
Ro
Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=5&akid=29933%2E1203867%2EmYlEWC) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=6&akid=29933%2E1203867%2EmYlEWC) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230717-29933-footer&t=7&refcode2=29933_1203867_mYlEWC&akid=29933%2E1203867%2EmYlEWC)**
---

subject: We’re very close

body:
Help us get our ad live.
#
Derek —
We set a $40,000 goal to run our new ad, Situation, down in Alabama, because it’s time to fight back against Tommy Tuberville.
We’re close. As a matter of fact, we could get over the top today.
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/3042?c0=vv-c4-em-july23-situation.tlwgeU&refcode=em230717-1-30&t=1&akid=12738%2E3013755%2Eu747as)
Here’s why this is so important:
Bullies like Tuberville don’t know what it’s like to get hit back.
But if VoteVets runs this ad in his home state, on his home turf, that sends a big message.
People start to change their minds. He’ll start getting calls. He’ll start hearing from Veterans. He might even get pushed by some Republicans to stand down.
That pressure is only going to get worse, and we’re not going to let up.
**[So please, if you can: Make your first donation, $3 or anything you can. Help us get that ad live. Do it for the men and women who serve, because they can’t fight him on this. We can.](https://act.votevets.org/go/3042?c0=vv-c4-em-july23-situation.tlwgeU&refcode=em230717-1-30&t=2&akid=12738%2E3013755%2Eu747as)**

name: Andy Beshear
subject: Glad to have you in my corner.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
A heartfelt thank you for your incredible support! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66634139/417024787/950424521?refcode=em23_230717_ddlnty_fndd_gq_act___ab_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230717_ddlnty_fndd_gq_act___ab_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=1ff59ab5-d924-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmY1OWFiNS1kOTI0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cpl6-FHArCJ9CSvA_txcwhjx38Dt6OKn8gR87q6cpeM=) Peter,

With less than four months until Election Day, I wanted to reach out and offer some thoughts and, more than anything—my gratitude.

The July mid-month deadline came and went, and I'm proud to report that we're in a position to finish this month with strong fundraising numbers. This campaign has real momentum, and there's good reason to be excited about the months ahead!

I was on the road this weekend, shaking hands and speaking with Kentuckians in Shelbyville, Bardstown, Georgetown, Richmond, Bowling Green, and Lexington. I've seen firsthand just how energized this grassroots team is to get out and knock on doors, hand out yard signs, and remind Kentuckians what this campaign is all about!

Election Day will be here before we know it. And once the polls are closed, the ballots are counted, and the results are in, I'm confident that we'll be getting right back to work. Together, we'll keep making strides forward to make Kentucky the best state in the nation.

This race isn't over, and it won't be a walk in the park. But I have the best team in the world in my corner, and I'm grateful for your unwavering support.

Thanks for being a part of this team, Peter.

Andy | | **Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Will you chip in today to Andy's re-election campaign?** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66634140/417024788/950424521?refcode=em23_230717_ddlnty_fndd_gq_act___ab_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230717_ddlnty_fndd_gq_act___ab_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=1ff59ab5-d924-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmY1OWFiNS1kOTI0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cpl6-FHArCJ9CSvA_txcwhjx38Dt6OKn8gR87q6cpeM=)

name: Joe Kerr
subject: Share your thoughts
body:
| | |
---
|
---
| Hi, it's Joe Kerr.
I've been a Fire Captain with the Orange County Fire Authority for over thirty years and I'm running for Congress because I want to continue to serve my community and find solutions to our most challenging problems.
It's no secret that extremist politicians like Young Kim only look out for themselves - not their constituents. I'm reaching out today because I want to hear directly from voters to ensure I'm putting your concerns first.
[My team and I put together a priorities survey to send out to top supporters about the issues you're facing and what you want to see your representative fight for in Congress. Will you take a minute and share your thoughts with me?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001x_aUTafauFzRU7YdQVDhuQanmgwLo_PoT1n4k3Kat-FmPOhgVpq4GFkWsCGvFkUXcAJKcLlilXR3qbKRTxSkShXddTlFPfONOqACZzt1xvry7dWuDMIWEZItEGwDWQraJmeUCwI6iNEwrMTxzMY0mWAFSGSiE9Brh2rDyDaht-lR-Nwu_PA3IKk03Qxj6NjomEqZ-B06_x-mFOELg_SzNnai2WMQ8ucBuEPAyOjoQq3CjzlKNr2tXkeKjrRe4eV9&c=W2gSed6VquBL27_s74NLEgQ-zk1_pDkgf1fK_L-WW3gZ5fJX1AkDcQ==&ch=We-uLEHKcxnCOilyRSBlDzJym2aS4H9-UNm2cPoOQHO70Zfa7CSIYg==)

It's no secret that extremist politicians like Young Kim only look out for themselves - not their constituents. I'm reaching out today because I want to hear directly from voters to ensure I'm putting your concerns first. == | | == | From ending the epidemic of gun violence to providing affordable and accessible healthcare and tackling the homelessness crisis, I am 100% committed to taking on the issues that are impacting hard-working Californians. I believe that with help from grassroots supporters like you, we can win this race and elect a pragmatic, problem-solving leader and public safety champion to Congress. == | | == I can't wait to read your responses! Joe | | | | | | | | Joe Kerr for Congress | 29 Palma Valley, Coto de Caza, CA 92679 www.joekerrforcongress.com | | Sent by mailto:info@joekerrforcongress.com

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch Sues for FBI Records of Investigations of Parents Spurred by October 2021 Merrick Garland Memo
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently that it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Justice for all FBI communications from bureau officials using several systems and databases regarding investigations carried out after an October 4, 2021, memo from Attorney General Merrick Garland instructing investigators to target American parents due to an alleged “increase in harassment, intimidation and threats of violence against school board members, teachers and workers in our nation’s public schools”.

| | |
---
---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Jul 17, 2023

clean_body: Judicial Watch announced recently that it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Justice for all FBI communications from bureau officials using several systems and databases regarding investigations carried out after an October 4, 2021, memo from Attorney General Merrick Garland instructing investigators to target American parents due to an alleged “increase in harassment, intimidation and threats of violence against school board members, teachers and workers in our nation’s public schools”. | | | | | | Because no one is above the law! | Jul 17, 2023 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | Judicial Watch announced recently that it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Justice for all FBI communications from bureau officials using several systems and databases regarding investigations carried out after an October 4, 2021, memo from Attorney General Merrick Garland instructing investigators to target American parents due to an alleged “increase in harassment, intimidation and threats of violence against school board members, teachers and workers in our nation’s public schools”. ---|--- | | | | | The Biden administration will again delay enforcing a law requiring driver’s license security standards designed to avert another terrorist attack because it could cause “undue burden and confusion” for those using licenses that fail to meet federal standards. The administration has already used COVID-19 as an excuse to postpone the security measure’s implementation, asserting that more time—two years—is needed to address the lingering impacts of the pandemic on the ability to obtain a compliant license. It is important to note that states had many years to comply long before COVID-19. ---|--- | | | | | The lawsuit names the National Biosurveillance Integration Center (NBIC) and the Office of Health Affairs, which are part of DHS’s U.S. Biological Defense Program, which DHS states was established to increase the U.S.’s “preparedness against chemical and biological threats through improved threat awareness, advanced surveillance and detection, and responsive countermeasures.” The Ground Truth Network was set up under the National Biosurveillance Integration Center. ---|--- | | | | | In the most recently exposed Biden administration scheme to combat misinformation, the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) colluded with a compromised Ukrainian intelligence agency to censor the speech of Americans. The federal agency responsible for protecting the nation against terrorists, violent street gangs and serial killers joined forces with the Security Service of Ukraine (SBU), which is widely known to be infiltrated by Russian-aligned forces, to take down the authentic social media accounts of Americans. This includes a verified U.S. State Department profile and those belonging to American journalists. Interestingly, accounts targeted for removal by the SBU and FBI criticized Russian President Vladimir Putin and expressed pro-Ukrainian views. ---|--- | | | Townhall On Wednesday, FBI Director Christopher Wray appeared before the House Judiciary Committee, during which the targeting of Catholics and pro-lifers was addressed, and the exchanges about the matter made for particularly passionate moments. Just the News North Dakota is facing a lawsuit over its acceptance of mail-in ballots 13 days after Election Day and is among 18 states and Washington, D.C., that accept and tabulate ballots post-election. Fox News Military records obtained by a conservative watchdog show U.S. Air Force Academy instructional materials that include presentations addressing Critical Race Theory (CRT), White privilege and the Black Lives Matter (BLM) movement. | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2023, All Rights Reserved |

Friend,

You don't know me, but I'm Frank LaRose - **Green Beret, strong Christian conservative, and the strongest defender of election integrity in the country.**

**[I just launched my campaign for Senate in an effort to defeat a liberal Democrat who has been in elected office for almost 50 years- so I'm humbly asking for your help, Friend.](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=da5daedd2bd94fc39c87c6e11b878956&_e=jCRP_YMTgJ6gE3W_fMHRFajM9Pn2K5Y6ZeRIx6nBohCly3Vq2ldYfWmG0azv47xrEULS-GJ-CxNN1hyzk__NNx0iRTHlEpglcp3LEBlH-F8Ll7Vu6Hh4N1w-BVhxreicHawTJqM8kxKPI51ZyyxN9HISqel9HSYzwEkRl230HtSNktm25O-BdYNbEofjy0b2qxRCbpr8MKsjtmPC3cLbU-5c4kx9_fBswMJ_zLkzt93Olf2RBFVGTe-EFRVtwvAGUSLZqv-Bj2iKuOLPAZ_ArzjhhAUt3RTgGfhhdr131bp9MKJ7GE5OatNU_5xW-sqra1JTSVJepcXNhbtKRFA5dmFKwtx2X0RPdZwa97GGxmATsWlsAlDHKm3Ezh0FJc87YqJavHLWp3ZzGgZ0ynLdIXHHVX4Oik0ql0hxbJImjpc%3D "I just launched my campaign for Senate in an effort to defeat a liberal Democrat who has been in elected office for almost 50 years – so I’m humbly asking for your help, Friend.")**

Like most, I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth. I grew up working on a small, family-owned farm in Northeast Ohio & I joined the Army as soon as I graduated high school.

Growing up on a farm taught me the value of a strong work ethic & a sense of responsibility. Serving as a Special Forces Green Beret for over a decade taught me that the American Dream is worth fighting for.

_I 'm nothing special - just a proud American who always puts God & family first._

But the values that many Americans hold closest to our hearts - _**family, faith, & freedom**_ - are exactly the values that Democrats like Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and Sherrod Brown are working to destroy.

Americans are waking up to this fact, which is why Biden & Democrats will do anything to defeat conservatives like me.

**So I 'll be blunt, without support from Patriots like you, Democrats will hold onto this seat & keep the Senate for 2 more years. If that happens, it's all over.**

That's why I'm humbly asking if you'll chip in just a few bucks to help me win the most important Senate race in the entire country & stop the Left from destroying everything I fought to protect.

**[So please, before the end of the day, will you stand with me?](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=da5daedd2bd94fc39c87c6e11b878956&_e=jCRP_YMTgJ6gE3W_fMHRFajM9Pn2K5Y6ZeRIx6nBohCly3Vq2ldYfWmG0azv47xrEULS-GJ-CxNN1hyzk__NNx0iRTHlEpglcp3LEBlH-F8Ll7Vu6Hh4N1w-BVhxreicHawTJqM8kxKPI51ZyyxN9HISqel9HSYzwEkRl230HtSNktm25O-BdYNbEofjy0b2qxRCbpr8MKsjtmPC3cLbU-5c4kx9_fBswMJ_zLkzt93Olf2RBFVGTe-EFRVtwvAGUSLZqv-Bj2iKuOLPAZ_Ar1ru3Mk9hIQ8jAarNs-bRLndF7tSi7kB8qHCWspUSWkpJsZ8Na87A_V28kQJlf3iKNuesG9uvFihPpLCed2b5oUoWSSatvZmQ5EQZEXbY7tl2CXmQ7J6Al-qrDhkmXOyV9onVLpfX9tRlzH4oRnlf_4%3D "So please, before the end of the day, will you stand with me?")**

So, if you’re with us, will you click here to watch our launch video and then chip in $25 to help spread our message far and wide?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66634840/417025341/-1503589007?refcode=EM_BS_SIG_230717_FR_LaunchVideo_A0_na_U1_X2_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQyMzEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWRmZGUzNmMtZGEyNC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=81v76vtb67CsBBydXFMBccfhJ7gjN-WMnGwqOkMdqaM=)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66634841/417025342/-1503589007?refcode=EM_BS_SIG_230717_FR_LaunchVideo_A0_na_U1_X2_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQyMzEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWRmZGUzNmMtZGEyNC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=81v76vtb67CsBBydXFMBccfhJ7gjN-WMnGwqOkMdqaM=) | | | [Watch Joe's Video →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66634842/417025343/-1503589007?refcode=EM_BS_SIG_230717_FR_LaunchVideo_A0_na_U1_X2_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQyMzEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWRmZGUzNmMtZGEyNC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=81v76vtb67CsBBydXFMBccfhJ7gjN-WMnGwqOkMdqaM=)

When you come from a big Italian family like mine, there’s two things that are instilled in you: **the know-how to make homemade tomato sauce, and strong family values.**
From filling up dad’s truck with the best local, New Jersey tomatoes one could find, to crushing them with my cousins and helping mom finish it all off by boiling the jars—it took our whole family to make sure we had enough sauce for the entire year.
But those were our values, Peter—family, community, and working together to get results—and it’s why our family makes the best homemade tomato sauce you’ve ever tasted.
It’s also why—with your help—we’re going to build the strongest, most diverse grassroots team imaginable to flip New Jersey’s 7th District and help Democrats take back the House majority.
**It’s our secret sauce, Peter, but we need your help to make it.**
**[So please, if you’re committed to helping Democrats win one of the most competitive districts on the map and re-gain House control, will you watch our campaign’s launch video and then pitch in whatever you can to help us spread this new secret sauce?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66634843/417025344/-1503589007?refcode=EM_BS_SIG_230717_FR_LaunchVideo_A0_na_U1_X2_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQyMzEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWRmZGUzNmMtZGEyNC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=81v76vtb67CsBBydXFMBccfhJ7gjN-WMnGwqOkMdqaM=)**

subject: See Kari Lake in Oregon! Plus, Summer Events...
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/21bcd9906c81/were-off-and-running-8239409?e=ae2345792a)
---
|
---
| Did you see the big Trafalgar poll released at the Turning Point event last week? 30.8% of those polled preferred Kari Lake as President Trump's vice presidential running mate.

Now is your chance to see her in person!

Kari is coming to Oregon to help us raise money for Constitutional Carry for Oregon! Everything you'll need to know is at the link below. We CAN make Oregon the nation's 28th constitutional carry state. Get your ticket today!
---
| [Learn More or Buy Tix!](https://KerryMcQuisten.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a6f5300a53ab781de615e5a1&id=85074479a5&e=ae2345792a "Learn More or Buy Tix!")
---
| [ ](https://KerryMcQuisten.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a6f5300a53ab781de615e5a1&id=60cf9a31e3&e=ae2345792a)
---
|
---
| | I've been back and forth across the state hitting the summer events this month. Over the weekend, I was with the Baker County Republican Women. We collected approximately 1,000 signatures for Constitutional Carry, registered a pile of new Republican voters, and recruited about half a dozen new members.

The Marion County Fair was fun! Denise and Hunter at KYKN were on site for Newsmakers at Noon. On July 26, listen for Kari Lake to call in and help promote our event! I also attended the Oregon Federation of Republican Women’s Willamette Valley District Meeting, representing Baker County as its Vice President. Gotta say - the 90-minute waterfight that was the Polk County Republicans Independence Day Parade float ride was incredible!

**See you all at the Kari Lake event!**
---
| |
---
---
| | Baker County Republican Women's tent in Baker City. Hunter, Denise and I on KYKN from Marion County.
---
|
---
---
| | With CCFO Treasurer Carol Williams at the Marion County Fair, then hanging out with former Congressional nominee Amy Ryan Courser and Carol Zielinski of the Marion County Republicans / Capitol City Republican Women.
---
|
---
---
| | Vivien and her epic Trump T-shirt along with Oregon's National Committeeman to the RNC Solomon Yue in Polk County.
---
| [Visit www.KerryMcQuisten.com](https://KerryMcQuisten.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a6f5300a53ab781de615e5a1&id=dc8d2c3de7&e=ae2345792a "Visit www.KerryMcQuisten.com")

Judge Carluccio grew up with strong ethics and conservative values. She channeled those values when she became a federal prosecutor and put large-scale drug dealers, bank robbers, and money launderers behind bars. Her work has been recognized by the U.S. Secret Service and the Drug Enforcement Administration. Every single day, Judge Carluccio works to keep criminals off our streets and our families safe. She stands with our men and women in blue and has their back as they work to keep our communities safe. https://click.team.takebackpennsylvania.com/?qs=81f71a0fbecdf8ea3d4e20ca0bd79800314cc6adb81321cf176064f15a08a2fa56ce7b46483cbd15079370658d69da5b54c718bf08e0f740a89e5814392c77af ENDORSE JUDGE CARLUCCIO https://click.team.takebackpennsylvania.com/?qs=81f71a0fbecdf8ea3d4e20ca0bd79800314cc6adb81321cf176064f15a08a2fa56ce7b46483cbd15079370658d69da5b54c718bf08e0f740a89e5814392c77af Her opponent is a lifelong Democrat who’s volunteered on Democrat campaigns his whole life. He believes in equal outcomes, NOT equal opportunity. If he wins, Pennsylvania and the entire country will be worse off. Here’s the worst part; he has THREE TIMES as much money in the bank as Judge Carluccio. Judge Carluccio is starting out at a disadvantage. | | Will Hurd has experience in keeping in our country safe _** **_ my friend. He's also one of the only Republican candidates in this race sounding the alarm on our greatest rival...China. We owe China over 1 TRILLION dollars and our economy has become even more dependent on their manufacturing. _**So where do we go from here and why should you care?**_
---
|
---
We are in a New Cold War with China. That's the truth. Will's foreign policy is simple: _**Your friends should love you, and your enemies fear you. **_ Make no mistake,__ the Chinese government is trying to surpass the United States as the world's superpower... _**and they have the capabilities to do it. **_ China's military is massive, its population is dense, and they're on the cutting edge of creating or stealing technology like AI or Quantum Computing that will keep them a step ahead of us if we're not careful. Whether it's in space, on our phones, or gathering data – we can't afford to get behind. _This New Cold War will be won on the battlefield of technology... that’s why we need new leadership that understands how to leverage technology for our American security. _ [_**Contribute $1 to help Will get his message out and put his common sense solutions to meet China's challenge and stay one step ahead.**_](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=34d89e461aaa44c78b8907f4a4a14a11&_m=37046e95deeb48d983a2c645605282fd&_e=SFN4eYVz49SX-BbtGMemQooifsYpT7u_LbE84Dbxt6SK31aW4IYY8uooV0wSvltNKBdwWg7F1hv-Fu6DA7ZVyLnKeW0_a6A4OlWggp5feSUMNpk5MKUaoBhOa2Vkikui95HxoKQBLXEAxPfzGlrUiRPqPUYjZ8C8ie_z3W7wLwIdvQn-houXvbasMsF63gqehk0I4jVoPMc0AyZvGL4uECGr_tzYkZgXGwwbOKJmdBNH6Tm6LGcoTLzCgp_N-yFYqtl_yLIkuoY37WqeeKspwpKn0dODv1QmTTqXLW0XmQqfoQBF563VPRL2GoJejaDq_v_nhodeMMZHFYzLdl_gGo_O94MMSC81dR3TKKtX3TzDSGu7MwD27xmWPdK5e3gA)

name: John Fetterman
subject: We have to reelect Sherrod Brown
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Senator Sherrod Brown is a dedicated advocate for working people.
#
Derek,
Senator Sherrod Brown is a dedicated advocate for working people, and together, we're making real progress for families in PA, OH, and all over the country in the Senate.
**But TODAY a major GOP opponent just jumped into the race to defeat Sherrod and try to end our Senate majority.** Cook Political Report already lists Ohio as one of the few Toss Up races in the country, so keeping Sherrod Brown in the Senate could decide whether or not we keep Senate control.
**[This team came together to make history, and I know we can do it again. Will you help Sherrod win reelection by splitting a contribution between our campaigns right away?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230717-1?refcode=em20230717-1-8464&refcode2=8464_434096_ywjcIR&akid=8464%2E434096%2EywjcIR)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230717-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230717-8464&refcode2=8464_434096_ywjcIR&akid=8464%2E434096%2EywjcIR)**
Ohio will be a really close race in 2024, Derek. And with Democrats in toss-up races all across the map, our razor-thin Senate majority is at risk.
We've got to make sure Sherrod has the resources he needs to win. Since the same dark money right-wing groups that tried to defeat us are gearing up to take him down, we need grassroots support right away to fight back.
**[Can you help stop dark money million$ from flipping Ohio red 🔴 and chip in a split contribution of $5 to Sherrod Brown and our campaign today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230717-1?refcode=em20230717-1-8464&refcode2=8464_434096_ywjcIR&akid=8464%2E434096%2EywjcIR)**
There's nothing else I can say but THANK YOUUUU!
❤️ John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230717-8464-footer&t=1&refcode2=8464_434096_ywjcIR&akid=8464%2E434096%2EywjcIR)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

name: Ron Wyden
subject: We’re breaking all the wrong kinds of records
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
Climate change is causing wildfires to burn hotter and more catastrophic
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66635231/417025442/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTMwNDlmNy1kYTI0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yP9hO0jCOdD5oyb8R79MlhNECaoPj_5dWJq2h4YQEI0=&emci=41047223-d724-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=8a3049f7-da24-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=9818364)
---

| | This summer, it seems like not a day goes by where we're not breaking all the wrong kinds of records: high temperatures, ocean temperatures, unprecedented storms and rainfall, and for many parts of the United States – wildfire smoke and air quality alerts like we've never seen before. While Oregonians are well-acquainted with wildfire season and the smoke that comes along with it, the same can't be said for most of the country outside of the Pacific Northwest. But this summer, from the Midwest to the East Coast, millions of Americans are getting their first experience with how consequential wildfire smoke can truly be as it travels down from catastrophic wildfires in Canada. **If this isn't a wake-up call, I don't know what is. The climate crisis is not a distant threat. It's here now, and we're only just beginning to see the consequences.** In the years to come, wildfires, smoke, high temperatures, and unpredictable, dangerous storms will continue to intensify under the climate crisis. **Now is the time to prioritize protecting our planet for future generations. I'm not letting up in this fight, and I hope you'll be with me every step of the way.** More soon, _Ron_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

clean_body: Climate change is causing wildfires to burn hotter and more catastrophic | | | | This summer, it seems like not a day goes by where we're not breaking all the wrong kinds of records: high temperatures, ocean temperatures, unprecedented storms and rainfall, and for many parts of the United States – wildfire smoke and air quality alerts like we've never seen before. While Oregonians are well-acquainted with wildfire season and the smoke that comes along with it, the same can't be said for most of the country outside of the Pacific Northwest. But this summer, from the Midwest to the East Coast, millions of Americans are getting their first experience with how consequential wildfire smoke can truly be as it travels down from catastrophic wildfires in Canada. If this isn't a wake-up call, I don't know what is. The climate crisis is not a distant threat. It's here now, and we're only just beginning to see the consequences. In the years to come, wildfires, smoke, high temperatures, and unpredictable, dangerous storms will continue to intensify under the climate crisis. Now is the time to prioritize protecting our planet for future generations. I'm not letting up in this fight, and I hope you'll be with me every step of the way. More soon, Ron | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. | This email was sent by Wyden for Senate P.O. Fellow Conservative,

**Things aren’t going as swimmingly as President Biden wants you to believe.** We’re $32 trillion in debt, Russia started a war in Europe, and teachers’ unions don’t want parents to have any say whatsoever about what our children are taught in school. Since President Biden was elected in 2020, the United States has lost energy independce, inflation hit an all time high, and cartels have taken over our southern border. Even with all of this happening, _**Joe Biden continues to do nothing.**_

I’m not painting a rosy picture because, Fellow Conservative, the last three years have been a disaster.

**We need to get our country back on track.**

We can start by winning back the majority in the United States Senate. Doing so won’t be easy, **but on June 27th, when former Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy announced his candidacy, taking back the Senate became possible.** He’s running to beat progressive Montana Democrat, Jon Tester, in the nation’s most pivotal Senate contest next year and **[needs our help to win.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a2bbdb61fb8942fdbcf46244ce715f4e&_e=dnvmfDDrXOYUbafWo9T50VSV6LQziJwAWtWpXZW9hcDCFHq3l2a8ph-8BySRPuuexr6ORx3T4aC9sFXtLSHyFDqbptbP9iUZr0OFahAhtrLGeM500yfqjfhEbEtFI4zsX6lrNvvsRRcRd3CrA8bKSkk0c6NSpsOQFoVHhPIMadbtdx_UctgfP9ymxsnHMihGLk9SuUBLWQgRNzMgNnr7WBGSkl8qWn6ts_Ci6F_egbaaW6BVQPefgq_NjNZ99Ig_Ub0aBVeMo5BCPFSCuYCr19I9M8XfTzflt18dXxIt_tZB41-pHWEwRqiQZ21NJiZHLpV2n7ml73YQi6i8OmkLQfQUQNV7VS3GuS1CB5F2x3Fy3vZuoChTyiCXFf5wzO-Ag8HKgFRPRBWs4SyfC8erLg%3D%3D)**

[**SUPPORT A NAVY SEAL FOR U.S. SENATE
DONATE $2

clean_body: You genuinely couldn’t find a better candidate to take out a progressive Democrat than this guy | | Fellow Conservative, Things aren’t going as swimmingly as President Biden wants you to believe. We’re $32 trillion in debt, Russia started a war in Europe, and teachers’ unions don’t want parents to have any say whatsoever about what our children are taught in school. Since President Biden was elected in 2020, the United States has lost energy independce, inflation hit an all time high, and cartels have taken over our southern border. Even with all of this happening, Joe Biden continues to do nothing. I’m not painting a rosy picture because, Fellow Conservative, the last three years have been a disaster. We need to get our country back on track. We can start by winning back the majority in the United States Senate. Doing so won’t be easy, but on June 27th, when former Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy announced his candidacy, taking back the Senate became possible. He’s running to beat progressive Montana Democrat, Jon Tester, in the nation’s most pivotal Senate contest next year and As a Navy SEAL and successful businessman , Tim understands the need for strong American leadership and knows how important it is to fight for hardworking families. I am glad that he’s put himself forward to serve his state, and I am proud to endorse his campaign for U.S. Senate. name: Melissa Watson Ward
subject: Boot Camp Deadline Extended!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America
body:
Hi Peter,

It's not too late to apply for the 2023 Southern Regional Boot Camp [https://webportalapp.com/sp/login/ea_apply?emci=f738a01d-0420-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=920818] ! To accommodate the flurry of inquiries we received late last week, we are extending the deadline until Wednesday, July 19th! The boot camp is open to self-identified Democratic women and non-binary folks who are running in 2023 or thinking about running in 2024 and want to get a headstart on their campaign. The Boot Camp will train you on the fundamentals of running a successful campaign, including campaign strategy, message creation, and fundraising. You'll also become part of a powerful network of alumni pushing for progress at every level, from local school boards to the U.S. Congress.

Apply here: [https://webportalapp.com/sp/login/ea_apply?emci=f738a01d-0420-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=920818]

While applications from Southern states will be prioritized, we encourage candidates from across the country to apply. Your voice matters, and we want to hear from you!

Don't let this additional opportunity to apply pass you by. Submit your application by Wednesday, July 19th, to seize this incredible opportunity.

Melissa Watson Ward
Deputy Affiliate Director
P.S. The ultimate compliment is telling an inspiring woman in your life she should run for office. Forward this message to someone who should run in 2023 or 2024!

facebook.com/emergeamerica [facebook.com/emergeamerica] instagram.com/emergeamerica [instagram.com/emergeamerica] twitter.com/emergeamerica [twitter.com/emergeamerica] Empowering Democratic women to run - and win www.emergeamerica.org [http://emergeamerica.org]

Paid for by Emerge America

Emerge America
818 Connecticut Avenue NW
Suite 450
Washington, DC 20006
United States

name: Sharice Davids
subject: What the voters have made clear: It’s time to stop
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| I’m sick and tired of National Republicans trying to not just take away our rights, but inserting themselves into very personal decisions.

Their attempts at striking down abortion rights nationwide are rightly getting overwhelming pushback from voters.

There are so many people out there whose lives were immediately impacted when Roe was overturned. That’s why people from across the political spectrum, ideological spectrum, and every demographic are standing up to say: STOP.

Stop trying to take our rights away and stop trying to push an extremist agenda. Voters in the midterms sent a clear message that they want leaders who actually get things done to improve their lives— _not a group of politicians and judges deciding to attack our freedoms._

**[Getting things done for KS-03 is exactly what I’m doing in Congress. And I’m proud to have been endorsed by NARAL Pro-Choice America as we gear up for 2024. Now, I need to hear from you. Will the attacks on our freedoms factor into your vote in 2024? Answer now→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66636438/417032872/1545818364?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230717_SV_ReproRights_1.1_0_3MO_candidate_NA_NA_ReproRights&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjJkMDQ5Ni1kZjI0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KQt2SZ_p1rUHb24LrJ8camm7mMGt_oy46MnNgCE5Yio=&emci=5837eb06-d724-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=0f2d0496-df24-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=22117458)** | | [ANSWER NOW→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66636439/417032873/1545818364?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230717_SV_ReproRights_1.1_0_3MO_candidate_NA_NA_ReproRights&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjJkMDQ5Ni1kZjI0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KQt2SZ_p1rUHb24LrJ8camm7mMGt_oy46MnNgCE5Yio=&emci=5837eb06-d724-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=0f2d0496-df24-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=22117458)
---
While extremists continue attacking abortion rights, other important issues like protecting Social Security, lowering costs for working families, and protecting the planet get ignored by GOP leadership in the House.

So many of these anti-abortion movements we’re seeing are funded by out-of-state billionaires in order to suppress the voices of the people—which is why it takes a strong people-powered movement to stop them.

**We did it in Kansas in 2022 and now, I want to know if you believe the attacks on our rights will be an important factor for 2024. Click below to let me know.**

**[https://act.shariceforcongress.com/a/reproductive-rights-survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66636440/417032874/1545818364?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230717_SV_ReproRights_1.1_0_3MO_candidate_NA_NA_ReproRights&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjJkMDQ5Ni1kZjI0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KQt2SZ_p1rUHb24LrJ8camm7mMGt_oy46MnNgCE5Yio=&emci=5837eb06-d724-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=0f2d0496-df24-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=22117458)**

Thank you,
Sharice

_P.S. clean_body: | I’m sick and tired of National Republicans trying to not just take away our rights, but inserting themselves into very personal decisions. Their attempts at striking down abortion rights nationwide are rightly getting overwhelming pushback from voters. There are so many people out there whose lives were immediately impacted when Roe was overturned. That’s why people from across the political spectrum, ideological spectrum, and every demographic are standing up to say: STOP. Stop trying to take our rights away and stop trying to push an extremist agenda. Voters in the midterms sent a clear message that they want leaders who actually get things done to improve their lives— not a group of politicians and judges deciding to attack our freedoms. | | While extremists continue attacking abortion rights, other important issues like protecting Social Security, lowering costs for working families, and protecting the planet get ignored by GOP leadership in the House. So many of these anti-abortion movements we’re seeing are funded by out-of-state billionaires in order to suppress the voices of the people—which is why it takes a strong people-powered movement to stop them. We did it in Kansas in 2022 and now, I want to know if you believe the attacks on our rights will be an important factor for 2024. Click below to let me know. Thank you, Sharice P.S. To hear more of my thoughts on this topic,= * | = | Click here to from Sharice Davids' email list. name: State Freedom Caucus Network
subject: Standing Up for Female Athletes
body:
Two weeks ago, 16-year-old Abbigail Wheeler was kicked off of her swim team and banned from a YMCA in Springfield, Illinois. Why? Because she raised concern about being forced to change in the women’s locker room with biological men. | | [Unsubscribe](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_s=ac03af83913344fc8b7bfcbb04c9f93d&_t=HJPL9LZC2I0KHECGv2zdCoHILPwwSphyr-WTDUxsl4JCFvq6e02Ojb2uhmn7af0yM88gTQQtndrDwJVhPGHU44iNX1lIfXkWsov-YegQ51M%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_s=ac03af83913344fc8b7bfcbb04c9f93d&_t=HJPL9LZC2I0KHECGv2zdCoHILPwwSphyr-WTDUxsl4JCFvq6e02Ojb2uhmn7af0yM88gTQQtndrDwJVhPGHU44iNX1lIfXkWsov-YegQ51M%3D)

|
---
The Illinois Freedom Caucus may not have much power in such a blue state but that doesn't stop them from fighting back against the LGBT insanity and standing up for the sanctity of women's sports. Two weeks ago, 16-year-old Abbigail Wheeler was kicked off of her swim team and banned from a YMCA in Springfield, Illinois. Why? Because she raised concern about being forced to change in the women's locker room with biological men. According to Wheeler, she went to her swim coach, expressing her concern and discomfort after seeing multiple men changing in the women's locker room, to which he responded "There's nothing I can do about it." When their feelings were discarded, Wheeler and her teammate responded by hanging signs outside the locker room that said "biological women only" and "women deserve to be safe." They were then accused of "hate speech," kicked off the team, and banned from the YMCA unless they apologized. You can read here full story [here](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/u/click?_t=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_m=ac03af83913344fc8b7bfcbb04c9f93d&_e=YkWdeQgvC6_v3s1blPxYWqTQsIYBYnjsLlTT318kvQkjV2ET_g7LTisMzcycuQgw_v0PF8VQCc_fXQFoyDFimOT89gk7Dk3OqC7yT-t46zN0kvCs3yPAEIhZ4qtnjw4MSCeUnybx96IjpoSGRggfEPXf3HpoHQMzFb0bxUlVuu3oTGNI3vxaKkUR1glV8oVLzRkupj5s17bm96-Krpt8j0GdF9HrL9tNRwM1DWkdRHRy6dEjBblP-uZL9rItZAwsVXBHaaC6Ltm1atDp04sobYUhnuj195IPq6HT6gNlP1Q%3D). In response, the ILFC organized a rally with the Independent Women's Forum outside the YMCA in Springfield with Wheeler, her teammates, and other advocates for women's sports, that was attended by a massive crowd. "I was uncomfortable with biological men being allowed to undress in the same space as me and my underage teammates. Not only were my feelings discredited but I was removed from my swim team," Wheeler said through tears at the rally. "What kind of world will we leave for our daughters if we keep silent," ILFC Chairman Rep. Chris Miller also said. ILFC members Rep. David Freiss, Rep. Brad Halbrook, and Rep. Adam Neimberg all spoke at the event as well. **Fighting against the American Library Association** Last Tuesday, Montana became the [first state](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/u/click?_t=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_m=ac03af83913344fc8b7bfcbb04c9f93d&_e=YkWdeQgvC6_v3s1blPxYWg867IVvjGDJueQ1-JuZAIoDs0OvygStsCKuAE1_AIfHxKpUjm4WM13CGB1QsXf76vmhK_Qq8exT0lh9OTMz-To0BD_590nfVIHjkEBm-r6OSx43o-YZZlRkkXT0Hehr1hvzmIq8HgTriDCceIfz5zuwdJiHMcCd9mhHrv0jLet9fq67Cea8SfyEUbUhoJ24H2-UPZBgIx_8ORXtbz0YET4T2IUXPSjk_muFm1RCp8kA) to break all ties with the American Library Association (ALA) due to their policy of pushing for sexually explicit books in schools and electing a self-described Marxist to be their new president. The MT Freedom Caucus were the leading voices in calling for their state's library associate to stop funding the ALA and now more Freedom Caucuses are following suit. The Mississippi Freedom Caucus have now released a [statement](http://links.statefreedomcaucus.co/u/click?_t=1b6c04157c924c98ad4a6127d8bd1e6c&_m=ac03af83913344fc8b7bfcbb04c9f93d&_e=YkWdeQgvC6_v3s1blPxYWv3FyvVjNSncZBbn9b0HqjxGbJ4mxQ39McEw5uGYdREaTyez4G73pVmjdRsAhBI_JsX2cTjuo2KRVU_B8vldBKMCcHxr7q9NpmoL6APc6kr6Xqa6ozLdJ-bkhKSu-qN9eYScYNMNjtdw3X9M3OCfm8UPWaHjdSKbYI6tL-ahLz0CsHROUCUS-W4lKINjSdtkWO7abR-HMZ5vOigTh6yQObFG3ozrI6aCdWHgu7M3GF9eB80yAK-DC_ChJ-y9fNo6qA_Y1VGjPEBB4zqU8LmCMgRJbOvCGpYtLYVcW_YWwNdPjuuYfxhfLpzFFyt9wDixRumMaGhbeYweWohR_dAkp7o%3D) calling on their library association to divest from the ALA, determining their state has funded them to the tune of nearly $70,000 in taxpayer dollars since 2015. "As state legislators, we are particularly charged with ensuring taxpayer-funded institutions take no part in furthering ethically and morally repugnant agendas inconsistent with the values of the State of Mississippi," the statement read. Freedom Caucuses will always fight back against Marxist indoctrination in our schools. **Louisiana Veto Session** In the Bayou State's latest legislative session, Democrat Governor John Bel Edwards vetoed several common sense bills that LA Freedom Caucus members were able to pass both houses of the legislature. These included Rep. Beryl Amedee's ban on Central Bank Digital Currencies (CBDC), Rep. Danny McCormick's constitutional carry bill, and Rep. Kathy Edmonston's bill to ban covid vaccine mandates in public schools. Louisiana, however, will officially be holding a session later in the summer to override these egregious vetoes and LAFC members will lead the charge to ensure the legislature gets them done. **JOIN THE FIGHT** Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation's state capitols and in your home state. body:
Look, this is not going to be an easy race
#

Hey friend,
Just this morning, _another_ right-wing Republican jumped in the Ohio Senate race to try to defeat my colleague Senator Sherrod Brown. **So I’m asking you to join me today in making sure Sherrod has the resources to take on the GOP and win:**
[**If you can afford it, will you split a contribution between our campaigns today so we can win Ohio, hold the Senate for Democrats, and keep the American Dream alive for all of us?**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-july23-brown.KnRl3K&refcode=em230717-1-30&t=1&akid=1427%2E159979%2EEQ44tk)
Look, this is not going to be an easy race.
CNN has called Sherrod one of the most vulnerable Senators in the country, and no matter who wins the GOP primary, _Mitch McConnell is going to spend millions of dollars propping them up and attacking Sherrod._
With control of the Senate potentially coming down to Ohio, this is likely to be one of the most competitive — and expensive — races in the country.

clean_body: MSNBC’S MORNING JOE: Republicans “bewildered” by Lauren Boebert’s continued antics, fearing she will lose in 2024 MSNBC’S MORNING JOE: Republicans “bewildered” by Lauren Boebert’s continued antics, fearing she will lose in 2024 Hello, In 2022, Adam Frisch lost to Lauren Boebert by just 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country. But despite nearly losing her seat last year, Boebert has refused to change her angertainment antics. Instead, she’s doubled down on extreme. And with Adam out-raising Boebert thanks to grassroots donors like you, her Washington allies are in a full-blown panic: = According to NBC News, Lauren Boebert’s Washington allies are now even telling her to just “take credit for stuff she had absolutely nothing to do with” to try to win re-election! Lauren Boebert is in deep trouble. After getting the race wrong last year, every political pundit now says that Adam absolutely can defeat Lauren Boebert in 2024 – and the latest poll shows a TIED race. But Boebert’s Super PACs are already attacking Adam with ridiculous lies, and her campaign is going to rake in millions more from her corporate PAC donors. The only way Adam will be able to finish what he started in 2022 and finally send Lauren Boebert packing is if grassroots donors like you give right now to his campaign: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you so much for always having Adam’s back. name: Yadira Caraveo
subject: Can I hear directly from you, Peter?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Hi Peter, it’s Yadira Caraveo, and I have a special request.

**[Will you take a few moments to complete our Supporter Priorities Survey? It shouldn’t take you longer than two minutes, but your input will help our team tremendously!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66637273/417035830/-1158519932?refcode=em_surv_2023.07.17_b1_yc_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzY3MzUxZS1lNDI0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y5viFBdnYHb8D4jfEMaZDY915TGQ5f6LRWMdFVzxECQ=&emci=ee94a08c-b524-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=0367351e-e424-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=12666102)** | ****[Start the Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66637274/417035831/-1158519932?refcode=em_surv_2023.07.17_b1_yc_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzY3MzUxZS1lNDI0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y5viFBdnYHb8D4jfEMaZDY915TGQ5f6LRWMdFVzxECQ=&emci=ee94a08c-b524-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=0367351e-e424-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=12666102)****
---
Before I ever dreamed of running for elected office, I became a pediatrician to make a positive impact for the next generation.

When I started practicing as a doctor in Adams County - _where 65% of families rely on Medicaid_ \- I quickly realized helping children required so much more than what I was able to do in healthcare.

I knew I needed to run for office to make housing more affordable, lower healthcare costs, and advocate for the working-class families in my community. While I keep this mission close to my heart in Congress, **I want to understand the perspective of supporters like you,** who are highly-engaged, passionate, and played a critical role in helping elect me to Congress.

**[So can I count on you to complete this Supporter Priorities Survey my team pulled together? Your feedback means the world to me!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66637275/417035832/-1158519932?refcode=em_surv_2023.07.17_b1_yc_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzY3MzUxZS1lNDI0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y5viFBdnYHb8D4jfEMaZDY915TGQ5f6LRWMdFVzxECQ=&emci=ee94a08c-b524-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=0367351e-e424-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=12666102)**
****[Take the Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66637276/417035833/-1158519932?refcode=em_surv_2023.07.17_b1_yc_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzY3MzUxZS1lNDI0LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y5viFBdnYHb8D4jfEMaZDY915TGQ5f6LRWMdFVzxECQ=&emci=ee94a08c-b524-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=0367351e-e424-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=12666102)****

Thank you,

_Yadira_

name: Matt, Communications Director
subject: See everything you might have missed last week!
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/105455/images/Gabe%20Amo%20Header_V6.png]

Hi Friend,

I’m Matt, Gabe’s Communications Director. Our campaign continues to gain more and more momentum, and that's thanks to you! There’s a ton going on, so we wanted to give you a quick recap on the big week we just had and make sure you didn’t miss our big 3.

ENDORSED: Gabe Amo Endorsed by the Congressional Black Caucus PAC

Last week, we announced that the Congressional Black Caucus PAC endorsed Gabe’s campaign to be the next U.S. Congressman from Rhode Island. Gabe is so honored to have the CBCPAC join #TeamGabe.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cbc-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cbc-em]

Check out this article [https://www.wpri.com/news/elections/congressional-black-caucus-pac-backs-amo-in-race-for-cicilline-seat/] covering this milestone endorsement.

IN FRONT OF VOTERS: Watch “West Wing”

We also launched our campaign’s first ad, “West Wing.” Click the video [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/westwing-em] below to watch!

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/westwing-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/westwing-em]

OUR GRASSROOTS CAMPAIGN: Q2 Fundraising Report

This past weekend, campaigns had to publish their second quarter fundraising reports. Despite having never run for office, Gabe raised the second-most amount of money last quarter. He's up against self-funders and candidates with lists that they bought or have built over several campaign cycles. Gabe is well-positioned to be successful in September.

Gabe received contributions from over 1,000 individuals who all believe that we need experienced leaders in Congress who are focused on getting things done.

This race has huge stakes and Gabe is the only candidate who is prepared to deliver for Rhode Islanders on day one. But he can't do it without your help. Please consider chipping in any amount today to help keep up our momentum.

KEEP UP THE MOMENTUM [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email-july]

Your support means the world,
Matt
Communications Director

Gabe Amo for Congress

https://www.facebook.com/gabeamoforcongress [https://www.facebook.com/gabeamoforcongress] https://twitter.com/gabeamo [https://twitter.com/gabeamo]

https://www.instagram.com/gabeamoforcongress/ [https://www.instagram.com/gabeamoforcongress/] https://www.gabeamo.com/ [https://www.gabeamo.com/]

Gabe Amo for Congress
P.O. Box 40457
Providence, RI 02940
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/XWtddIVotU--0Apd99NvFQ2?unsubscribedata=A5S1MG4Q5%2FcVsSK0%2ByFLc%2BT9damwdPATQt7idYlGaBJqgQ2rK4f%2BeCBW66nxDbiAAB%2BPUvc%2FK7uzluXU9tkE7tLQIqxWqWhNvCYh%2FRFL7QpNEPHFYprv6IzMIy1rlCvRf%2BI%2Fpd3H8pzxhCyiDxGgyPIJQA1TpP4Fop3bFxw4MnRljs3SWeLU%2BNFVl%2FwgMUdeVTjs1l0VCw8eBK8mANd49LW3A3pq4SgT0DozsLABL6Ul4Cc8Zok0%2FwdcfLan8qHPM863PL0%2Bh5PCNbIcH%2FdIH%2F3kDkvtwfwPqj0XaYgXBC47DAVocHTqYAXNcEMkUbqddN3DyklxgMvOFmByfQJwq9mTarAkqEe2tfgcO1moqagJS5%2FAemyiozh6lwYVXYy46AStInb%2B3rT3%2BUWn0YvUMF1FxSFmNS00e9%2BSxYFjzzC79HjmE3xjolzQMJjwBCEr .

Fellow Conservative,

**Things aren’t going as swimmingly as President Biden wants you to believe.** We’re $32 trillion in debt, Russia started a war in Europe, and teachers’ unions don’t want parents to have any say whatsoever about what our children are taught in school. Since President Biden was elected in 2020, the United States has lost energy independce, inflation hit an all time high, and cartels have taken over our southern border. Even with all of this happening, _**Joe Biden continues to do nothing.**_

I’m not painting a rosy picture because, Fellow Conservative, the last three years have been a disaster.

**We need to get our country back on track.**

We can start by winning back the majority in the United States Senate. Doing so won’t be easy, **but on June 27th, when former Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy announced his candidacy, taking back the Senate became possible.** He’s running to beat progressive Montana Democrat, Jon Tester, in the nation’s most pivotal Senate contest next year and **[needs our help to win.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0a9258c2ee154cbb959fcec7c65e66d3&_e=M-3U89adWUmEBe4pYvpUb6giPQrPWyajhKIuX-vrJNCKJa-5VyAO2EjLlA4-sPYtjAsRM4-s6T27_bhJGyB-Vrg_7yPoXgt-h2jSDErewN9_MvSWE5SCyKUG49R7v69HEv5NNORXvIwJ9-0MQyNC4K3NCMJO8mwddJSu8qdZNM9jW2IEhoHbdMuIUZKrKVsq8YfNouYrWuZPnH6301yhK58Uvdnmcmjr6HpLm3s_6YH-IMhCm_IUv7UAIeAbwxNo2ZV5WNbT_h9AVhJLbTi87o0uUTWmAm0g1W2ptgRtlQwZ6fPR7CY5fpKA4Mb5lAdHdsTUN4qwSvU-N3ywvYaUOoh-OZMTAoHXjn8zen9rLx79dF6FSLsj6jPxeQVkL98U-c29Bw12e1c8-2OCANrsxg%3D%3D)**

subject: RE: Garland Bombshell

body:
| | | [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=997ceb77ca3b4e73a655eda9109b3682&_e=0fbigiN9w6rR4XXsJHTRFzoxp3lYp8DaPoEVUUi818D519s1gqDJWR1EaVRrr2UKFFVrCK4vEFNi3DhGNWP1K08iJ9rh2mAKl7y0lMf0xGOwS8jI6um8n__KzB2-O5ftc1BrQvYitR5rwIVTSHZ5GuLqlH0D-X3WyN7yYKZr5Jm-QjTzwhjpcWU4qGBjeobYEy4ebKL5t9RwlygX5-WtryY_o83G2wgPcBTXnwo-8_6HMCtdAJy9-ZNsaJyAa_ffygGifUW6H81icLelVPkwkEnHPK3APe7QwbK936XcQe5FDDjW1zXvxxwFLW7f9RqdNsp_ldB98JADUDxwuKcI-QGLGfbhMgxR7CrNfa5D8-8PTh4h4DMS7ZPqylskWI24DxOxDoA1KTSssUvriKzLJW64MmfBXroAinuSJ_eVF4pZ8wcAjLjye4AujK8NQ1_DRCffN2d2zrBLTs5GuPfeFQDQo95jbxuyHJ-Sn-b_RzdwZnRDls9pOVt6YGUvxamo7YA4FCBXWcDKQszp5g0W3A%3D%3D)
---
Fellow Conservative,
The White House and the Department of Justice (DOJ) are in full panic mode. **They're desperately trying to cover up their alleged corruption, hoping their lapdogs in the media will continue to keep the truth from the American people.** But the evidence is mounting, and even the corporate media can't ignore this anymore! Here are two things you can do to help fight back: 1) **[Listen to one of the latest episodes of the Verdict podcast](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=997ceb77ca3b4e73a655eda9109b3682&_e=0fbigiN9w6rR4XXsJHTRFzoxp3lYp8DaPoEVUUi818D519s1gqDJWR1EaVRrr2UKFFVrCK4vEFNi3DhGNWP1K08iJ9rh2mAKl7y0lMf0xGOwS8jI6um8n__KzB2-O5ftc1BrQvYitR5rwIVTSHZ5GuLqlH0D-X3WyN7yYKZr5Jm-QjTzwhjpcWU4qGBjeobYEy4ebKL5t9RwlygX5-WtryY_o83G2wgPcBTXnwo-8_6HMCtdAJy9-ZNsaJyAa_ffygGifUW6H81icLelVPkwkEnHPK3APe7QwbK936XcQe5FDDjW1zXvxxwFLW7f9RqdNsp_ldB98JADUDxwuKcI-QGLGfbhMgxR7CrNfa5D8-8PTh4h4DMS7ZPqylskWI24BOrrh1F_Ur_a5HWUG3xp0qnsFKr7ih0QM8KhrN9URfxH842Cma8T0VyYAcpC_CdejPe0FMOb0EhWojPBMfLsNGkXeNfAwvhI0lRxR1jsmf1djzu9QBDUHTE-VFskQYYc2i1F7pX7iMU2ykgL4aTXBw%3D%3D)** to hear a full breakdown of the evidence against Merrick Garland. 2) **[Chip in a generous donation](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=997ceb77ca3b4e73a655eda9109b3682&_e=0fbigiN9w6rR4XXsJHTRFzoxp3lYp8DaPoEVUUi818D519s1gqDJWR1EaVRrr2UKFFVrCK4vEFNi3DhGNWP1K08iJ9rh2mAKl7y0lMf0xGOwS8jI6um8n__KzB2-O5ftc1BrQvYitR5rwIVTSHZ5GuLqlH0D-X3WyN7yYKZr5Jm-QjTzwhjpcWU4qGBjeobYEy4ebKL5t9RwlygX5-WtryY_o83G2wgPcBTXnwo-8_6HMCtdAJy9-ZNsaJyAa_ffygGifUW6H81icLelVPkwkEnHPK3APe7QwbK936XcQe5FDDjW1zXvxxwFLW7f9RqdNsp_ldB98JADUDxwuKcI-QGLGfbhMgxR7CrNfa5D8-8PTh4h4DMS7ZPqylskWI24oVLYrQXq5yiu4D8Vr7E7aTtw2IPjkCNiW8akGvPAsJZqfAbymG6NLk8HmMrXuFUi5VIW6gNvGMofRS1gvktoX4-o26caUIwCLCe7aN2d7xuqT98eCRDDi9tyHJsTV9-s5vcrb4oNyhV1obT5yNHbjQ%3D%3D)** to help me lead the charge against Biden's corrupted DOJ. Courageous whistleblowers in the DOJ and other federal departments have made multiple allegations against Garland, the Justice Department, and Joe Biden. They allege: 1) The DOJ _**twice prevented the prosecutor**_ investigating the Hunter Biden case, U.S. Attorney David Weiss, from bringing charges against Hunter Biden that were not approved by Merrick Garland. 2) Merrick Garland _**refused to name a special prosecutor**_ in the Hunter Biden tax investigation. 3) Merrick Garland _**refused to prosecute Hunter Biden for more substantial charges**_ recommended by the IRS. 4) The DOJ _**warned Hunter Biden about future searches**_ for materials that could be used as evidence against him. 5) An Assistant U.S. Attorney _**stopped investigators from asking Joe Biden if he was the "big guy"**_**__** Hunter Biden referred to when negotiating an alleged bribe with a Ukrainian gas company executive. If any of these allegations are true, they contradict Merrick Garland's sworn testimony, and he likely committed perjury. You would think a little humility would be in order - but not for Garland. He responded with a defiant statement that blamed everyone but himself for the DOJ's lack of credibility. **It's time for the DOJ to appoint a special counsel to investigate Merrick Garland for obstruction of justice and perjury.** I don't take this lightly, Fellow Conservative. I've never called for a special counsel to investigate a sitting Attorney General. But the evidence is overwhelming, and it's time to expose the truth about Garland's alleged corruption. [_****_](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=997ceb77ca3b4e73a655eda9109b3682&_e=0fbigiN9w6rR4XXsJHTRFzoxp3lYp8DaPoEVUUi818D519s1gqDJWR1EaVRrr2UKc4fqYcGuPbXqcJ0Cj8g6F6JbFe98SQ7sEiEc_KMxVl7jrvhSNX8w-tjljrIaPMzuCEd4dE5afRhdsSkhENQoTrB_6WhHxJkaSRhC1UQsUHZpS7luZLDDQoYUH2rL7D4IWCyBhmy6hf1p8KsxlOg5mgiVMlCd9O5tukbzXKRQGnbKLh18Wq0IA9ar4JKeppf5v22TshGjvdxEjfVokQf353q2A5AqOKjn5TVZBCOzdm-POv2I0mUflgBNJWZATwYqu4Mk3WIiRibEKw6ZL7GPXKEdM5VmcCIaRWl8Td5nCDgGLdF_0GSAHVJ-dpUfhuV5bLGypIzYFa-wKbLVOJTlCk5UDO3NzPd0cjc5RfcDryqLxZVvtNi7_AmWj7QgN9a7toBYX1AzPnr0aA-aao0CzAZawNc4QefjLgBdQxxAlfE%3D)_**[I clean_body: | | | Fellow Conservative, The White House and the Department of Justice (DOJ) are in full panic mode. They're desperately trying to cover up their alleged corruption, hoping their lapdogs in the media will continue to keep the truth from the American people. But the evidence is mounting, and even the corporate media can't ignore this anymore! Here are two things you can do to help fight back: 1) to hear a full breakdown of the evidence against Merrick Garland. 2) to help me lead the charge against Biden's corrupted DOJ. Courageous whistleblowers in the DOJ and other federal departments have made multiple allegations against Garland, the Justice Department, and Joe Biden. They allege: 1) The DOJ twice prevented the prosecutor investigating the Hunter Biden case, U.S. Attorney David Weiss, from bringing charges against Hunter Biden that were not approved by Merrick Garland. 2) Merrick Garland refused to name a special prosecutor in the Hunter Biden tax investigation. 3) Merrick Garland refused to prosecute Hunter Biden for more substantial charges recommended by the IRS. 4) The DOJ warned Hunter Biden about future searches for materials that could be used as evidence against him. 5) An Assistant U.S. Attorney stopped investigators from asking Joe Biden if he was the "big guy" Hunter Biden referred to when negotiating an alleged bribe with a Ukrainian gas company executive. If any of these allegations are true, they contradict Merrick Garland's sworn testimony, and he likely committed perjury. You would think a little humility would be in order - but not for Garland. He responded with a defiant statement that blamed everyone but himself for the DOJ's lack of credibility. It's time for the DOJ to appoint a special counsel to investigate Merrick Garland for obstruction of justice and perjury. I don't take this lightly, Fellow Conservative. I've never called for a special counsel to investigate a sitting Attorney General. But the evidence is overwhelming, and it's time to expose the truth about Garland's alleged corruption. And don't forget to to the Verdict for in-depth coverage of this unfolding scandal. For Liberty, Ted Cruz | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | 815 A Brazos, PMB 550, Austin, TX 78701 | | | |

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: I’d be really grateful if you took the time to read this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
I’m hoping you’ll read this all the way through.

| |
---
| | | This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. I wanted to take a few minutes today to share something personal with you, but it's going to take a bit of explaining. **If you get to the end and still don 't understand my commitment to America, then I'm just appreciative that you took the time to read this in its entirety.**

I wanted to take some time to discuss my background so you understand where I'm coming from when I'm fighting for the American people.
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsc6ej1sndnjbmeqtqfhtnph69d4ov07mrapv1i8_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdgm4o34cdh2bs "Kevin as a baby with his dad")
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zl1ne8vqtndjnbe6pbr5uc8fgvvl3vd1v6b5jm6o_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdgm4o34cdh2bs "Kevin with his siblings in 1968")
---
_My dad and I, circa 1966._| _My siblings, Shelly and Mark, and I, circa 1968._

I come from a working-class background. My grandparents were immigrants. My mom, Roberta, was a homemaker. My dad, Owen, was an assistant city fire chief. **They instilled a strong work ethic in me that I carry with me every day.**
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3676pkagok7gqujutr0lbimbv3j6e2ev3apbvi8_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdgm4o34cdh2bs "Kevin working the counter at Kevin O's Deli & McCarthy's Yogurt.")
---
_Working the counter at Kevin O's Deli & McCarthy's Yogurt. (Sorry for the image quality, but at least you'll know it's authentic!)_

When I was 19, I ran my first business, Kevin O's Deli, selling sandwiches out of the back of my uncle's yogurt shop. Eventually, I sold the deli to pay my way through college. It taught me a lot about personal responsibility, and **I quickly learned how overregulation by the government affects small businesses. **
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zeg6bl2ef3vu4afiaskpqi93s2977mqo77k4djj0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdgm4o34cdh2bs "Kevin speaking with a farmer on the campaign trail in 2010")
---
_Speaking with a farmer on the campaign trail in 2010._

After Kevin O's Deli and my experience with government overreach, I decided it was time to make a change. I knew public service would be a positive way for me to channel my frustration as a former small business owner, while also helping others in similar situations. Little did I know that working in the California State Assembly would pave the way to holding one of the most prestigious roles in our country: _**Speaker of the House of Representatives.**_
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjm28pctpgq1n3pvvg3hmga6pscnh964p2ecejb8_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdgm4o34cdh2bs "Celebrating Republicans’ success in taking back the House in 2022.")
---
_Celebrating Republicans ' success in taking back the House in 2022_

This brings me to my main point: **my Commitment to America isn 't some political ploy - _it 's deeply personal._**

**As Speaker of the House, I promise to deliver on our commitment to America and the American people.

[If you support my efforts as Speaker, please chip in whatever you can afford - $5, $10, even $25 if you can - to help me continue this fight.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdsn8abh2t9j0fq51n0oj4571qd92ifps60e2ug0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdgm4o34cdh2bs "If you support my efforts as Speaker, please chip in whatever you can afford – $5, $10, even $25 if you can – to help me continue this fight.")**

| | [STAND WITH SPEAKER MCCARTHY](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsodknh3m9qp5cmualbl0nsfsi27oef22b91r5p0_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdgm4o34cdh2bs "STAND WITH SPEAKER MCCARTHY")
---

If you've read this through to the end, thank you so much for your time. I hope you understand why our commitment to America is so important. I'm so grateful to have your support.

Thank you,

---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zq1km0pb7d3j18rt8381ralnvg6fe5cd2h5u2qv8_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdgm4o34cdh2bs "KOM Signature")
---

Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy

---
| | [DONATE NOW](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcuc8ci3pl69shbg4mcdis1lpndmfvgr8pn7fa0g_rp22sh2s8i66o74sdgm4o34cdh2bs "DONATE NOW")
---

---
|
---
|

Bakersfield, CA 93389

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Protect polar bears from Big Oil
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1880907?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **A bone-thin polar bear lumbers over the ice shelf. Ice CRACKS beneath her paws. She’s starving as her hunting grounds are MELTING AWAY!** The Arctic is melting _**TWICE AS FAST**_ as the rest of the world due to the climate crisis. Scientists predict that the region could be _**completely ice-free**_ within the next 31 years. That means**polar bears will lose their fragile habitat!** Meanwhile, greedy fossil fuel companies are **drilling in the Arctic** , spewing climate-warming emissions, and staining the region with pollution. Only **900 Southern Beaufort polar bears remain, and _we’re losing more all the time!_** **[Tell the Fish and Wildlife Service to STOP oil drilling in the Arctic! We need 4,537 more signatures by 11:59pm TONIGHT!>> ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1880908?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1880909?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Arctic oil and gas activity drives away _**critical food sources**_ for polar bears, _**disrupts bear den sites**_ , and could even _**impair feeding, hunting, and caring for cubs!**_ But fossil fuel companies prioritize lining their own profits over this vulnerable species.
The Fish and Wildlife Service confirmed that new oil and gas activity is _**95% LIKELY TO CAUSE INJURY OR DEATH TO POLAR BEARS!**_ The FWS could stop this oil and gas drilling – **that’s why we need your help!** **[Friend, will you send a message to the FWS and help PROTECT polar bears and the Arctic from Big Oil greed? ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1880910?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1880909?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Raena Garcia,
Fossil Fuel and Lands Campaigner,
Friends of the Earth**
|
